Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(**

Direct implementation of pullbacks together with:

- Proof that pullbacks form a property in a (saturated/univalent) category ([isaprop_Pullbacks])
- The pullback of a monic is monic ([MonicPullbackisMonic])
- A square isomorphic to a pullback is a pullback (case 1) ([isPullback_iso_of_morphisms])
- The pullback of a z_iso is a z_iso ([Pullback_of_z_iso])
- Symmetry ([is_symmetric_isPullback])
- Construction of pullbacks from equalizers and binary products
  ([Pullbacks_from_Equalizers_BinProducts])
- A fully faithful functor reflects limits ([isPullback_preimage_square])
- A fully faithfull and essentially surjects functor preserves pullbacks ([isPullback_image_square])
- Pullbacks in functor categories ([FunctorcategoryPullbacks])
- Construction of binary products from pullbacks ([BinProductsFromPullbacks])
- The type of pullbacks on a given diagram is a proposition

*)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]


Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.TransportMorphisms.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Terminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Equalizers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monics.

Local Open Scope cat.

(** Definition of pullbacks *)
Section def_pb.

  Context (C : category).

Definition isPullback {a b c d : C} (f : b --> a) (g : c --> a)
        (p1 : d --> b) (p2 : d --> c) (H : p1 · f = p2 · g) : UU :=
   ∏ e (h : e --> b) (k : e --> c) (H : h · f = k · g ),
      ∃! hk : e --> d, (hk · p1 = h) × (hk · p2 = k).


C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
isaprop (isPullback f g p1 p2 H)


C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
isaprop (isPullback f g p1 p2 H)

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
t: C
t0: C ⟦ t, b ⟧
t1: C ⟦ t, c ⟧
t2: t0 · f = t1 · g
isofhlevel 1
  (∃! hk : C ⟦ t, d ⟧, hk · p1 = t0 × hk · p2 = t1)

  apply isapropiscontr.
Qed.


C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
P: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hcomm: h · f = k · g
w: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
H1: w · p1 = h
H2: w · p2 = k
w = pr11 (P e h k Hcomm)


C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
P: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hcomm: h · f = k · g
w: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
H1: w · p1 = h
H2: w · p2 = k
w = pr11 (P e h k Hcomm)

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
P: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hcomm: h · f = k · g
w: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
H1: w · p1 = h
H2: w · p2 = k
T:= w,, make_dirprod H1 H2: ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · p1 = h × hk · p2 = k
w = pr11 (P e h k Hcomm)

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
P: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hcomm: h · f = k · g
w: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
H1: w · p1 = h
H2: w · p2 = k
T:= w,, make_dirprod H1 H2: ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · p1 = h × hk · p2 = k
T':= pr2 (P e h k Hcomm) T: T = pr1 (P e h k Hcomm)
w = pr11 (P e h k Hcomm)

  exact (base_paths _ _ T').
Qed.

Definition Pullback {a b c : C} (f : b --> a) (g : c --> a) :=
     ∑ pfg : (∑ p : C, (p --> b) × (p --> c)),
       ∑ (H : pr1 (pr2 pfg) · f = pr2 (pr2 pfg) · g),
         isPullback f g (pr1 (pr2 pfg)) (pr2 (pr2 pfg)) H.

Definition Pullbacks : UU :=
  ∏ (a b c : C) (f : b --> a) (g : c --> a), Pullback f g.

Definition hasPullbacks : UU :=
  ∏ (a b c : C) (f : b --> a) (g : c --> a), ishinh (Pullback f g).

Definition PullbackObject {a b c : C} {f : b --> a} {g : c --> a}:
   Pullback f g -> C := λ H, pr1 (pr1 H).
Coercion PullbackObject : Pullback >-> ob.

Definition PullbackPr1 {a b c : C} {f : b --> a} {g : c --> a}
   (Pb : Pullback f g) : Pb --> b := pr1 (pr2 (pr1 Pb)).

Definition PullbackPr2 {a b c : C} {f : b --> a} {g : c --> a}
   (Pb : Pullback f g) : Pb --> c := pr2 (pr2 (pr1 Pb)).


C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb: Pullback f g
PullbackPr1 Pb · f = PullbackPr2 Pb · g


C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb: Pullback f g
PullbackPr1 Pb · f = PullbackPr2 Pb · g

  exact (pr1 (pr2 Pb)).
Qed.


C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
P: Pullback f g
isPullback f g (PullbackPr1 P) (PullbackPr2 P)
  (PullbackSqrCommutes P)


C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
P: Pullback f g
isPullback f g (PullbackPr1 P) (PullbackPr2 P)
  (PullbackSqrCommutes P)

  exact (pr2 (pr2 P)).
Defined.

Definition PullbackArrow {a b c : C} {f : b --> a} {g : c --> a}
   (Pb : Pullback f g) e (h : e --> b) (k : e --> c) (H : h · f = k · g) : e --> Pb :=
   pr1 (pr1 (isPullback_Pullback Pb e h k H)).


C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
P: Pullback f g
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hcomm: h · f = k · g
w: C ⟦ e, P ⟧
H1: w · PullbackPr1 P = h
H2: w · PullbackPr2 P = k
w = PullbackArrow P e h k Hcomm


C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
P: Pullback f g
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hcomm: h · f = k · g
w: C ⟦ e, P ⟧
H1: w · PullbackPr1 P = h
H2: w · PullbackPr2 P = k
w = PullbackArrow P e h k Hcomm

now apply PullbackArrowUnique.
Qed.



C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb: Pullback f g
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
PullbackArrow Pb e h k H · PullbackPr1 Pb = h


C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb: Pullback f g
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
PullbackArrow Pb e h k H · PullbackPr1 Pb = h

  exact (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 (isPullback_Pullback Pb e h k H)))).
Qed.


C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb: Pullback f g
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
PullbackArrow Pb e h k H · PullbackPr2 Pb = k


C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb: Pullback f g
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
PullbackArrow Pb e h k H · PullbackPr2 Pb = k

  exact (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 (isPullback_Pullback Pb e h k H)))).
Qed.


C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
d: C
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
ispb: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
Pullback f g


C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
d: C
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
ispb: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
Pullback f g

  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
d: C
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
ispb: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, b ⟧ × C ⟦ p, c ⟧
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
d: C
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
ispb: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
(λ pfg : ∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, b ⟧ × C ⟦ p, c ⟧,
 ∑ H : pr12 pfg · f = pr22 pfg · g,
 isPullback f g (pr12 pfg) (pr22 pfg) H) 
  ?pr1

  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
d: C
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
ispb: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, b ⟧ × C ⟦ p, c ⟧
 
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
d: C
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
ispb: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
C
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
d: C
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
ispb: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
(λ p : C, C ⟦ p, b ⟧ × C ⟦ p, c ⟧) ?pr1

    
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
d: C
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
ispb: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
C
 apply d.
    
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
d: C
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
ispb: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
(λ p : C, C ⟦ p, b ⟧ × C ⟦ p, c ⟧) d
 
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
d: C
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
ispb: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
C ⟦ d, c ⟧

      exact p2.
  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
d: C
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
ispb: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
(λ pfg : ∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, b ⟧ × C ⟦ p, c ⟧,
 ∑ H : pr12 pfg · f = pr22 pfg · g,
 isPullback f g (pr12 pfg) (pr22 pfg) H) (d,, p1,, p2)
 
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
d: C
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
ispb: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
isPullback f g (pr12 (d,, p1,, p2))
  (pr22 (d,, p1,, p2)) H

    apply ispb.
Defined.


C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
(∏ (e : C) (h : C ⟦ e, b ⟧) (k : C ⟦ e, c ⟧),
 h · f = k · g
 → ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · p1 = h × hk · p2 = k)
→ isPullback f g p1 p2 H


C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
(∏ (e : C) (h : C ⟦ e, b ⟧) (k : C ⟦ e, c ⟧),
 h · f = k · g
 → ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · p1 = h × hk · p2 = k)
→ isPullback f g p1 p2 H

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
H': ∏ (e : C) (h : C ⟦ e, b ⟧) (k : C ⟦ e, c ⟧),
h · f = k · g
→ ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · p1 = h × hk · p2 = k
x: C
cx: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ x, c ⟧
sqr: cx · f = k · g
∃! hk : C ⟦ x, d ⟧, hk · p1 = cx × hk · p2 = k

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
H': ∏ (e : C) (h : C ⟦ e, b ⟧) (k : C ⟦ e, c ⟧),
h · f = k · g
→ ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · p1 = h × hk · p2 = k
x: C
cx: C ⟦ x, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ x, c ⟧
sqr: cx · f = k · g
cx · f = k · g
 assumption.
Defined.


C: category
c, d, a, b, x: C
k0: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
f: C ⟦ a, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, x ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, a ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
k0 · h · f = k0 · k · g


C: category
c, d, a, b, x: C
k0: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
f: C ⟦ a, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, x ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, a ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
k0 · h · f = k0 · k · g

now rewrite <- assoc, H, assoc.
Qed.


C: category
c, d: C
k0: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
a, b, x: C
f: C ⟦ a, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, x ⟧
Pb: Pullback f g
h: C ⟦ d, a ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
k0 · PullbackArrow Pb d h k H =
PullbackArrow Pb c (k0 · h) (k0 · k)
  (postCompWithPullbackArrow_subproof k0 H)


C: category
c, d: C
k0: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
a, b, x: C
f: C ⟦ a, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, x ⟧
Pb: Pullback f g
h: C ⟦ d, a ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
k0 · PullbackArrow Pb d h k H =
PullbackArrow Pb c (k0 · h) (k0 · k)
  (postCompWithPullbackArrow_subproof k0 H)


C: category
c, d: C
k0: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
a, b, x: C
f: C ⟦ a, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, x ⟧
Pb: Pullback f g
h: C ⟦ d, a ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
k0 · PullbackArrow Pb d h k H · PullbackPr1 Pb =
k0 · h
C: category
c, d: C
k0: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
a, b, x: C
f: C ⟦ a, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, x ⟧
Pb: Pullback f g
h: C ⟦ d, a ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
k0 · PullbackArrow Pb d h k H · PullbackPr2 Pb =
k0 · k


C: category
c, d: C
k0: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
a, b, x: C
f: C ⟦ a, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, x ⟧
Pb: Pullback f g
h: C ⟦ d, a ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
k0 · PullbackArrow Pb d h k H · PullbackPr1 Pb =
k0 · h
 now rewrite <- assoc, PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1.

C: category
c, d: C
k0: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
a, b, x: C
f: C ⟦ a, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, x ⟧
Pb: Pullback f g
h: C ⟦ d, a ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
k0 · PullbackArrow Pb d h k H · PullbackPr2 Pb =
k0 · k
 now rewrite <- assoc, PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2.
Qed.


C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
P: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
e: C
w, w': C ⟦ e, d ⟧
H1: w · p1 = w' · p1
H2: w · p2 = w' · p2
w = w'


C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
P: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
e: C
w, w': C ⟦ e, d ⟧
H1: w · p1 = w' · p1
H2: w · p2 = w' · p2
w = w'

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
P: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
e: C
w, w': C ⟦ e, d ⟧
H1: w · p1 = w' · p1
H2: w · p2 = w' · p2
w · p1 · f = w · p2 · g
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
P: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
e: C
w, w': C ⟦ e, d ⟧
H1: w · p1 = w' · p1
H2: w · p2 = w' · p2
Hw: w · p1 · f = w · p2 · g
w = w'

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
P: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
e: C
w, w': C ⟦ e, d ⟧
H1: w · p1 = w' · p1
H2: w · p2 = w' · p2
w · p1 · f = w · p2 · g
 rewrite <- assoc , H, assoc; apply idpath. 
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
P: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
e: C
w, w': C ⟦ e, d ⟧
H1: w · p1 = w' · p1
H2: w · p2 = w' · p2
Hw: w · p1 · f = w · p2 · g
w = w'

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
P: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
e: C
w, w': C ⟦ e, d ⟧
H1: w · p1 = w' · p1
H2: w · p2 = w' · p2
Hw: w · p1 · f = w · p2 · g
w' · p1 · f = w' · p2 · g
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
P: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
e: C
w, w': C ⟦ e, d ⟧
H1: w · p1 = w' · p1
H2: w · p2 = w' · p2
Hw: w · p1 · f = w · p2 · g
Hw': w' · p1 · f = w' · p2 · g
w = w'

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
P: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
e: C
w, w': C ⟦ e, d ⟧
H1: w · p1 = w' · p1
H2: w · p2 = w' · p2
Hw: w · p1 · f = w · p2 · g
w' · p1 · f = w' · p2 · g
 rewrite <- assoc , H, assoc; apply idpath. 
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
P: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
e: C
w, w': C ⟦ e, d ⟧
H1: w · p1 = w' · p1
H2: w · p2 = w' · p2
Hw: w · p1 · f = w · p2 · g
Hw': w' · p1 · f = w' · p2 · g
w = w'

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
P: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
e: C
w, w': C ⟦ e, d ⟧
H1: w · p1 = w' · p1
H2: w · p2 = w' · p2
Hw: w · p1 · f = w · p2 · g
Hw': w' · p1 · f = w' · p2 · g
Pb:= make_Pullback f g d p1 p2 H P: Pullback f g
w = w'

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
P: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
e: C
w, w': C ⟦ e, d ⟧
H1: w · p1 = w' · p1
H2: w · p2 = w' · p2
Hw: w · p1 · f = w · p2 · g
Hw': w' · p1 · f = w' · p2 · g
Pb:= make_Pullback f g d p1 p2 H P: Pullback f g
Xw:= PullbackArrow Pb e (w · p1) (w · p2) Hw: C ⟦ e, Pb ⟧
w = w'

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
P: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
e: C
w, w': C ⟦ e, d ⟧
H1: w · p1 = w' · p1
H2: w · p2 = w' · p2
Hw: w · p1 · f = w · p2 · g
Hw': w' · p1 · f = w' · p2 · g
Pb:= make_Pullback f g d p1 p2 H P: Pullback f g
Xw:= PullbackArrow Pb e (w · p1) (w · p2) Hw: C ⟦ e, Pb ⟧
Xw = w'

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
P: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
e: C
w, w': C ⟦ e, d ⟧
H1: w · p1 = w' · p1
H2: w · p2 = w' · p2
Hw: w · p1 · f = w · p2 · g
Hw': w' · p1 · f = w' · p2 · g
Pb:= make_Pullback f g d p1 p2 H P: Pullback f g
Xw:= PullbackArrow Pb e (w · p1) (w · p2) Hw: C ⟦ e, Pb ⟧
w' = Xw

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
P: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
e: C
w, w': C ⟦ e, d ⟧
H1: w · p1 = w' · p1
H2: w · p2 = w' · p2
Hw: w · p1 · f = w · p2 · g
Hw': w' · p1 · f = w' · p2 · g
Pb:= make_Pullback f g d p1 p2 H P: Pullback f g
Xw:= PullbackArrow Pb e (w · p1) (w · p2) Hw: C ⟦ e, Pb ⟧
w' · PullbackPr1 Pb = w · p1
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
P: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
e: C
w, w': C ⟦ e, d ⟧
H1: w · p1 = w' · p1
H2: w · p2 = w' · p2
Hw: w · p1 · f = w · p2 · g
Hw': w' · p1 · f = w' · p2 · g
Pb:= make_Pullback f g d p1 p2 H P: Pullback f g
Xw:= PullbackArrow Pb e (w · p1) (w · p2) Hw: C ⟦ e, Pb ⟧
w' · PullbackPr2 Pb = w · p2
 
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
P: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
e: C
w, w': C ⟦ e, d ⟧
H1: w · p1 = w' · p1
H2: w · p2 = w' · p2
Hw: w · p1 · f = w · p2 · g
Hw': w' · p1 · f = w' · p2 · g
Pb:= make_Pullback f g d p1 p2 H P: Pullback f g
Xw:= PullbackArrow Pb e (w · p1) (w · p2) Hw: C ⟦ e, Pb ⟧
w · p1 = w' · PullbackPr1 Pb
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
P: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
e: C
w, w': C ⟦ e, d ⟧
H1: w · p1 = w' · p1
H2: w · p2 = w' · p2
Hw: w · p1 · f = w · p2 · g
Hw': w' · p1 · f = w' · p2 · g
Pb:= make_Pullback f g d p1 p2 H P: Pullback f g
Xw:= PullbackArrow Pb e (w · p1) (w · p2) Hw: C ⟦ e, Pb ⟧
w' · PullbackPr2 Pb = w · p2
 
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
P: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
e: C
w, w': C ⟦ e, d ⟧
H1: w · p1 = w' · p1
H2: w · p2 = w' · p2
Hw: w · p1 · f = w · p2 · g
Hw': w' · p1 · f = w' · p2 · g
Pb:= make_Pullback f g d p1 p2 H P: Pullback f g
Xw:= PullbackArrow Pb e (w · p1) (w · p2) Hw: C ⟦ e, Pb ⟧
w' · PullbackPr2 Pb = w · p2

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
P: isPullback f g p1 p2 H
e: C
w, w': C ⟦ e, d ⟧
H1: w · p1 = w' · p1
H2: w · p2 = w' · p2
Hw: w · p1 · f = w · p2 · g
Hw': w' · p1 · f = w' · p2 · g
Pb:= make_Pullback f g d p1 p2 H P: Pullback f g
Xw:= PullbackArrow Pb e (w · p1) (w · p2) Hw: C ⟦ e, Pb ⟧
w · p2 = w' · PullbackPr2 Pb
 apply H2.
Qed.



C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb: Pullback f g
∑ hk : C ⟦ Pb, Pb ⟧,
hk · PullbackPr1 Pb = PullbackPr1 Pb
× hk · PullbackPr2 Pb = PullbackPr2 Pb


C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb: Pullback f g
∑ hk : C ⟦ Pb, Pb ⟧,
hk · PullbackPr1 Pb = PullbackPr1 Pb
× hk · PullbackPr2 Pb = PullbackPr2 Pb

  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb: Pullback f g
identity Pb · PullbackPr1 Pb = PullbackPr1 Pb
× identity Pb · PullbackPr2 Pb = PullbackPr2 Pb

  apply make_dirprod; apply id_left.
Defined.


C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb: Pullback f g
k: C ⟦ Pb, Pb ⟧
kH1: k · PullbackPr1 Pb = PullbackPr1 Pb
kH2: k · PullbackPr2 Pb = PullbackPr2 Pb
identity Pb = k


C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb: Pullback f g
k: C ⟦ Pb, Pb ⟧
kH1: k · PullbackPr1 Pb = PullbackPr1 Pb
kH2: k · PullbackPr2 Pb = PullbackPr2 Pb
identity Pb = k

  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb: Pullback f g
k: C ⟦ Pb, Pb ⟧
kH1: k · PullbackPr1 Pb = PullbackPr1 Pb
kH2: k · PullbackPr2 Pb = PullbackPr2 Pb
H1:= k,, make_dirprod kH1 kH2: ∑ hk : C ⟦ Pb, Pb ⟧,
hk · PullbackPr1 Pb = PullbackPr1 Pb
× hk · PullbackPr2 Pb = PullbackPr2 Pb
identity Pb = k

  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb: Pullback f g
k: C ⟦ Pb, Pb ⟧
kH1: k · PullbackPr1 Pb = PullbackPr1 Pb
kH2: k · PullbackPr2 Pb = PullbackPr2 Pb
H1:= k,, make_dirprod kH1 kH2: ∑ hk : C ⟦ Pb, Pb ⟧,
hk · PullbackPr1 Pb = PullbackPr1 Pb
× hk · PullbackPr2 Pb = PullbackPr2 Pb
identity_is_Pullback_input Pb = H1
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb: Pullback f g
k: C ⟦ Pb, Pb ⟧
kH1: k · PullbackPr1 Pb = PullbackPr1 Pb
kH2: k · PullbackPr2 Pb = PullbackPr2 Pb
H1:= k,, make_dirprod kH1 kH2: ∑ hk : C ⟦ Pb, Pb ⟧,
hk · PullbackPr1 Pb = PullbackPr1 Pb
× hk · PullbackPr2 Pb = PullbackPr2 Pb
H2: identity_is_Pullback_input Pb = H1
identity Pb = k

  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb: Pullback f g
k: C ⟦ Pb, Pb ⟧
kH1: k · PullbackPr1 Pb = PullbackPr1 Pb
kH2: k · PullbackPr2 Pb = PullbackPr2 Pb
H1:= k,, make_dirprod kH1 kH2: ∑ hk : C ⟦ Pb, Pb ⟧,
hk · PullbackPr1 Pb = PullbackPr1 Pb
× hk · PullbackPr2 Pb = PullbackPr2 Pb
identity_is_Pullback_input Pb = H1
 
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb: Pullback f g
k: C ⟦ Pb, Pb ⟧
kH1: k · PullbackPr1 Pb = PullbackPr1 Pb
kH2: k · PullbackPr2 Pb = PullbackPr2 Pb
H1:= k,, make_dirprod kH1 kH2: ∑ hk : C ⟦ Pb, Pb ⟧,
hk · PullbackPr1 Pb = PullbackPr1 Pb
× hk · PullbackPr2 Pb = PullbackPr2 Pb
∃! hk : C ⟦ Pb, Pb ⟧,
hk · PullbackPr1 Pb = PullbackPr1 Pb
× hk · PullbackPr2 Pb = PullbackPr2 Pb

    
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb: Pullback f g
k: C ⟦ Pb, Pb ⟧
kH1: k · PullbackPr1 Pb = PullbackPr1 Pb
kH2: k · PullbackPr2 Pb = PullbackPr2 Pb
H1:= k,, make_dirprod kH1 kH2: ∑ hk : C ⟦ Pb, Pb ⟧,
hk · PullbackPr1 Pb = PullbackPr1 Pb
× hk · PullbackPr2 Pb = PullbackPr2 Pb
PullbackPr1 Pb · f = PullbackPr2 Pb · g

    apply PullbackSqrCommutes.
  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb: Pullback f g
k: C ⟦ Pb, Pb ⟧
kH1: k · PullbackPr1 Pb = PullbackPr1 Pb
kH2: k · PullbackPr2 Pb = PullbackPr2 Pb
H1:= k,, make_dirprod kH1 kH2: ∑ hk : C ⟦ Pb, Pb ⟧,
hk · PullbackPr1 Pb = PullbackPr1 Pb
× hk · PullbackPr2 Pb = PullbackPr2 Pb
H2: identity_is_Pullback_input Pb = H1
identity Pb = k
 apply (base_paths _ _ H2).
Qed.



C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb, Pb': Pullback f g
C ⟦ Pb, Pb' ⟧


C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb, Pb': Pullback f g
C ⟦ Pb, Pb' ⟧

  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb, Pb': Pullback f g
PullbackPr1 Pb · f = PullbackPr2 Pb · g

  exact (PullbackSqrCommutes _ ).
Defined.



C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb, Pb': Pullback f g
is_inverse_in_precat
  (from_Pullback_to_Pullback Pb Pb')
  (from_Pullback_to_Pullback Pb' Pb)


C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb, Pb': Pullback f g
is_inverse_in_precat
  (from_Pullback_to_Pullback Pb Pb')
  (from_Pullback_to_Pullback Pb' Pb)

  split; apply pathsinv0;
  apply PullbackEndo_is_identity;
  rewrite <- assoc;
  unfold from_Pullback_to_Pullback;
  repeat rewrite PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1;
  repeat rewrite PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2;
  auto.
Qed.



C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb, Pb': Pullback f g
is_z_isomorphism (from_Pullback_to_Pullback Pb Pb')


C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb, Pb': Pullback f g
is_z_isomorphism (from_Pullback_to_Pullback Pb Pb')

  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb, Pb': Pullback f g
is_inverse_in_precat
  (from_Pullback_to_Pullback Pb Pb')
  (from_Pullback_to_Pullback Pb' Pb)

  apply are_inverses_from_Pullback_to_Pullback.
Defined.


Definition z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback {a b c : C}{f : b --> a} {g : c --> a}
   (Pb Pb': Pullback f g) : z_iso Pb Pb' :=
  _ ,, isziso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback Pb Pb'.


C: category
A, B, D: C
f: C ⟦ A, D ⟧
g: C ⟦ B, D ⟧
pb, pb': Pullback f g
∑ t : z_iso pb pb',
t · PullbackPr1 pb' = PullbackPr1 pb
× t · PullbackPr2 pb' = PullbackPr2 pb


C: category
A, B, D: C
f: C ⟦ A, D ⟧
g: C ⟦ B, D ⟧
pb, pb': Pullback f g
∑ t : z_iso pb pb',
t · PullbackPr1 pb' = PullbackPr1 pb
× t · PullbackPr2 pb' = PullbackPr2 pb

  
C: category
A, B, D: C
f: C ⟦ A, D ⟧
g: C ⟦ B, D ⟧
pb, pb': Pullback f g
z_iso pb pb'
C: category
A, B, D: C
f: C ⟦ A, D ⟧
g: C ⟦ B, D ⟧
pb, pb': Pullback f g
(λ t : z_iso pb pb',
 t · PullbackPr1 pb' = PullbackPr1 pb
 × t · PullbackPr2 pb' = PullbackPr2 pb) ?pr1

  
C: category
A, B, D: C
f: C ⟦ A, D ⟧
g: C ⟦ B, D ⟧
pb, pb': Pullback f g
z_iso pb pb'
 use z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback.
  
C: category
A, B, D: C
f: C ⟦ A, D ⟧
g: C ⟦ B, D ⟧
pb, pb': Pullback f g
(λ t : z_iso pb pb',
 t · PullbackPr1 pb' = PullbackPr1 pb
 × t · PullbackPr2 pb' = PullbackPr2 pb)
  (z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback pb pb')
 
C: category
A, B, D: C
f: C ⟦ A, D ⟧
g: C ⟦ B, D ⟧
pb, pb': Pullback f g
z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback pb pb'
· PullbackPr1 pb' = PullbackPr1 pb
C: category
A, B, D: C
f: C ⟦ A, D ⟧
g: C ⟦ B, D ⟧
pb, pb': Pullback f g
z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback pb pb'
· PullbackPr2 pb' = PullbackPr2 pb

    
C: category
A, B, D: C
f: C ⟦ A, D ⟧
g: C ⟦ B, D ⟧
pb, pb': Pullback f g
z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback pb pb'
· PullbackPr1 pb' = PullbackPr1 pb
 use PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1.
    
C: category
A, B, D: C
f: C ⟦ A, D ⟧
g: C ⟦ B, D ⟧
pb, pb': Pullback f g
z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback pb pb'
· PullbackPr2 pb' = PullbackPr2 pb
 use PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2.
Defined.

(** pullback lemma *)

Section pullback_lemma.

Context (a b c d e x : C)
  (f : b --> a) (g : c --> a) (h : e --> b) (k : e --> c)
  (i : d --> b) (j : x --> e) (m : x --> d)
  (H1 : h · f = k · g) (H2 : m · i = j · h)
  (P1 : isPullback _ _ _ _ H1) (P2 : isPullback _ _ _ _ H2).


C: category
a, b, c, d, e, x: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
j: C ⟦ x, e ⟧
m: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
H1: h · f = k · g
H2: m · i = j · h
P1: isPullback f g h k H1
P2: isPullback i h m j H2
m · (i · f) = j · k · g


C: category
a, b, c, d, e, x: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
j: C ⟦ x, e ⟧
m: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
H1: h · f = k · g
H2: m · i = j · h
P1: isPullback f g h k H1
P2: isPullback i h m j H2
m · (i · f) = j · k · g

  
C: category
a, b, c, d, e, x: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
j: C ⟦ x, e ⟧
m: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
H1: h · f = k · g
H2: m · i = j · h
P1: isPullback f g h k H1
P2: isPullback i h m j H2
m · i · f = j · k · g

  
C: category
a, b, c, d, e, x: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
j: C ⟦ x, e ⟧
m: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
H1: h · f = k · g
H2: m · i = j · h
P1: isPullback f g h k H1
P2: isPullback i h m j H2
j · h · f = j · k · g

  
C: category
a, b, c, d, e, x: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
j: C ⟦ x, e ⟧
m: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
H1: h · f = k · g
H2: m · i = j · h
P1: isPullback f g h k H1
P2: isPullback i h m j H2
j · (h · f) = j · (k · g)

H1: h · f = k · g
H2: m · i = j · h
P1: isPullback f g h k H1
P2: isPullback i h m j H2
j · (k · g) = j · (k · g)

  apply idpath.
Qed.

H1: h · f = k · g
H2: m · i = j · h

P2: isPullback i h m j H2
∏ (e0 : C) (h : C ⟦ e0, d ⟧) (k0 : C ⟦ e0, c ⟧),
h · (i · f) = k0 · g
→ ∃! hk : C ⟦ e0, x ⟧, hk · m = h × hk · (j · k) = k0

q: C ⟦ y, c ⟧
p · (i · f) = q · g
→ ∃! hk : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, hk · m = p × hk · (j · k) = q

C: category
a, b, c, d, e, x: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
j: C ⟦ x, e ⟧
m: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
H1: h · f = k · g
H2: m · i = j · h
P1: isPullback f g h k H1
P2: isPullback i h m j H2
y: C
p: C ⟦ y, d ⟧
q: C ⟦ y, c ⟧
Hrt: p · (i · f) = q · g
ex: p · i · f = q · g
∃! hk : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, hk · m = p × hk · (j · k) = q

  
C: category
a, b, c, d, e, x: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
j: C ⟦ x, e ⟧
m: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
H1: h · f = k · g
H2: m · i = j · h
P1: isPullback f g h k H1
P2: isPullback i h m j H2
y: C
p: C ⟦ y, d ⟧
q: C ⟦ y, c ⟧
Hrt: p · (i · f) = q · g
ex: p · i · f = q · g
rt:= P1 y (p · i) q ex: ∃! hk : C ⟦ y, e ⟧, hk · h = p · i × hk · k = q
∃! hk : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, hk · m = p × hk · (j · k) = q

  
C: category
a, b, c, d, e, x: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
j: C ⟦ x, e ⟧
m: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
H1: h · f = k · g
H2: m · i = j · h
P1: isPullback f g h k H1
P2: isPullback i h m j H2
y: C
p: C ⟦ y, d ⟧
q: C ⟦ y, c ⟧
Hrt: p · (i · f) = q · g
ex: p · i · f = q · g
rt:= P1 y (p · i) q ex: ∃! hk : C ⟦ y, e ⟧, hk · h = p · i × hk · k = q
Ppiq:= pr11 rt: C ⟦ y, e ⟧
∃! hk : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, hk · m = p × hk · (j · k) = q

ex: p · i · f = q · g
rt:= P1 y (p · i) q ex: ∃! hk : C ⟦ y, e ⟧, hk · h = p · i × hk · k = q

C: category
a, b, c, d, e, x: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧

k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
j: C ⟦ x, e ⟧
m: C ⟦ x, d ⟧

q: C ⟦ y, c ⟧

ex: p · i · f = q · g
rt:= P1 y (p · i) q ex: ∃! hk : C ⟦ y, e ⟧, hk · h = p · i × hk · k = q
Ppiq:= pr11 rt: C ⟦ y, e ⟧
Ppiq · h = p · i
 apply (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 rt))).

p: C ⟦ y, d ⟧

ex: p · i · f = q · g
rt:= P1 y (p · i) q ex: ∃! hk : C ⟦ y, e ⟧, hk · h = p · i × hk · k = q

C: category
a, b, c, d, e, x: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
j: C ⟦ x, e ⟧
m: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
H1: h · f = k · g
H2: m · i = j · h
P1: isPullback f g h k H1
P2: isPullback i h m j H2
y: C
p: C ⟦ y, d ⟧
q: C ⟦ y, c ⟧
Hrt: p · (i · f) = q · g
ex: p · i · f = q · g
rt:= P1 y (p · i) q ex: ∃! hk : C ⟦ y, e ⟧, hk · h = p · i × hk · k = q
Ppiq:= pr11 rt: C ⟦ y, e ⟧
owiej: p · i = Ppiq · h
rt':= P2 y p Ppiq owiej: ∃! hk : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, hk · m = p × hk · j = Ppiq
∃! hk : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, hk · m = p × hk · (j · k) = q

rt:= P1 y (p · i) q ex: ∃! hk : C ⟦ y, e ⟧, hk · h = p · i × hk · k = q

 exact (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 rt'))).

y: C
p: C ⟦ y, d ⟧
q: C ⟦ y, c ⟧
Hrt: p · (i · f) = q · g
ex: p · i · f = q · g
rt:= P1 y (p · i) q ex: ∃! hk : C ⟦ y, e ⟧, hk · h = p · i × hk · k = q
Ppiq:= pr11 rt: C ⟦ y, e ⟧
owiej: p · i = Ppiq · h
rt':= P2 y p Ppiq owiej: ∃! hk : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, hk · m = p × hk · j = Ppiq
awe:= pr11 rt': C ⟦ y, x ⟧
Hawe1: awe · m = p
Hawe2: awe · (j · k) = q
∃! hk : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, hk · m = p × hk · (j · k) = q

   
C: category
a, b, c, d, e, x: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
j: C ⟦ x, e ⟧
m: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
H1: h · f = k · g
H2: m · i = j · h
P1: isPullback f g h k H1
P2: isPullback i h m j H2
y: C
p: C ⟦ y, d ⟧
q: C ⟦ y, c ⟧
Hrt: p · (i · f) = q · g
ex: p · i · f = q · g
rt:= P1 y (p · i) q ex: ∃! hk : C ⟦ y, e ⟧, hk · h = p · i × hk · k = q
Ppiq:= pr11 rt: C ⟦ y, e ⟧
owiej: p · i = Ppiq · h
rt':= P2 y p Ppiq owiej: ∃! hk : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, hk · m = p × hk · j = Ppiq
awe:= pr11 rt': C ⟦ y, x ⟧
Hawe1: awe · m = p
awe · (j · k) = q

a, b, c, d, e, x: C

k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
j: C ⟦ x, e ⟧
m: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
H1: h · f = k · g
H2: m · i = j · h
P1: isPullback f g h k H1
P2: isPullback i h m j H2

p: C ⟦ y, d ⟧
q: C ⟦ y, c ⟧
Hrt: p · (i · f) = q · g
ex: p · i · f = q · g
rt:= P1 y (p · i) q ex: ∃! hk : C ⟦ y, e ⟧, hk · h = p · i × hk · k = q
Ppiq:= pr11 rt: C ⟦ y, e ⟧

rt':= P2 y p Ppiq owiej: ∃! hk : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, hk · m = p × hk · j = Ppiq

Hawe1: awe · m = p
awe · j · k = q

     
C: category
a, b, c, d, e, x: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
j: C ⟦ x, e ⟧
m: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
H1: h · f = k · g
H2: m · i = j · h
P1: isPullback f g h k H1
P2: isPullback i h m j H2
y: C
p: C ⟦ y, d ⟧
q: C ⟦ y, c ⟧
Hrt: p · (i · f) = q · g
ex: p · i · f = q · g
rt:= P1 y (p · i) q ex: ∃! hk : C ⟦ y, e ⟧, hk · h = p · i × hk · k = q
Ppiq:= pr11 rt: C ⟦ y, e ⟧
owiej: p · i = Ppiq · h
rt':= P2 y p Ppiq owiej: ∃! hk : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, hk · m = p × hk · j = Ppiq
awe:= pr11 rt': C ⟦ y, x ⟧
Hawe1: awe · m = p
X:= pr221 rt': (λ _ : pr11 rt' · m = p, pr11 rt' · j = Ppiq)
  (pr121 rt')
awe · j · k = q

C: category
a, b, c, d, e, x: C

a, b, c, d, e, x: C

H2: m · i = j · h
P1: isPullback f g h k H1
P2: isPullback i h m j H2

p: C ⟦ y, d ⟧
q: C ⟦ y, c ⟧
Hrt: p · (i · f) = q · g
ex: p · i · f = q · g
rt:= P1 y (p · i) q ex: ∃! hk : C ⟦ y, e ⟧, hk · h = p · i × hk · k = q
Ppiq:= pr11 rt: C ⟦ y, e ⟧

rt':= P2 y p Ppiq owiej: ∃! hk : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, hk · m = p × hk · j = Ppiq

Hawe1: awe · m = p
X:= pr221 rt': pr11 rt' · j = Ppiq
Ppiq · k = q

           exact (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 rt))).
   
C: category
a, b, c, d, e, x: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
j: C ⟦ x, e ⟧
m: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
H1: h · f = k · g
H2: m · i = j · h
P1: isPullback f g h k H1
P2: isPullback i h m j H2

p: C ⟦ y, d ⟧
q: C ⟦ y, c ⟧
Hrt: p · (i · f) = q · g
ex: p · i · f = q · g
rt:= P1 y (p · i) q ex: ∃! hk : C ⟦ y, e ⟧, hk · h = p · i × hk · k = q
Ppiq:= pr11 rt: C ⟦ y, e ⟧
owiej: p · i = Ppiq · h
rt':= P2 y p Ppiq owiej: ∃! hk : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, hk · m = p × hk · j = Ppiq
awe:= pr11 rt': C ⟦ y, x ⟧

Hawe2: awe · (j · k) = q
∃! hk : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, hk · m = p × hk · (j · k) = q

  
C: category
a, b, c, d, e, x: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
j: C ⟦ x, e ⟧
m: C ⟦ x, d ⟧
H1: h · f = k · g
H2: m · i = j · h
P1: isPullback f g h k H1
P2: isPullback i h m j H2
y: C
p: C ⟦ y, d ⟧
q: C ⟦ y, c ⟧
Hrt: p · (i · f) = q · g
ex: p · i · f = q · g
rt:= P1 y (p · i) q ex: ∃! hk : C ⟦ y, e ⟧, hk · h = p · i × hk · k = q
Ppiq:= pr11 rt: C ⟦ y, e ⟧
owiej: p · i = Ppiq · h
rt':= P2 y p Ppiq owiej: ∃! hk : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, hk · m = p × hk · j = Ppiq
awe:= pr11 rt': C ⟦ y, x ⟧
Hawe1: awe · m = p
Hawe2: awe · (j · k) = q
∏
t : ∑ hk : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, hk · m = p × hk · (j · k) = q,
t = awe,, make_dirprod Hawe1 Hawe2

  abstract ( intro t;
  apply subtypePath;
    [ intro a0; apply isapropdirprod; apply C
    | destruct t as [t [Ht1 Ht2]];
      apply PullbackArrowUnique;
      [ assumption
      | apply PullbackArrowUnique;
        [ rewrite <- Ht1;
          repeat rewrite <- assoc;
          rewrite H2;
          apply idpath
        | rewrite <- assoc;
          assumption ]
      ]
    ]).
Defined.

End pullback_lemma.


C: category
a, b, c, e: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
pbr: Pullback f g
pbl: Pullback h (PullbackPr1 pbr)
Pullback (h · f) g


C: category
a, b, c, e: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
pbr: Pullback f g
pbl: Pullback h (PullbackPr1 pbr)
Pullback (h · f) g

f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
pbr: Pullback f g
pbl: Pullback h (PullbackPr1 pbr)
C

g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧

C ⟦ ?d, e ⟧

f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧

pbl: Pullback h (PullbackPr1 pbr)
?p1 · (h · f) = ?p2 · g
C: category
a, b, c, e: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧

pbl: Pullback h (PullbackPr1 pbr)
isPullback (h · f) g ?p1 ?p2 ?H

  
C: category
a, b, c, e: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
pbr: Pullback f g
pbl: Pullback h (PullbackPr1 pbr)
C
 exact pbl.
  
C: category
a, b, c, e: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
pbr: Pullback f g
pbl: Pullback h (PullbackPr1 pbr)
C ⟦ pbl, e ⟧
 exact (PullbackPr1 pbl).
  
C: category
a, b, c, e: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
pbr: Pullback f g
pbl: Pullback h (PullbackPr1 pbr)
C ⟦ pbl, c ⟧
 exact ((PullbackPr2 pbl) · (PullbackPr2 pbr)).
  
C: category
a, b, c, e: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
pbr: Pullback f g
pbl: Pullback h (PullbackPr1 pbr)
PullbackPr1 pbl · (h · f) =
PullbackPr2 pbl · PullbackPr2 pbr · g
 abstract (use glueSquares;
    [ exact (PullbackPr1 pbr) | use (PullbackSqrCommutes pbr) | use PullbackSqrCommutes ]).
  
C: category
a, b, c, e: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
pbr: Pullback f g
pbl: Pullback h (PullbackPr1 pbr)
isPullback (h · f) g (PullbackPr1 pbl)
  (PullbackPr2 pbl · PullbackPr2 pbr)
  (pullback_glue_pullback_subproof a b c e f g h pbr
     pbl)
 use (isPullbackGluedSquare _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
      (isPullback_Pullback pbr)
      (isPullback_Pullback pbl)).
Defined.

End def_pb.

Arguments isPullback [_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _] _.

Section Universal_Unique.

  Context (C : category) (H : is_univalent C).


C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb, Pb': Pullback f g
inv_from_z_iso
  (z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback Pb Pb') =
from_Pullback_to_Pullback Pb' Pb


C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb, Pb': Pullback f g
inv_from_z_iso
  (z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback Pb Pb') =
from_Pullback_to_Pullback Pb' Pb

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C: category
H: is_univalent C
isaprop (Pullbacks C)


C: category
H: is_univalent C
isaprop (Pullbacks C)

  
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
isProofIrrelevant (Pullback f g)

  
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb, Pb': Pullback f g
Pb = Pb'

  
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb, Pb': Pullback f g
isPredicate
  (λ x : ∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, b ⟧ × C ⟦ p, c ⟧,
   ∑ H : pr12 x · f = pr22 x · g, isPullback H)
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb, Pb': Pullback f g
pr1 Pb = pr1 Pb'

  
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb, Pb': Pullback f g
isPredicate
  (λ x : ∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, b ⟧ × C ⟦ p, c ⟧,
   ∑ H : pr12 x · f = pr22 x · g, isPullback H)
 
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb, Pb': Pullback f g
x: ∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, b ⟧ × C ⟦ p, c ⟧
isofhlevel 1 (pr12 x · f = pr22 x · g)
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb, Pb': Pullback f g
x: ∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, b ⟧ × C ⟦ p, c ⟧
∏ x0 : pr12 x · f = pr22 x · g,
isofhlevel 1 (isPullback x0)

    
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb, Pb': Pullback f g
x: ∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, b ⟧ × C ⟦ p, c ⟧
isofhlevel 1 (pr12 x · f = pr22 x · g)
 apply C.
    
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb, Pb': Pullback f g
x: ∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, b ⟧ × C ⟦ p, c ⟧
∏ x0 : pr12 x · f = pr22 x · g,
isofhlevel 1 (isPullback x0)
 intros; apply isaprop_isPullback.
  
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb, Pb': Pullback f g
pr1 Pb = pr1 Pb'
 
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb, Pb': Pullback f g
transportf (λ p : C, C ⟦ p, b ⟧ × C ⟦ p, c ⟧)
  (isotoid C H
     (z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback Pb Pb'))
  (pr21 Pb) = pr21 Pb'

    
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb, Pb': Pullback f g
make_dirprod
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback Pb Pb')
   · pr121 Pb)
  (transportf (λ a : C, C ⟦ a, c ⟧)
     (isotoid C H
        (z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback Pb Pb'))
     (pr221 Pb)) = pr21 Pb'

    
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb, Pb': Pullback f g
make_dirprod
  (from_Pullback_to_Pullback Pb' Pb · pr121 Pb)
  (transportf (λ a : C, C ⟦ a, c ⟧)
     (isotoid C H
        (z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback Pb Pb'))
     (pr221 Pb)) = pr21 Pb'

    
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb, Pb': Pullback f g
make_dirprod
  (from_Pullback_to_Pullback Pb' Pb · pr121 Pb)
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback Pb Pb')
   · pr221 Pb) = pr21 Pb'

    
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Pb, Pb': Pullback f g
make_dirprod
  (from_Pullback_to_Pullback Pb' Pb · pr121 Pb)
  (from_Pullback_to_Pullback Pb' Pb · pr221 Pb) =
pr21 Pb'

    
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
Cone: ∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, b ⟧ × C ⟦ p, c ⟧
bla: ∑ H : pr12 Cone · f = pr22 Cone · g,
isPullback H
Cone': ∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, b ⟧ × C ⟦ p, c ⟧
bla': ∑ H : pr12 Cone' · f = pr22 Cone' · g,
isPullback H
make_dirprod
  (from_Pullback_to_Pullback (Cone',, bla')
     (Cone,, bla) · pr12 Cone)
  (from_Pullback_to_Pullback (Cone',, bla')
     (Cone,, bla) · pr22 Cone) = pr2 Cone'

    
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p: C
h: C ⟦ p, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ p, c ⟧
bla: ∑ H : h · f = k · g, isPullback H
p': C
h': C ⟦ p', b ⟧
k': C ⟦ p', c ⟧
bla': ∑ H : h' · f = k' · g, isPullback H
make_dirprod
  (from_Pullback_to_Pullback ((p',, h',, k'),, bla')
     ((p,, h,, k),, bla) · h)
  (from_Pullback_to_Pullback ((p',, h',, k'),, bla')
     ((p,, h,, k),, bla) · k) = h',, k'

    
C: category
H: is_univalent C
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p: C
h: C ⟦ p, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ p, c ⟧
bla: ∑ H : h · f = k · g, isPullback H
p': C
h': C ⟦ p', b ⟧
k': C ⟦ p', c ⟧
bla': ∑ H : h' · f = k' · g, isPullback H
make_dirprod (PullbackPr1 ((p',, h',, k'),, bla'))
  (PullbackPr2 ((p',, h',, k'),, bla')) = h',, k'

    apply idpath.
Qed.

End Universal_Unique.


(** Make the C not implicit for Pullbacks *)
Arguments Pullbacks : clear implicits.

(** In this section we prove that the pullback of a monomorphism is a
  monomorphism. *)
Section monic_pb.

  Context (C : category).

  (** The pullback of a Monic is isMonic. *)
  
C: category
a, b, c: C
M: Monic C b a
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
PB: Pullback M g
isMonic (PullbackPr2 PB)

  
C: category
a, b, c: C
M: Monic C b a
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
PB: Pullback M g
isMonic (PullbackPr2 PB)

    
C: category
a, b, c: C
M: Monic C b a
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
PB: Pullback M g
∏ (x : C) (g0 h : C ⟦ x, PB ⟧),
g0 · PullbackPr2 PB = h · PullbackPr2 PB → g0 = h
 
C: category
a, b, c: C
M: Monic C b a
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
PB: Pullback M g
x: C
g0, h: C ⟦ x, PB ⟧
X: g0 · PullbackPr2 PB = h · PullbackPr2 PB
g0 = h

    
C: category
a, b, c: C
M: Monic C b a
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
PB: Pullback M g
x: C
g0, h: C ⟦ x, PB ⟧
X: g0 · PullbackPr2 PB = h · PullbackPr2 PB
g0 · PullbackPr1 PB = h · PullbackPr1 PB


    
C: category
a, b, c: C
M: Monic C b a
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
PB: Pullback M g
x: C
g0, h: C ⟦ x, PB ⟧
X: g0 · PullbackPr2 PB = h · PullbackPr2 PB
X0:= maponpaths (λ f : C ⟦ x, c ⟧, f · g) X: g0 · PullbackPr2 PB · g = h · PullbackPr2 PB · g
g0 · PullbackPr1 PB = h · PullbackPr1 PB

    
C: category
a, b, c: C
M: Monic C b a
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
PB: Pullback M g
x: C
g0, h: C ⟦ x, PB ⟧
X: g0 · PullbackPr2 PB = h · PullbackPr2 PB
X0: g0 · (PullbackPr2 PB · g) =
h · PullbackPr2 PB · g
g0 · PullbackPr1 PB = h · PullbackPr1 PB
 
C: category
a, b, c: C
M: Monic C b a
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
PB: Pullback M g
x: C
g0, h: C ⟦ x, PB ⟧
X: g0 · PullbackPr2 PB = h · PullbackPr2 PB
X0: g0 · (PullbackPr2 PB · g) =
h · (PullbackPr2 PB · g)
g0 · PullbackPr1 PB = h · PullbackPr1 PB

    
C: category
a, b, c: C
M: Monic C b a
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
PB: Pullback M g
x: C
g0, h: C ⟦ x, PB ⟧
X: g0 · PullbackPr2 PB = h · PullbackPr2 PB
X0: g0 · (PullbackPr1 PB · M) =
h · (PullbackPr1 PB · M)
g0 · PullbackPr1 PB = h · PullbackPr1 PB

    
C: category
a, b, c: C
M: Monic C b a
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
PB: Pullback M g
x: C
g0, h: C ⟦ x, PB ⟧
X: g0 · PullbackPr2 PB = h · PullbackPr2 PB
X0: g0 · PullbackPr1 PB · M =
h · (PullbackPr1 PB · M)
g0 · PullbackPr1 PB = h · PullbackPr1 PB
 
C: category
a, b, c: C
M: Monic C b a
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
PB: Pullback M g
x: C
g0, h: C ⟦ x, PB ⟧
X: g0 · PullbackPr2 PB = h · PullbackPr2 PB
X0: g0 · PullbackPr1 PB · M = h · PullbackPr1 PB · M
g0 · PullbackPr1 PB = h · PullbackPr1 PB

    
C: category
a, b, c: C
M: Monic C b a
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
PB: Pullback M g
x: C
g0, h: C ⟦ x, PB ⟧
X: g0 · PullbackPr2 PB = h · PullbackPr2 PB
X0: g0 · PullbackPr1 PB = h · PullbackPr1 PB
g0 · PullbackPr1 PB = h · PullbackPr1 PB
 apply X0.
  Qed.

  (** Same result for the other morphism. *)
  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
M: Monic C c a
PB: Pullback f M
isMonic (PullbackPr1 PB)

  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
M: Monic C c a
PB: Pullback f M
isMonic (PullbackPr1 PB)

    
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
M: Monic C c a
PB: Pullback f M
∏ (x : C) (g h : C ⟦ x, PB ⟧),
g · PullbackPr1 PB = h · PullbackPr1 PB → g = h
 
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
M: Monic C c a
PB: Pullback f M
x: C
g, h: C ⟦ x, PB ⟧
X: g · PullbackPr1 PB = h · PullbackPr1 PB
g = h

    
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
M: Monic C c a
PB: Pullback f M
x: C
g, h: C ⟦ x, PB ⟧
X: g · PullbackPr1 PB = h · PullbackPr1 PB
g · PullbackPr2 PB = h · PullbackPr2 PB


    
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
M: Monic C c a
PB: Pullback f M
x: C
g, h: C ⟦ x, PB ⟧
X: g · PullbackPr1 PB = h · PullbackPr1 PB
X0:= maponpaths (λ f' : C ⟦ x, b ⟧, f' · f) X: g · PullbackPr1 PB · f = h · PullbackPr1 PB · f
g · PullbackPr2 PB = h · PullbackPr2 PB

    
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
M: Monic C c a
PB: Pullback f M
x: C
g, h: C ⟦ x, PB ⟧
X: g · PullbackPr1 PB = h · PullbackPr1 PB
X0: g · (PullbackPr1 PB · f) = h · PullbackPr1 PB · f
g · PullbackPr2 PB = h · PullbackPr2 PB
 
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
M: Monic C c a
PB: Pullback f M
x: C
g, h: C ⟦ x, PB ⟧
X: g · PullbackPr1 PB = h · PullbackPr1 PB
X0: g · (PullbackPr1 PB · f) =
h · (PullbackPr1 PB · f)
g · PullbackPr2 PB = h · PullbackPr2 PB

    
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
M: Monic C c a
PB: Pullback f M
x: C
g, h: C ⟦ x, PB ⟧
X: g · PullbackPr1 PB = h · PullbackPr1 PB
X0: g · (PullbackPr2 PB · M) =
h · (PullbackPr2 PB · M)
g · PullbackPr2 PB = h · PullbackPr2 PB

    
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
M: Monic C c a
PB: Pullback f M
x: C
g, h: C ⟦ x, PB ⟧
X: g · PullbackPr1 PB = h · PullbackPr1 PB
X0: g · PullbackPr2 PB · M = h · (PullbackPr2 PB · M)
g · PullbackPr2 PB = h · PullbackPr2 PB
 
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
M: Monic C c a
PB: Pullback f M
x: C
g, h: C ⟦ x, PB ⟧
X: g · PullbackPr1 PB = h · PullbackPr1 PB
X0: g · PullbackPr2 PB · M = h · PullbackPr2 PB · M
g · PullbackPr2 PB = h · PullbackPr2 PB

    
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
M: Monic C c a
PB: Pullback f M
x: C
g, h: C ⟦ x, PB ⟧
X: g · PullbackPr1 PB = h · PullbackPr1 PB
X0: g · PullbackPr2 PB = h · PullbackPr2 PB
g · PullbackPr2 PB = h · PullbackPr2 PB
 apply X0.
  Qed.

End monic_pb.

Arguments glueSquares {_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ } _ _ .
Arguments isPullbackGluedSquare [_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _] _ _ [_ _ _] _.


(** * Criteria for existence of pullbacks. *)
Section pb_criteria.

  Context (C : category).

  
C: category
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
BinProd: BinProduct C X Y
Eq: Equalizer (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f)
  (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f =
EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g

  
C: category
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
BinProd: BinProduct C X Y
Eq: Equalizer (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f)
  (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f =
EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g

    
C: category
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
BinProd: BinProduct C X Y
Eq: Equalizer (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f)
  (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
EqualizerArrow Eq · (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f) =
EqualizerArrow Eq · (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
 apply EqualizerEqAr.
  Qed.

  
C: category
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
BinProd: BinProduct C X Y
Eq: Equalizer (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f)
  (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
isPullback
  (Pullback_from_Equalizer_BinProduct_eq X Y Z f g
     BinProd Eq)

  
C: category
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
BinProd: BinProduct C X Y
Eq: Equalizer (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f)
  (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
isPullback
  (Pullback_from_Equalizer_BinProduct_eq X Y Z f g
     BinProd Eq)

    
C: category
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
BinProd: BinProduct C X Y
Eq: Equalizer (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f)
  (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
∏ (e : C) (h : C ⟦ e, X ⟧) (k : C ⟦ e, Y ⟧),
h · f = k · g
→ ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, Eq ⟧,
  hk · (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr1 C BinProd) =
  h
  × hk · (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr2 C BinProd) =
    k

    
C: category
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
BinProd: BinProduct C X Y
Eq: Equalizer (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f)
  (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, X ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, Y ⟧
Hk: h · f = k · g
∃! hk : C ⟦ e, Eq ⟧,
hk · (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr1 C BinProd) = h
× hk · (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr2 C BinProd) =
  k

    
C: category
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
BinProd: BinProduct C X Y
Eq: Equalizer (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f)
  (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, X ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, Y ⟧
Hk: h · f = k · g
com1:= BinProductPr1Commutes C X Y BinProd e h k: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· BinProductPr1 C BinProd = h
∃! hk : C ⟦ e, Eq ⟧,
hk · (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr1 C BinProd) = h
× hk · (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr2 C BinProd) =
  k

    
C: category
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
BinProd: BinProduct C X Y
Eq: Equalizer (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f)
  (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, X ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, Y ⟧
Hk: h · f = k · g
com1:= BinProductPr1Commutes C X Y BinProd e h k: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· BinProductPr1 C BinProd = h
com2:= BinProductPr2Commutes C X Y BinProd e h k: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· BinProductPr2 C BinProd = k
∃! hk : C ⟦ e, Eq ⟧,
hk · (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr1 C BinProd) = h
× hk · (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr2 C BinProd) =
  k

    
C: category
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
BinProd: BinProduct C X Y
Eq: Equalizer (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f)
  (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, X ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, Y ⟧
Hk: h · f = k · g
com1: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f = 
h · f
com2:= BinProductPr2Commutes C X Y BinProd e h k: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· BinProductPr2 C BinProd = k
∃! hk : C ⟦ e, Eq ⟧,
hk · (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr1 C BinProd) = h
× hk · (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr2 C BinProd) =
  k

    
C: category
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
BinProd: BinProduct C X Y
Eq: Equalizer (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f)
  (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, X ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, Y ⟧
Hk: h · f = k · g
com1: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f = 
h · f
com2: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g = 
k · g
∃! hk : C ⟦ e, Eq ⟧,
hk · (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr1 C BinProd) = h
× hk · (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr2 C BinProd) =
  k

    
C: category
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
BinProd: BinProduct C X Y
Eq: Equalizer (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f)
  (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, X ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, Y ⟧
Hk: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f = 
k · g
com1: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f = 
h · f
com2: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g = 
k · g
∃! hk : C ⟦ e, Eq ⟧,
hk · (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr1 C BinProd) = h
× hk · (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr2 C BinProd) =
  k
 
C: category
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
BinProd: BinProduct C X Y
Eq: Equalizer (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f)
  (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, X ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, Y ⟧
Hk: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f =
BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g
com1: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f = 
h · f
com2: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g = 
k · g
∃! hk : C ⟦ e, Eq ⟧,
hk · (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr1 C BinProd) = h
× hk · (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr2 C BinProd) =
  k

    
C: category
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
BinProd: BinProduct C X Y
Eq: Equalizer (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f)
  (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, X ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, Y ⟧
Hk: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f) =
BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
com1: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f = 
h · f
com2: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g = 
k · g
∃! hk : C ⟦ e, Eq ⟧,
hk · (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr1 C BinProd) = h
× hk · (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr2 C BinProd) =
  k

    
C: category
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
BinProd: BinProduct C X Y
Eq: Equalizer (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f)
  (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, X ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, Y ⟧
Hk: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f) =
BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
com1: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f = 
h · f
com2: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g = 
k · g
EqualizerIn Eq e (BinProductArrow C BinProd h k) Hk
· (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr1 C BinProd) = h
× EqualizerIn Eq e (BinProductArrow C BinProd h k) Hk
  · (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr2 C BinProd) = k
C: category
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
BinProd: BinProduct C X Y
Eq: Equalizer (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f)
  (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, X ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, Y ⟧
Hk: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f) =
BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
com1: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f = 
h · f
com2: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g = 
k · g
∏ y : C ⟦ e, Eq ⟧,
isaprop
  (y · (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr1 C BinProd) =
   h
   × y · (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr2 C BinProd) =
     k)
C: category
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
BinProd: BinProduct C X Y
Eq: Equalizer (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f)
  (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, X ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, Y ⟧
Hk: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f) =
BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
com1: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f = 
h · f
com2: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g = 
k · g
∏ y : C ⟦ e, Eq ⟧,
y · (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr1 C BinProd) = h
× y · (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr2 C BinProd) =
  k
→ y =
  EqualizerIn Eq e (BinProductArrow C BinProd h k) Hk


    (* Commutativity *)
    
C: category
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
BinProd: BinProduct C X Y
Eq: Equalizer (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f)
  (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, X ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, Y ⟧
Hk: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f) =
BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
com1: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f = 
h · f
com2: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g = 
k · g
EqualizerIn Eq e (BinProductArrow C BinProd h k) Hk
· (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr1 C BinProd) = h
C: category
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
BinProd: BinProduct C X Y
Eq: Equalizer (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f)
  (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, X ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, Y ⟧
Hk: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f) =
BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
com1: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f = 
h · f
com2: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g = 
k · g
EqualizerIn Eq e (BinProductArrow C BinProd h k) Hk
· (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr2 C BinProd) = k
C: category
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
BinProd: BinProduct C X Y
Eq: Equalizer (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f)
  (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, X ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, Y ⟧
Hk: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f) =
BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
com1: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f = 
h · f
com2: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g = 
k · g
∏ y : C ⟦ e, Eq ⟧,
isaprop
  (y · (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr1 C BinProd) =
   h
   × y · (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr2 C BinProd) =
     k)
C: category
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
BinProd: BinProduct C X Y
Eq: Equalizer (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f)
  (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, X ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, Y ⟧
Hk: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f) =
BinProductArrow C BinProd h k

    (* Uniqueness *)
    
C: category
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
BinProd: BinProduct C X Y

· BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f = 
h · f
com2: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g = 
k · g
y: C ⟦ e, Eq ⟧
H: y · (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr1 C BinProd) =
h
× y
  · (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr2 C BinProd) =
  k
y =
EqualizerIn Eq e (BinProductArrow C BinProd h k) Hk

h
p: y · (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr2 C BinProd) =
k

· EqualizerArrow Eq

g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
BinProd: BinProduct C X Y
Eq: Equalizer (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f)
  (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, X ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, Y ⟧
Hk: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f) =
BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)

· BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f = 
h · f
com2: BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g = 
k · g
y: C ⟦ e, Eq ⟧
t: y · (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr1 C BinProd) =
h
p: y · (EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr2 C BinProd) =
k
y · EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr1 C BinProd =
EqualizerIn Eq e (BinProductArrow C BinProd h k) Hk
· EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr1 C BinProd

BinProductArrow C BinProd h k
· BinProductPr2 C BinProd = k

    exact (BinProductPr2Commutes C _ _ BinProd _ h k).
  Qed. (* why opaque? *)

X, Y, Z: C

g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧

Eq: Equalizer (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f)
  (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
Pullback f g

X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧

  (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)

X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
BinProd: BinProduct C X Y
Eq: Equalizer (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f)
  (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f =
EqualizerArrow Eq · BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g
C: category
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
BinProd: BinProduct C X Y
Eq: Equalizer (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f)
  (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
isPullback ?H

    
C: category
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
BinProd: BinProduct C X Y
Eq: Equalizer (BinProductPr1 C BinProd · f)
  (BinProductPr2 C BinProd · g)
isPullback
  (Pullback_from_Equalizer_BinProduct_eq X Y Z f g
     BinProd Eq)

    apply Pullback_from_Equalizer_BinProduct_isPullback.
  Defined.

  
C: category
BinProds: BinProducts C
Eqs: Equalizers C
Pullbacks C

BinProds: BinProducts C
Eqs: Equalizers C
Pullbacks C

    
C: category
BinProds: BinProducts C
Eqs: Equalizers C
Z, X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Pullback f g

BinProds: BinProducts C
Eqs: Equalizers C
Z, X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
BinProduct C X Y
C: category
BinProds: BinProducts C
Eqs: Equalizers C
Z, X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Equalizer (BinProductPr1 C ?BinProd · f)
  (BinProductPr2 C ?BinProd · g)

    
C: category
BinProds: BinProducts C
Eqs: Equalizers C
Z, X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
Equalizer (BinProductPr1 C (BinProds X Y) · f)
  (BinProductPr2 C (BinProds X Y) · g)

    apply Eqs.
  Defined.

End pb_criteria.

Section lemmas_on_pullbacks.


(** setup for this section
<<
                k
          d --------> c
          |           |
       h  |     H     | g
          v           v
          b --------> a
               f
>>
*)

Context {C : category}
  {a b c d : C}
  {f : C ⟦b, a⟧} {g : C ⟦c, a⟧} {h : C⟦d, b⟧} {k : C⟦d,c⟧}
  (H : h · f = k · g).

(** Pullback is symmetric, i.e., we can rotate a pb square *)


C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPullback H → isPullback (! H)


C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPullback H → isPullback (! H)

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
isPullback (! H)

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
∏ (e : C) (h0 : C ⟦ e, c ⟧) (k0 : C ⟦ e, b ⟧),
h0 · g = k0 · f
→ ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · k = h0 × hk · h = k0

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
Hxy: x · g = y · f
∃! hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · k = x × hk · h = y

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
Hxy: x · g = y · f
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
∃! hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · k = x × hk · h = y

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
Hxy: x · g = y · f
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · k = x × hk · h = y
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
Hxy: x · g = y · f
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
(λ cntr : ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · k = x × hk · h = y,
 ∏ t : ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · k = x × hk · h = y,
 t = cntr) ?pr1

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
Hxy: x · g = y · f
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · k = x × hk · h = y
 
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
Hxy: x · g = y · f
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
C ⟦ e, d ⟧
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
Hxy: x · g = y · f
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
(λ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · k = x × hk · h = y) ?pr1

    
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
Hxy: x · g = y · f
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
C ⟦ e, d ⟧
 
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
Hxy: x · g = y · f
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
C ⟦ e, b ⟧
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
Hxy: x · g = y · f
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
C ⟦ e, c ⟧
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
Hxy: x · g = y · f
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
?h · f = ?k · g

      
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
Hxy: x · g = y · f
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
C ⟦ e, b ⟧
 assumption.
      
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
Hxy: x · g = y · f
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
C ⟦ e, c ⟧
 assumption.
      
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
Hxy: x · g = y · f
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
y · f = x · g
 abstract (apply (!Hxy)).
    
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
Hxy: x · g = y · f
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
(λ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · k = x × hk · h = y)
  (PullbackArrow Pb e y x
     (is_symmetric_isPullback_subproof e x y Hxy))
 abstract (split;
                [apply (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb) |
                  apply (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb)]).
  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
Hxy: x · g = y · f
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
(λ cntr : ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · k = x × hk · h = y,
 ∏ t : ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · k = x × hk · h = y,
 t = cntr)
  (PullbackArrow Pb e y x
     (is_symmetric_isPullback_subproof e x y Hxy),,
   is_symmetric_isPullback_subproof0 isPb e x y Hxy)
 abstract (intro t; apply subtypePath;
              [intro; apply isapropdirprod; apply C
              | destruct t as [t Ht];
                cbn; apply PullbackArrowUnique;
                [apply (pr2 Ht) | apply (pr1 Ht)]]).
Defined.

(** Pulling back a section *)


C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
s: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
K: s · g = identity a
∑ s' : C ⟦ b, d ⟧, s' · h = identity b


C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
s: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
K: s · g = identity a
∑ s' : C ⟦ b, d ⟧, s' · h = identity b

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
s: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
K: s · g = identity a
C ⟦ b, d ⟧
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
s: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
K: s · g = identity a
(λ s' : C ⟦ b, d ⟧, s' · h = identity b) ?pr1

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
s: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
K: s · g = identity a
C ⟦ b, d ⟧
 
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
s: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
K: s · g = identity a
identity b · f = f · s · g

    abstract (rewrite id_left, <- assoc, K, id_right; apply idpath).
  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
s: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
K: s · g = identity a
(λ s' : C ⟦ b, d ⟧, s' · h = identity b)
  (PullbackArrow (make_Pullback H isPb) b (identity b)
     (f · s) (pb_of_section_subproof s K))
 abstract (cbn; apply (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback H isPb))).
Defined.

(** Diagonal morphisms are equivalent to sections *)


C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
(∑ x : C ⟦ b, c ⟧, x · g = f)
→ ∑ s' : C ⟦ b, d ⟧, s' · h = identity b


C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
(∑ x : C ⟦ b, c ⟧, x · g = f)
→ ∑ s' : C ⟦ b, d ⟧, s' · h = identity b

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
X: ∑ x : C ⟦ b, c ⟧, x · g = f
∑ s' : C ⟦ b, d ⟧, s' · h = identity b

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
X: ∑ x : C ⟦ b, c ⟧, x · g = f
C ⟦ b, d ⟧
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
X: ∑ x : C ⟦ b, c ⟧, x · g = f
(λ s' : C ⟦ b, d ⟧, s' · h = identity b) ?pr1

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
X: ∑ x : C ⟦ b, c ⟧, x · g = f
C ⟦ b, d ⟧
 
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
X: ∑ x : C ⟦ b, c ⟧, x · g = f
identity b · f = pr1 X · g

    abstract (rewrite id_left ;  apply (! (pr2 X))).
  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
X: ∑ x : C ⟦ b, c ⟧, x · g = f
(λ s' : C ⟦ b, d ⟧, s' · h = identity b)
  (PullbackArrow (make_Pullback H isPb) b (identity b)
     (pr1 X) (section_from_diagonal_subproof X))
 abstract (apply (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback H isPb))).
Defined.


C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
(∑ s' : C ⟦ b, d ⟧, s' · h = identity b)
→ ∑ x : C ⟦ b, c ⟧, x · g = f


C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
(∑ s' : C ⟦ b, d ⟧, s' · h = identity b)
→ ∑ x : C ⟦ b, c ⟧, x · g = f

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
X: ∑ s' : C ⟦ b, d ⟧, s' · h = identity b
∑ x : C ⟦ b, c ⟧, x · g = f

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
X: ∑ s' : C ⟦ b, d ⟧, s' · h = identity b
pr1 X · k · g = f

  abstract (rewrite <- assoc, <- H, assoc, (pr2 X); apply id_left).
Defined.


C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
(∑ x : C ⟦ b, c ⟧, x · g = f)
≃ (∑ s' : C ⟦ b, d ⟧, s' · h = identity b)


C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
(∑ x : C ⟦ b, c ⟧, x · g = f)
≃ (∑ s' : C ⟦ b, d ⟧, s' · h = identity b)

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
isweq (section_from_diagonal isPb)

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
∏ x : ∑ x : C ⟦ b, c ⟧, x · g = f,
diagonal_from_section isPb
  (section_from_diagonal isPb x) = x
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
∏ y : ∑ s' : C ⟦ b, d ⟧, s' · h = identity b,
section_from_diagonal isPb
  (diagonal_from_section isPb y) = y

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
∏ x : ∑ x : C ⟦ b, c ⟧, x · g = f,
diagonal_from_section isPb
  (section_from_diagonal isPb x) = x
 abstract (intro x; apply subtypePath; [intro; apply C |];
              apply (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 (make_Pullback H isPb) )).
  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
isPb: isPullback H
∏ y : ∑ s' : C ⟦ b, d ⟧, s' · h = identity b,
section_from_diagonal isPb
  (diagonal_from_section isPb y) = y
 abstract (intro y; apply subtypePath; [intro; apply C |];
              destruct y as [y t2];
              apply pathsinv0, PullbackArrowUnique; [
                apply t2 |
                apply idpath] ).
Defined.

(**  Diagram for next lemma
<<
              i'           k
         d' -------> d --------> c
         |           |           |
       h'|           |h          | g
         v           v           v
         b'--------> b --------> a
              i            f
>>
*)


C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
Hinner: h · f = k · g
Hinnerpb: isPullback Hinner
Hleft: h' · i = i' · h
Houterpb: isPullback (glueSquares Hinner Hleft)
isPullback Hleft


C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
Hinner: h · f = k · g
Hinnerpb: isPullback Hinner
Hleft: h' · i = i' · h
Houterpb: isPullback (glueSquares Hinner Hleft)
isPullback Hleft

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
Hinner: h · f = k · g
Hinnerpb: isPullback Hinner
Hleft: h' · i = i' · h
Houterpb: isPullback (glueSquares Hinner Hleft)
∏ (e : C) (h0 : C ⟦ e, b' ⟧) (k : C ⟦ e, d ⟧),
h0 · i = k · h
→ ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, d' ⟧, hk · h' = h0 × hk · i' = k

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
Hinner: h · f = k · g
Hinnerpb: isPullback Hinner
Hleft: h' · i = i' · h
Houterpb: isPullback (glueSquares Hinner Hleft)
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
Hxy: x · i = y · h
∃! hk : C ⟦ e, d' ⟧, hk · h' = x × hk · i' = y

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
Hinner: h · f = k · g
Hinnerpb: isPullback Hinner
Hleft: h' · i = i' · h
Houterpb: isPullback (glueSquares Hinner Hleft)
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
Hxy: x · i = y · h
∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d' ⟧, hk · h' = x × hk · i' = y
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
Hinner: h · f = k · g
Hinnerpb: isPullback Hinner
Hleft: h' · i = i' · h
Houterpb: isPullback (glueSquares Hinner Hleft)
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
Hxy: x · i = y · h
(λ cntr : ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d' ⟧,
          hk · h' = x × hk · i' = y,
 ∏ t : ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d' ⟧, hk · h' = x × hk · i' = y,
 t = cntr) ?pr1

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
Hinner: h · f = k · g
Hinnerpb: isPullback Hinner
Hleft: h' · i = i' · h
Houterpb: isPullback (glueSquares Hinner Hleft)
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
Hxy: x · i = y · h
∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d' ⟧, hk · h' = x × hk · i' = y
 
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
Hinner: h · f = k · g
Hinnerpb: isPullback Hinner
Hleft: h' · i = i' · h
Houterpb: isPullback (glueSquares Hinner Hleft)
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
Hxy: x · i = y · h
C ⟦ e, d' ⟧
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
Hinner: h · f = k · g
Hinnerpb: isPullback Hinner
Hleft: h' · i = i' · h
Houterpb: isPullback (glueSquares Hinner Hleft)
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
Hxy: x · i = y · h
(λ hk : C ⟦ e, d' ⟧, hk · h' = x × hk · i' = y) ?pr1

    
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
Hinner: h · f = k · g
Hinnerpb: isPullback Hinner
Hleft: h' · i = i' · h
Houterpb: isPullback (glueSquares Hinner Hleft)
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
Hxy: x · i = y · h
C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g

Hinner: h · f = k · g
Hinnerpb: isPullback Hinner
Hleft: h' · i = i' · h
Houterpb: isPullback (glueSquares Hinner Hleft)
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
Hxy: x · i = y · h
C ⟦ e, c ⟧
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
Hinner: h · f = k · g
Hinnerpb: isPullback Hinner
Hleft: h' · i = i' · h
Houterpb: isPullback (glueSquares Hinner Hleft)
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
Hxy: x · i = y · h
?h · (i · f) = ?k · g
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
Hinner: h · f = k · g
Hinnerpb: isPullback Hinner
Hleft: h' · i = i' · h
Houterpb: isPullback (glueSquares Hinner Hleft)
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
Hxy: x · i = y · h
(λ hk : C ⟦ e, d' ⟧, hk · h' = x × hk · i' = y)
  (PullbackArrow
     (make_Pullback (glueSquares Hinner Hleft)
        Houterpb) e ?h ?k 
     ?H)

    
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
