h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
Hinner: h · f = k · g
Hinnerpb: isPullback Hinner
Hleft: h' · i = i' · h
Houterpb: isPullback (glueSquares Hinner Hleft)
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
Hxy: x · i = y · h
C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
 apply x.
    
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
Hinner: h · f = k · g
Hinnerpb: isPullback Hinner
Hleft: h' · i = i' · h
Houterpb: isPullback (glueSquares Hinner Hleft)
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
Hxy: x · i = y · h
C ⟦ e, c ⟧
 apply (y · k).
    
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
Hinner: h · f = k · g
Hinnerpb: isPullback Hinner
Hleft: h' · i = i' · h
Houterpb: isPullback (glueSquares Hinner Hleft)
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
Hxy: x · i = y · h
x · (i · f) = y · k · g
 abstract (rewrite assoc; rewrite Hxy;
                repeat rewrite <- assoc; rewrite Hinner; apply idpath).
    
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
Hinner: h · f = k · g
Hinnerpb: isPullback Hinner
Hleft: h' · i = i' · h
Houterpb: isPullback (glueSquares Hinner Hleft)
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
Hxy: x · i = y · h
(λ hk : C ⟦ e, d' ⟧, hk · h' = x × hk · i' = y)
  (PullbackArrow
     (make_Pullback (glueSquares Hinner Hleft)
        Houterpb) e x (y · k)
     (isPullback_two_pullback_subproof b' i Hinner e x
        y Hxy))
 abstract (
      split ;
      [
      apply (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback (*(i · f) g d' h' (i' · k)*) _ Houterpb))
      |
      idtac
      ];
      apply (MorphismsIntoPullbackEqual Hinnerpb);
      [rewrite <- assoc;
        match goal with |[ |- ?KK · ( _ · _ ) = _ ] => intermediate_path (KK · (h' · i)) end;
        [ apply maponpaths; apply (!Hleft) |
          rewrite assoc;
          assert (T:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback (*(i · f) g d' h' (i' · k)*) _ Houterpb));
          cbn in T; rewrite T;
          apply Hxy ]
        | idtac ] ;
      assert (T:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 (make_Pullback (*(i · f) g d' h' (i' · k)*) _ Houterpb));
      cbn in T; rewrite <- assoc, T; apply idpath
      ).
  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
Hinner: h · f = k · g
Hinnerpb: isPullback Hinner
Hleft: h' · i = i' · h
Houterpb: isPullback (glueSquares Hinner Hleft)
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
Hxy: x · i = y · h
(λ cntr : ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d' ⟧,
          hk · h' = x × hk · i' = y,
 ∏ t : ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d' ⟧, hk · h' = x × hk · i' = y,
 t = cntr)
  (PullbackArrow
     (make_Pullback (glueSquares Hinner Hleft)
        Houterpb) e x (y · k)
     (isPullback_two_pullback_subproof b' i Hinner e x
        y Hxy),,
   isPullback_two_pullback_subproof0 b' d' h' i i'
     Hinner Hinnerpb Hleft Houterpb e x y Hxy)
 abstract (
    intro t; apply subtypePath;
              [ intro; apply isapropdirprod; apply C
              |
              simpl; apply PullbackArrowUnique; [
                apply (pr1 (pr2 t))
              |
                cbn; rewrite assoc; rewrite (pr2 (pr2 t)); apply idpath ]]
    ).
Defined.

(** * A square isomorphic to a pullback is a pullback (case 1) *)
Section pullback_iso.

(**  Diagram for next lemma
<<
              i'           k
         d' -------> d --------> c
         |           |           |
       h'|           |h          | g
         v           v           v
         b'--------> b --------> a
              i            f
>>
*)


C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPullback H → isPullback H'


C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPullback H → isPullback H'

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
isPullback H'

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
∏ (e : C) (h : C ⟦ e, b' ⟧) (k0 : C ⟦ e, c ⟧),
h · (i · f) = k0 · g
→ ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, d' ⟧,
  hk · h' = h × hk · (i' · k) = k0

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
∃! hk : C ⟦ e, d' ⟧, hk · h' = x × hk · (i' · k) = y

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧

xi: is_z_isomorphism i

y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
∃! hk : C ⟦ e, d' ⟧, hk · h' = x × hk · (i' · k) = y

 t : ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d' ⟧,

i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
C ⟦ e, c ⟧
 apply y.
      
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
x · i · f = y · g
 abstract (rewrite <- assoc; apply Hxy).
      
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
C ⟦ Pb, d' ⟧
 apply (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')).
    
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
(λ hk : C ⟦ e, d' ⟧, hk · h' = x × hk · (i' · k) = y)
  (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
     (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x
        y Hxy) · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi'))
 
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
  (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x y
     Hxy) · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · h' =
x
× PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
    (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x y
       Hxy) · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')
  · (i' · k) = y

C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
X: ∏ H : x · i · f = y · g,
PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y H · h = x · i
PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
  (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x y
     Hxy) · (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · h') =
PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
  (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x y
     Hxy) · (h · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi))
 
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
X: ∏ H : x · i · f = y · g,
PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y H · h = x · i
inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · h' =
h · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi)

          
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧

k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧

h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧

x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧

Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
X: ∏ H : x · i · f = y · g,
PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y H · h = x · i
h' =
make_z_iso' i' xi'
· (h · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi))

· inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi)

a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧

Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
X: ∏ H : x · i · f = y · g,
PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y H · h = x · i
make_z_iso' i' xi' · h = h' · make_z_iso' i xi

          apply pathsinv0, Hi.

  (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x y

X: ∏ H : x · i · f = y · g,

x · i · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi) = x

a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧

e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
X: ∏ H : x · i · f = y · g,

x = x · i · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi)

          
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧

k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧

i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
X: ∏ H : x · i · f = y · g,
PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y H · h = x · i
x · i = x · make_z_iso' i xi
 apply idpath.
        }
      
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
  (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x y
     Hxy) · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')
· (i' · k) = y
 
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
X: ∏ H : x · i · f = y · g,
PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y H · PullbackPr2 Pb =
y
PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
  (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x y
     Hxy) · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')
· (i' · k) = y

  (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x y
     Hxy) · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')
· (i' · k) = y

C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧

Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
X: ∏ H : x · i · f = y · g,
PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y H · k = y

  (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x y
     Hxy) · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · i' =
PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
  (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x y
     Hxy)

          
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
X: ∏ H : x · i · f = y · g,

  (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x y
     Hxy) · (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · i') =
PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
  (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x y
     Hxy)

          
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
X: ∏ H : x · i · f = y · g,
PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y H · k = y
PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
  (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x y
     Hxy) · identity d =
PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
  (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x y
     Hxy)

          apply id_right.
        
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
X: ∏ H : x · i · f = y · g,
PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y H · k = y
PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
  (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x y
     Hxy) · k = y
 apply X.
        }
  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
(λ cntr : ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d' ⟧,
          hk · h' = x × hk · (i' · k) = y,
 ∏
 t : ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d' ⟧,
     hk · h' = x × hk · (i' · k) = y, t = cntr)
  (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
     (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x
        y Hxy) · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi'),,
   ((let X := PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e (x · i) y
       in
     internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ e, b' ⟧)
       (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
          (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i
             e x y Hxy)
        · (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · h'))
       (λ p : C ⟦ e, b' ⟧,
        p =
        PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
          (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i
             e x y Hxy) · h
        · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi))
       (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ e, b' ⟧)
          (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
             (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                b' i e x y Hxy)
           · (h · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi)))
          (λ p : C ⟦ e, b' ⟧,
           PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
             (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                b' i e x y Hxy)
           · (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · h') =
           p)
          (maponpaths
             (compose
                (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
                   (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                      b' i e x y Hxy)))
             (z_iso_inv_on_right d' d b'
                (make_z_iso' i' xi')
                (h · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi))
                h'
                (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ d', b' ⟧)
                   (make_z_iso' i' xi'
                    · (h
                       · inv_from_z_iso
                           (make_z_iso' i xi)))
                   (make_z_iso' i' xi' · h
                    · inv_from_z_iso
                        (make_z_iso' i xi))
                   (λ p : C ⟦ d', b' ⟧, h' = p)
                   (z_iso_inv_on_left d' b' b h'
                      (make_z_iso' i xi)
                      (make_z_iso' i' xi' · h) (! Hi))
                   (assoc (make_z_iso' i' xi') h
                      (inv_from_z_iso
                         (make_z_iso' i xi))))))
          (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
             (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                b' i e x y Hxy) · h
           · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi))
          (assoc
             (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
                (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                   b' i e x y Hxy)) h
             (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi))))
       (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
          (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i
             e x y Hxy)
        · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · h')
       (assoc
          (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
             (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                b' i e x y Hxy))
          (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')) h') @
     internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ e, b ⟧)
       (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
          (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i
             e x y Hxy) · h) (x · i)
       (λ p : C ⟦ e, b ⟧,
        p · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi) = x)
       (! z_iso_inv_on_left e b' b x
            (make_z_iso' i xi) (x · i)
            (idpath (x · make_z_iso' i xi)))
       (X
          (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i
             e x y Hxy))),,
    (let X := PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e (x · i) y
       in
     internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ e, c ⟧)
       (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
          (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i
             e x y Hxy)
        · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')
        · (i' · k))
       (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
          (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i
             e x y Hxy)
        · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · i' · k)
       (λ p : C ⟦ e, c ⟧, p = y)
       (cancel_postcomposition
          (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
             (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                b' i e x y Hxy)
           · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · i')
          (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
             (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                b' i e x y Hxy)) k
          (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ e, d ⟧)
             (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
                (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                   b' i e x y Hxy)
              · (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')
                 · i'))
             (λ p : C ⟦ e, d ⟧,
              p =
              PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
                (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                   b' i e x y Hxy))
             (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ d, d ⟧)
                (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')
                 · make_z_iso' i' xi') (identity d)
                (λ p : C ⟦ d, d ⟧,
                 PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
                   (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                      b' i e x y Hxy) · p =
                 PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
                   (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                      b' i e x y Hxy))
                (id_right
                   (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
                      (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                         b' i e x y Hxy)))
                (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                   (make_z_iso' i' xi')))
             (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
                (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                   b' i e x y Hxy)
              · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')
              · i')
             (assoc
                (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
                   (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                      b' i e x y Hxy))
                (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi'))
                i')) @
        X
          (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i
             e x y Hxy))
       (assoc
          (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
             (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                b' i e x y Hxy)
           · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')) i' k))
    :
    (λ hk : C ⟦ e, d' ⟧,
     hk · h' = x × hk · (i' · k) = y)
      (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
         (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i
            e x y Hxy)
       · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi'))))
 
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
∏
t : ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d' ⟧,
    hk · h' = x × hk · (i' · k) = y,
t =
PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
  (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x y
     Hxy) · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi'),,
(internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ e, b' ⟧)
   (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
      (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x
         y Hxy)
    · (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · h'))
   (λ p : C ⟦ e, b' ⟧,
    p =
    PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
      (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x
         y Hxy) · h
    · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi))
   (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ e, b' ⟧)
      (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
         (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i
            e x y Hxy)
       · (h · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi)))
      (λ p : C ⟦ e, b' ⟧,
       PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
         (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i
            e x y Hxy)
       · (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · h') =
       p)
      (maponpaths
         (compose
            (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
               (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                  b' i e x y Hxy)))
         (z_iso_inv_on_right d' d b'
            (make_z_iso' i' xi')
            (h · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi)) h'
            (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ d', b' ⟧)
               (i'
                · (h
                   · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi)))
               (i' · h
                · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi))
               (λ p : C ⟦ d', b' ⟧, h' = p)
               (z_iso_inv_on_left d' b' b h'
                  (make_z_iso' i xi) (i' · h) (! Hi))
               (assoc i' h
                  (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi))))))
      (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
         (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i
            e x y Hxy) · h
       · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi))
      (assoc
         (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
            (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b'
               i e x y Hxy)) h
         (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi))))
   (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
      (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x
         y Hxy) · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')
    · h')
   (assoc
      (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
         (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i
            e x y Hxy))
      (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')) h') @
 internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ e, b ⟧)
   (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
      (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x
         y Hxy) · h) (x · i)
   (λ p : C ⟦ e, b ⟧,
    p · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi) = x)
   (! z_iso_inv_on_left e b' b x (make_z_iso' i xi)
        (x · i) (idpath (x · i)))
   (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e (x · i) y
      (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x
         y Hxy))),,
internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ e, c ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
     (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x
        y Hxy) · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')
   · (i' · k))
  (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
     (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x
        y Hxy) · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')
   · i' · k) (λ p : C ⟦ e, c ⟧, p = y)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
        (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e
           x y Hxy)
      · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · i')
     (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
        (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e
           x y Hxy)) k
     (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ e, d ⟧)
        (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
           (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b'
              i e x y Hxy)
         · (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · i'))
        (λ p : C ⟦ e, d ⟧,
         p =
         PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
           (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b'
              i e x y Hxy))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ d, d ⟧)
           (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · i')
           (identity d)
           (λ p : C ⟦ d, d ⟧,
            PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
              (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                 b' i e x y Hxy) · p =
            PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
              (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                 b' i e x y Hxy))
           (id_right
              (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
                 (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                    b' i e x y Hxy)))
           (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (make_z_iso' i' xi')))
        (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
           (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b'
              i e x y Hxy)
         · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · i')
        (assoc
           (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
              (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                 b' i e x y Hxy))
           (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')) i')) @
   PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e (x · i) y
     (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x
        y Hxy))
  (assoc
     (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
        (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e
           x y Hxy)
      · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')) i' k)
 
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
t: ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d' ⟧,
hk · h' = x × hk · (i' · k) = y
t =
PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
  (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x y
     Hxy) · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi'),,
(internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ e, b' ⟧)
   (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
      (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x
         y Hxy)
    · (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · h'))
   (λ p : C ⟦ e, b' ⟧,
    p =
    PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
      (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x
         y Hxy) · h
    · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi))
   (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ e, b' ⟧)
      (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
         (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i
            e x y Hxy)
       · (h · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi)))
      (λ p : C ⟦ e, b' ⟧,
       PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
         (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i
            e x y Hxy)
       · (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · h') =
       p)
      (maponpaths
         (compose
            (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
               (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                  b' i e x y Hxy)))
         (z_iso_inv_on_right d' d b'
            (make_z_iso' i' xi')
            (h · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi)) h'
            (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ d', b' ⟧)
               (i'
                · (h
                   · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi)))
               (i' · h
                · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi))
               (λ p : C ⟦ d', b' ⟧, h' = p)
               (z_iso_inv_on_left d' b' b h'
                  (make_z_iso' i xi) (i' · h) (! Hi))
               (assoc i' h
                  (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi))))))
      (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
         (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i
            e x y Hxy) · h
       · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi))
      (assoc
         (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
            (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b'
               i e x y Hxy)) h
         (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi))))
   (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
      (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x
         y Hxy) · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')
    · h')
   (assoc
      (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
         (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i
            e x y Hxy))
      (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')) h') @
 internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ e, b ⟧)
   (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
      (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x
         y Hxy) · h) (x · i)
   (λ p : C ⟦ e, b ⟧,
    p · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi) = x)
   (! z_iso_inv_on_left e b' b x (make_z_iso' i xi)
        (x · i) (idpath (x · i)))
   (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e (x · i) y
      (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x
         y Hxy))),,
internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ e, c ⟧)
  (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
     (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x
        y Hxy) · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')
   · (i' · k))
  (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
     (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x
        y Hxy) · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')
   · i' · k) (λ p : C ⟦ e, c ⟧, p = y)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
        (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e
           x y Hxy)
      · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · i')
     (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
        (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e
           x y Hxy)) k
     (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ e, d ⟧)
        (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
           (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b'
              i e x y Hxy)
         · (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · i'))
        (λ p : C ⟦ e, d ⟧,
         p =
         PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
           (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b'
              i e x y Hxy))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ d, d ⟧)
           (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · i')
           (identity d)
           (λ p : C ⟦ d, d ⟧,
            PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
              (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                 b' i e x y Hxy) · p =
            PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
              (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                 b' i e x y Hxy))
           (id_right
              (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
                 (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                    b' i e x y Hxy)))
           (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (make_z_iso' i' xi')))
        (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
           (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b'
              i e x y Hxy)
         · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · i')
        (assoc
           (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
              (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                 b' i e x y Hxy))
           (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')) i')) @
   PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e (x · i) y
     (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x
        y Hxy))
  (assoc
     (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
        (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e
           x y Hxy)
      · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')) i' k)

    
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
t: ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d' ⟧,
hk · h' = x × hk · (i' · k) = y
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : C ⟦ e, d' ⟧, x0 · h' = x × x0 · (i' · k) = y)
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
t: ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d' ⟧,
hk · h' = x × hk · (i' · k) = y
pr1 t =
pr1
  (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
     (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x
        y Hxy) · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi'),,
   (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ e, b' ⟧)
      (PullbackArrow Pb e 
         (x · i) y
         (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i
            e x y Hxy)
       · (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · h'))
      (λ p : C ⟦ e, b' ⟧,
       p =
       PullbackArrow Pb e 
         (x · i) y
         (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i
            e x y Hxy) · h
       · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi))
      (internal_paths_rew 
         (C ⟦ e, b' ⟧)
         (PullbackArrow Pb e 
            (x · i) y
            (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b'
               i e x y Hxy)
          · (h · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi)))
         (λ p : C ⟦ e, b' ⟧,
          PullbackArrow Pb e 
            (x · i) y
            (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b'
               i e x y Hxy)
          · (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · h') =
          p)
         (maponpaths
            (compose
               (PullbackArrow Pb e 
                  (x · i) y
                  (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                     b' i e x y Hxy)))
            (z_iso_inv_on_right d' d b'
               (make_z_iso' i' xi')
               (h · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi))
               h'
               (internal_paths_rew_r 
                  (C ⟦ d', b' ⟧)
                  (i'
                   · (h
                      · inv_from_z_iso
                        (make_z_iso' i xi)))
                  (i' · h
                   · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ d', b' ⟧, h' = p)
                  (z_iso_inv_on_left d' b' b h'
                     (make_z_iso' i xi) 
                     (i' · h) 
                     (! Hi))
                  (assoc i' h
                     (inv_from_z_iso
                        (make_z_iso' i xi))))))
         (PullbackArrow Pb e 
            (x · i) y
            (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b'
               i e x y Hxy) · h
          · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi))
         (assoc
            (PullbackArrow Pb e 
               (x · i) y
               (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                  b' i e x y Hxy)) h
            (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi))))
      (PullbackArrow Pb e 
         (x · i) y
         (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i
            e x y Hxy)
       · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · h')
      (assoc
         (PullbackArrow Pb e 
            (x · i) y
            (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b'
               i e x y Hxy))
         (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')) h') @
    internal_paths_rew_r 
      (C ⟦ e, b ⟧)
      (PullbackArrow Pb e 
         (x · i) y
         (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i
            e x y Hxy) · h) 
      (x · i)
      (λ p : C ⟦ e, b ⟧,
       p · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi) = x)
      (! z_iso_inv_on_left e b' b x 
           (make_z_iso' i xi) 
           (x · i) (idpath (x · i)))
      (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e 
         (x · i) y
         (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i
            e x y Hxy))),,
   internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ e, c ⟧)
     (PullbackArrow Pb e 
        (x · i) y
        (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e
           x y Hxy)
      · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · 
      (i' · k))
     (PullbackArrow Pb e 
        (x · i) y
        (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e
           x y Hxy)
      · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · i' · k)
     (λ p : C ⟦ e, c ⟧, p = y)
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (PullbackArrow Pb e 
           (x · i) y
           (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b'
              i e x y Hxy)
         · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · i')
        (PullbackArrow Pb e 
           (x · i) y
           (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b'
              i e x y Hxy)) k
        (internal_paths_rew 
           (C ⟦ e, d ⟧)
           (PullbackArrow Pb e 
              (x · i) y
              (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                 b' i e x y Hxy)
            · (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')
               · i'))
           (λ p : C ⟦ e, d ⟧,
            p =
            PullbackArrow Pb e 
              (x · i) y
              (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                 b' i e x y Hxy))
           (internal_paths_rew_r 
              (C ⟦ d, d ⟧)
              (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')
               · i') (identity d)
              (λ p : C ⟦ d, d ⟧,
               PullbackArrow Pb e 
                 (x · i) y
                 (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                    b' i e x y Hxy) · p =
               PullbackArrow Pb e 
                 (x · i) y
                 (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                    b' i e x y Hxy))
              (id_right
                 (PullbackArrow Pb e 
                    (x · i) y
                    (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                       b' i e x y Hxy)))
              (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                 (make_z_iso' i' xi')))
           (PullbackArrow Pb e 
              (x · i) y
              (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                 b' i e x y Hxy)
            · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · i')
           (assoc
              (PullbackArrow Pb e 
                 (x · i) y
                 (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                    b' i e x y Hxy))
              (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')) i')) @
      PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e 
        (x · i) y
        (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e
           x y Hxy))
     (assoc
        (PullbackArrow Pb e 
           (x · i) y
           (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b'
              i e x y Hxy)
         · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')) i' k))

    
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
t: ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d' ⟧,
hk · h' = x × hk · (i' · k) = y
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : C ⟦ e, d' ⟧, x0 · h' = x × x0 · (i' · k) = y)
 
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
t: ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d' ⟧,
hk · h' = x × hk · (i' · k) = y
x0: C ⟦ e, d' ⟧
isaprop (x0 · h' = x × x0 · (i' · k) = y)
 apply isapropdirprod; apply C.
    
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
t: ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d' ⟧,
hk · h' = x × hk · (i' · k) = y
pr1 t =
pr1
  (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
     (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x
        y Hxy) · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi'),,
   (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ e, b' ⟧)
      (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
         (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i
            e x y Hxy)
       · (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · h'))
      (λ p : C ⟦ e, b' ⟧,
       p =
       PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
         (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i
            e x y Hxy) · h
       · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi))
      (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ e, b' ⟧)
         (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
            (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b'
               i e x y Hxy)
          · (h · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi)))
         (λ p : C ⟦ e, b' ⟧,
          PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
            (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b'
               i e x y Hxy)
          · (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · h') =
          p)
         (maponpaths
            (compose
               (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
                  (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                     b' i e x y Hxy)))
            (z_iso_inv_on_right d' d b'
               (make_z_iso' i' xi')
               (h · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi))
               h'
               (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ d', b' ⟧)
                  (i'
                   · (h
                      · inv_from_z_iso
                          (make_z_iso' i xi)))
                  (i' · h
                   · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi))
                  (λ p : C ⟦ d', b' ⟧, h' = p)
                  (z_iso_inv_on_left d' b' b h'
                     (make_z_iso' i xi) (i' · h)
                     (! Hi))
                  (assoc i' h
                     (inv_from_z_iso
                        (make_z_iso' i xi))))))
         (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
            (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b'
               i e x y Hxy) · h
          · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi))
         (assoc
            (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
               (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                  b' i e x y Hxy)) h
            (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi))))
      (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
         (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i
            e x y Hxy)
       · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · h')
      (assoc
         (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
            (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b'
               i e x y Hxy))
         (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')) h') @
    internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ e, b ⟧)
      (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
         (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i
            e x y Hxy) · h) (x · i)
      (λ p : C ⟦ e, b ⟧,
       p · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i xi) = x)
      (! z_iso_inv_on_left e b' b x (make_z_iso' i xi)
           (x · i) (idpath (x · i)))
      (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e (x · i) y
         (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i
            e x y Hxy))),,
   internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ e, c ⟧)
     (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
        (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e
           x y Hxy)
      · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · (i' · k))
     (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
        (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e
           x y Hxy)
      · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · i' · k)
     (λ p : C ⟦ e, c ⟧, p = y)
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
           (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b'
              i e x y Hxy)
         · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · i')
        (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
           (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b'
              i e x y Hxy)) k
        (internal_paths_rew (C ⟦ e, d ⟧)
           (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
              (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                 b' i e x y Hxy)
            · (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')
               · i'))
           (λ p : C ⟦ e, d ⟧,
            p =
            PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
              (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                 b' i e x y Hxy))
           (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ d, d ⟧)
              (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')
               · i') (identity d)
              (λ p : C ⟦ d, d ⟧,
               PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
                 (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                    b' i e x y Hxy) · p =
               PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
                 (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                    b' i e x y Hxy))
              (id_right
                 (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
                    (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                       b' i e x y Hxy)))
              (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                 (make_z_iso' i' xi')))
           (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
              (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                 b' i e x y Hxy)
            · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi') · i')
           (assoc
              (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
                 (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof
                    b' i e x y Hxy))
              (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')) i')) @
      PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e (x · i) y
        (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e
           x y Hxy))
     (assoc
        (PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
           (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b'
              i e x y Hxy)
         · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')) i' k))
 
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
t: ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d' ⟧,
hk · h' = x × hk · (i' · k) = y
pr1 t =
PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
  (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x y
     Hxy) · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')

      
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
t: C ⟦ e, d' ⟧
Ht: t · h' = x × t · (i' · k) = y
t =
PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
  (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x y
     Hxy) · inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' i' xi')

      
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
t: C ⟦ e, d' ⟧
Ht: t · h' = x × t · (i' · k) = y
PullbackArrow Pb e (x · i) y
  (isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms_subproof b' i e x y
     Hxy) = t · make_z_iso' i' xi'

      
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
t: C ⟦ e, d' ⟧
Ht: t · h' = x × t · (i' · k) = y
t · i' · h = x · i

a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧

Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g

y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
t: C ⟦ e, d' ⟧
Ht: t · h' = x × t · (i' · k) = y

a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧

a, b, c, d: C

k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g

xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g

Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
