Ht: t · h' = x × t · (i' · k) = y
t · (h' · i) = x · i

        
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
t: C ⟦ e, d' ⟧
Ht: t · h' = x × t · (i' · k) = y
t · h' · i = x · i
 
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
t: C ⟦ e, d' ⟧
Ht: t · h' = x × t · (i' · k) = y
x · i = x · i
 apply idpath.
      
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
t: C ⟦ e, d' ⟧
Ht: t · h' = x × t · (i' · k) = y
t · i' · k = y
 
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
b', d': C
h': C ⟦ d', b' ⟧
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ d', d ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h' · i = i' · h
H': h' · (i · f) = i' · k · g
isPb: isPullback H
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b' ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · (i · f) = y · g
Pb:= make_Pullback H isPb: Pullback f g
t: C ⟦ e, d' ⟧
Ht: t · h' = x × t · (i' · k) = y
t · (i' · k) = y
 apply (pr2 Ht).
Defined. (* with ample room for opacification *)

End pullback_iso.


End lemmas_on_pullbacks.


(** * Pullback of identities *)

C: category
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ix: C ⟦ x, x ⟧
iy: C ⟦ y, y ⟧
p: f · iy = ix · g
q₁: f = g
q₂: ix = identity x
q₃: iy = identity y
isPullback p


C: category
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ix: C ⟦ x, x ⟧
iy: C ⟦ y, y ⟧
p: f · iy = ix · g
q₁: f = g
q₂: ix = identity x
q₃: iy = identity y
isPullback p

  
C: category
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ix: C ⟦ x, x ⟧
iy: C ⟦ y, y ⟧
p: f · iy = ix · g
q₁: f = g
q₂: ix = identity x
q₃: iy = identity y
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
r: h · iy = k · g
∃! hk : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, hk · f = h × hk · ix = k

  
C: category
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ix: C ⟦ x, x ⟧
iy: C ⟦ y, y ⟧
p: f · iy = ix · g
q₁: f = g
q₂: ix = identity x
q₃: iy = identity y
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
r: h · iy = k · g
isaprop (∑ hk : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, hk · f = h × hk · ix = k)
C: category
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ix: C ⟦ x, x ⟧
iy: C ⟦ y, y ⟧
p: f · iy = ix · g
q₁: f = g
q₂: ix = identity x
q₃: iy = identity y
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
r: h · iy = k · g
∑ hk : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, hk · f = h × hk · ix = k

  
C: category
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ix: C ⟦ x, x ⟧
iy: C ⟦ y, y ⟧
p: f · iy = ix · g
q₁: f = g
q₂: ix = identity x
q₃: iy = identity y
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
r: h · iy = k · g
isaprop (∑ hk : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, hk · f = h × hk · ix = k)
 abstract
      (use invproofirrelevance ;
       intros φ₁ φ₂ ;
       use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isapropdirprod ; apply homset_property | ] ;
       refine (!(id_right _) @ _) ;
       rewrite <- q₂ ;
       refine (pr22 φ₁ @ !(pr22 φ₂) @ _) ;
       rewrite q₂ ;
       apply id_right).
  
C: category
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ix: C ⟦ x, x ⟧
iy: C ⟦ y, y ⟧
p: f · iy = ix · g
q₁: f = g
q₂: ix = identity x
q₃: iy = identity y
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
r: h · iy = k · g
∑ hk : C ⟦ w, x ⟧, hk · f = h × hk · ix = k
 
C: category
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ix: C ⟦ x, x ⟧
iy: C ⟦ y, y ⟧
p: f · iy = ix · g
q₁: f = g
q₂: ix = identity x
q₃: iy = identity y
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
r: h · iy = k · g
k · f = h
C: category
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ix: C ⟦ x, x ⟧
iy: C ⟦ y, y ⟧
p: f · iy = ix · g
q₁: f = g
q₂: ix = identity x
q₃: iy = identity y
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
r: h · iy = k · g
(λ _ : k · f = h, k · ix = k) ?pr1

    
C: category
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ix: C ⟦ x, x ⟧
iy: C ⟦ y, y ⟧
p: f · iy = ix · g
q₁: f = g
q₂: ix = identity x
q₃: iy = identity y
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
r: h · iy = k · g
k · f = h
 abstract
        (rewrite q₁ ;
         rewrite <- r ;
         rewrite q₃ ;
         apply id_right).
    
C: category
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ix: C ⟦ x, x ⟧
iy: C ⟦ y, y ⟧
p: f · iy = ix · g
q₁: f = g
q₂: ix = identity x
q₃: iy = identity y
w: C
h: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
r: h · iy = k · g
(λ _ : k · f = h, k · ix = k)
  (identity_isPullback_subproof0 C x y f g iy q₁ q₃ w
     h k r)
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite q₂ ;
         apply id_right).
Defined.


C: category
A, B, D: C
f: C ⟦ A, D ⟧
g: C ⟦ B, D ⟧
pb: Pullback f g
Pullback g f


C: category
A, B, D: C
f: C ⟦ A, D ⟧
g: C ⟦ B, D ⟧
pb: Pullback f g
Pullback g f

  
C: category
A, B, D: C
f: C ⟦ A, D ⟧
g: C ⟦ B, D ⟧
P: C
r: C ⟦ P, A ⟧
s: C ⟦ P, B ⟧
e: r · f = s · g
ip: isPullback e
Pullback g f

  use (make_Pullback (!e) (is_symmetric_isPullback _ ip)).
Defined.

(** In this section we prove that the pullback of a z_iso is a
  z_iso. *)
Section pb_of_ziso.


C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
gis: is_z_isomorphism g
pb: Pullback f g
is_z_isomorphism (PullbackPr1 pb)


C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
gis: is_z_isomorphism g
pb: Pullback f g
is_z_isomorphism (PullbackPr1 pb)

  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
gis: is_z_isomorphism g
pb: Pullback f g
C ⟦ b, pb ⟧
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
gis: is_z_isomorphism g
pb: Pullback f g
is_inverse_in_precat (PullbackPr1 pb) ?g

  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
gis: is_z_isomorphism g
pb: Pullback f g
C ⟦ b, pb ⟧
 
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
gis: is_z_isomorphism g
pb: Pullback f g
C ⟦ b, b ⟧
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
gis: is_z_isomorphism g
pb: Pullback f g
C ⟦ b, c ⟧
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
gis: is_z_isomorphism g
pb: Pullback f g
?h · f = ?k · g

    
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
gis: is_z_isomorphism g
pb: Pullback f g
C ⟦ b, b ⟧
 exact (identity b).
    
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
gis: is_z_isomorphism g
pb: Pullback f g
C ⟦ b, c ⟧
 exact (f · (is_z_isomorphism_mor gis)).
    
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
gis: is_z_isomorphism g
pb: Pullback f g
identity b · f = f · is_z_isomorphism_mor gis · g
 now rewrite
        assoc',
        (is_inverse_in_precat2
          (is_z_isomorphism_is_inverse_in_precat
            gis)),
        id_left,
        id_right.
  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
gis: is_z_isomorphism g
pb: Pullback f g
is_inverse_in_precat (PullbackPr1 pb)
  (PullbackArrow pb b (identity b)
     (f · is_z_isomorphism_mor gis)
     (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
        (f · is_z_isomorphism_mor gis · g)
        (f · (is_z_isomorphism_mor gis · g))
        (λ p : C ⟦ b, a ⟧, identity b · f = p)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ a, a ⟧)
           (is_z_isomorphism_mor gis · g) (identity a)
           (λ p : C ⟦ a, a ⟧, identity b · f = f · p)
           (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
              (identity b · f) f
              (λ p : C ⟦ b, a ⟧, p = f · identity a)
              (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
                 (f · identity a) f
                 (λ p : C ⟦ b, a ⟧, f = p) (idpath f)
                 (id_right f)) (id_left f))
           (is_inverse_in_precat2 gis))
        (assoc' f (is_z_isomorphism_mor gis) g)))
 
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
gis: is_z_isomorphism g
pb: Pullback f g
PullbackPr1 pb
· PullbackArrow pb b (identity b)
    (f · is_z_isomorphism_mor gis)
    (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
       (f · is_z_isomorphism_mor gis · g)
       (f · (is_z_isomorphism_mor gis · g))
       (λ p : C ⟦ b, a ⟧, identity b · f = p)
       (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ a, a ⟧)
          (is_z_isomorphism_mor gis · g) (identity a)
          (λ p : C ⟦ a, a ⟧, identity b · f = f · p)
          (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
             (identity b · f) f
             (λ p : C ⟦ b, a ⟧, p = f · identity a)
             (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
                (f · identity a) f
                (λ p : C ⟦ b, a ⟧, f = p) (idpath f)
                (id_right f)) (id_left f))
          (is_inverse_in_precat2 gis))
       (assoc' f (is_z_isomorphism_mor gis) g)) =
identity pb
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
gis: is_z_isomorphism g
pb: Pullback f g
PullbackArrow pb b (identity b)
  (f · is_z_isomorphism_mor gis)
  (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
     (f · is_z_isomorphism_mor gis · g)
     (f · (is_z_isomorphism_mor gis · g))
     (λ p : C ⟦ b, a ⟧, identity b · f = p)
     (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ a, a ⟧)
        (is_z_isomorphism_mor gis · g) (identity a)
        (λ p : C ⟦ a, a ⟧, identity b · f = f · p)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
           (identity b · f) f
           (λ p : C ⟦ b, a ⟧, p = f · identity a)
           (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
              (f · identity a) f
              (λ p : C ⟦ b, a ⟧, f = p) (idpath f)
              (id_right f)) (id_left f))
        (is_inverse_in_precat2 gis))
     (assoc' f (is_z_isomorphism_mor gis) g))
· PullbackPr1 pb = identity b

    
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
gis: is_z_isomorphism g
pb: Pullback f g
PullbackPr1 pb
· PullbackArrow pb b (identity b)
    (f · is_z_isomorphism_mor gis)
    (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
       (f · is_z_isomorphism_mor gis · g)
       (f · (is_z_isomorphism_mor gis · g))
       (λ p : C ⟦ b, a ⟧, identity b · f = p)
       (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ a, a ⟧)
          (is_z_isomorphism_mor gis · g) (identity a)
          (λ p : C ⟦ a, a ⟧, identity b · f = f · p)
          (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
             (identity b · f) f
             (λ p : C ⟦ b, a ⟧, p = f · identity a)
             (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
                (f · identity a) f
                (λ p : C ⟦ b, a ⟧, f = p) (idpath f)
                (id_right f)) (id_left f))
          (is_inverse_in_precat2 gis))
       (assoc' f (is_z_isomorphism_mor gis) g)) =
identity pb
 
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
gis: is_z_isomorphism g
pb: Pullback f g
identity pb =
PullbackPr1 pb
· PullbackArrow pb b (identity b)
    (f · is_z_isomorphism_mor gis)
    (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
       (f · is_z_isomorphism_mor gis · g)
       (f · (is_z_isomorphism_mor gis · g))
       (λ p : C ⟦ b, a ⟧, identity b · f = p)
       (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ a, a ⟧)
          (is_z_isomorphism_mor gis · g) (identity a)
          (λ p : C ⟦ a, a ⟧, identity b · f = f · p)
          (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
             (identity b · f) f
             (λ p : C ⟦ b, a ⟧, p = f · identity a)
             (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
                (f · identity a) f
                (λ p : C ⟦ b, a ⟧, f = p) (idpath f)
                (id_right f)) (id_left f))
          (is_inverse_in_precat2 gis))
       (assoc' f (is_z_isomorphism_mor gis) g))

      
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
gis: is_z_isomorphism g
pb: Pullback f g
PullbackPr1 pb
· PullbackArrow pb b (identity b)
    (f · is_z_isomorphism_mor gis)
    (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
       (f · is_z_isomorphism_mor gis · g)
       (f · (is_z_isomorphism_mor gis · g))
       (λ p : C ⟦ b, a ⟧, identity b · f = p)
       (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ a, a ⟧)
          (is_z_isomorphism_mor gis · g) (identity a)
          (λ p : C ⟦ a, a ⟧, identity b · f = f · p)
          (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
             (identity b · f) f
             (λ p : C ⟦ b, a ⟧, p = f · identity a)
             (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
                (f · identity a) f
                (λ p : C ⟦ b, a ⟧, f = p) (idpath f)
                (id_right f)) (id_left f))
          (is_inverse_in_precat2 gis))
       (assoc' f (is_z_isomorphism_mor gis) g))
· PullbackPr1 pb = PullbackPr1 pb
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
gis: is_z_isomorphism g
pb: Pullback f g
PullbackPr1 pb
· PullbackArrow pb b (identity b)
    (f · is_z_isomorphism_mor gis)
    (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
       (f · is_z_isomorphism_mor gis · g)
       (f · (is_z_isomorphism_mor gis · g))
       (λ p : C ⟦ b, a ⟧, identity b · f = p)
       (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ a, a ⟧)
          (is_z_isomorphism_mor gis · g) (identity a)
          (λ p : C ⟦ a, a ⟧, identity b · f = f · p)
          (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
             (identity b · f) f
             (λ p : C ⟦ b, a ⟧, p = f · identity a)
             (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
                (f · identity a) f
                (λ p : C ⟦ b, a ⟧, f = p) (idpath f)
                (id_right f)) (id_left f))
          (is_inverse_in_precat2 gis))
       (assoc' f (is_z_isomorphism_mor gis) g))
· PullbackPr2 pb = PullbackPr2 pb

      
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
gis: is_z_isomorphism g
pb: Pullback f g
PullbackPr1 pb
· PullbackArrow pb b (identity b)
    (f · is_z_isomorphism_mor gis)
    (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
       (f · is_z_isomorphism_mor gis · g)
       (f · (is_z_isomorphism_mor gis · g))
       (λ p : C ⟦ b, a ⟧, identity b · f = p)
       (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ a, a ⟧)
          (is_z_isomorphism_mor gis · g) (identity a)
          (λ p : C ⟦ a, a ⟧, identity b · f = f · p)
          (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
             (identity b · f) f
             (λ p : C ⟦ b, a ⟧, p = f · identity a)
             (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
                (f · identity a) f
                (λ p : C ⟦ b, a ⟧, f = p) (idpath f)
                (id_right f)) (id_left f))
          (is_inverse_in_precat2 gis))
       (assoc' f (is_z_isomorphism_mor gis) g))
· PullbackPr1 pb = PullbackPr1 pb
 now rewrite
          (assoc' (PullbackPr1 pb)),
          PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1,
          id_right.
      
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
gis: is_z_isomorphism g
pb: Pullback f g
PullbackPr1 pb
· PullbackArrow pb b (identity b)
    (f · is_z_isomorphism_mor gis)
    (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
       (f · is_z_isomorphism_mor gis · g)
       (f · (is_z_isomorphism_mor gis · g))
       (λ p : C ⟦ b, a ⟧, identity b · f = p)
       (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ a, a ⟧)
          (is_z_isomorphism_mor gis · g) (identity a)
          (λ p : C ⟦ a, a ⟧, identity b · f = f · p)
          (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
             (identity b · f) f
             (λ p : C ⟦ b, a ⟧, p = f · identity a)
             (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
                (f · identity a) f
                (λ p : C ⟦ b, a ⟧, f = p) (idpath f)
                (id_right f)) (id_left f))
          (is_inverse_in_precat2 gis))
       (assoc' f (is_z_isomorphism_mor gis) g))
· PullbackPr2 pb = PullbackPr2 pb
 now rewrite
          (assoc' (PullbackPr1 pb)),
          PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2,
          assoc,
          PullbackSqrCommutes,
          assoc',
          (is_inverse_in_precat1
          (is_z_isomorphism_is_inverse_in_precat
            gis)),
          id_right.
    
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
gis: is_z_isomorphism g
pb: Pullback f g
PullbackArrow pb b (identity b)
  (f · is_z_isomorphism_mor gis)
  (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
     (f · is_z_isomorphism_mor gis · g)
     (f · (is_z_isomorphism_mor gis · g))
     (λ p : C ⟦ b, a ⟧, identity b · f = p)
     (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ a, a ⟧)
        (is_z_isomorphism_mor gis · g) (identity a)
        (λ p : C ⟦ a, a ⟧, identity b · f = f · p)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
           (identity b · f) f
           (λ p : C ⟦ b, a ⟧, p = f · identity a)
           (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ b, a ⟧)
              (f · identity a) f
              (λ p : C ⟦ b, a ⟧, f = p) (idpath f)
              (id_right f)) (id_left f))
        (is_inverse_in_precat2 gis))
     (assoc' f (is_z_isomorphism_mor gis) g))
· PullbackPr1 pb = identity b
 use PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1.
Defined. (* with ample room for opacification *)

(*same with the other map*)

C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
fis: is_z_isomorphism f
pb: Pullback f g
is_z_isomorphism (PullbackPr2 pb)


C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
fis: is_z_isomorphism f
pb: Pullback f g
is_z_isomorphism (PullbackPr2 pb)

  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
fis: is_z_isomorphism f
pb: Pullback f g
is_z_isomorphism f

  exact fis.
Defined.

End pb_of_ziso.

(* reformulation of [isPullback_z_iso_of_morphisms] with data packaged in Pullback*)

C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
pb: Pullback f g
b', pb': C
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ pb', pb ⟧
h: C ⟦ pb', b' ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h · i = i' · PullbackPr1 pb
Pullback (i · f) g


C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
pb: Pullback f g
b', pb': C
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ pb', pb ⟧
h: C ⟦ pb', b' ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h · i = i' · PullbackPr1 pb
Pullback (i · f) g

  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
pb: Pullback f g
b', pb': C
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ pb', pb ⟧
h: C ⟦ pb', b' ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h · i = i' · PullbackPr1 pb
h · (i · f) = i' · PullbackPr2 pb · g
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
pb: Pullback f g
b', pb': C
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ pb', pb ⟧
h: C ⟦ pb', b' ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h · i = i' · PullbackPr1 pb
H': h · (i · f) = i' · PullbackPr2 pb · g
Pullback (i · f) g
 
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
pb: Pullback f g
b', pb': C
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ pb', pb ⟧
h: C ⟦ pb', b' ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h · i = i' · PullbackPr1 pb
h · (i · f) = i' · PullbackPr2 pb · g

    
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
pb: Pullback f g
b', pb': C
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ pb', pb ⟧
h: C ⟦ pb', b' ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h · i = i' · PullbackPr1 pb
i' · (PullbackPr1 pb · f) = i' · (PullbackPr2 pb · g)

    
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
pb: Pullback f g
b', pb': C
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ pb', pb ⟧
h: C ⟦ pb', b' ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h · i = i' · PullbackPr1 pb
PullbackPr1 pb · f = PullbackPr2 pb · g

    use PullbackSqrCommutes.
  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
pb: Pullback f g
b', pb': C
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ pb', pb ⟧
h: C ⟦ pb', b' ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h · i = i' · PullbackPr1 pb
H': h · (i · f) = i' · PullbackPr2 pb · g
Pullback (i · f) g

  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
pb: Pullback f g
b', pb': C
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ pb', pb ⟧
h: C ⟦ pb', b' ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h · i = i' · PullbackPr1 pb
H': h · (i · f) = i' · PullbackPr2 pb · g
isPullback H'

  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
pb: Pullback f g
b', pb': C
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ pb', pb ⟧
h: C ⟦ pb', b' ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h · i = i' · PullbackPr1 pb
H': h · (i · f) = i' · PullbackPr2 pb · g
is_z_isomorphism i
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
pb: Pullback f g
b', pb': C
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ pb', pb ⟧
h: C ⟦ pb', b' ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h · i = i' · PullbackPr1 pb
H': h · (i · f) = i' · PullbackPr2 pb · g
is_z_isomorphism i'
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
pb: Pullback f g
b', pb': C
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ pb', pb ⟧
h: C ⟦ pb', b' ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h · i = i' · PullbackPr1 pb
H': h · (i · f) = i' · PullbackPr2 pb · g
h · i = i' · PullbackPr1 pb
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
pb: Pullback f g
b', pb': C
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ pb', pb ⟧
h: C ⟦ pb', b' ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h · i = i' · PullbackPr1 pb
H': h · (i · f) = i' · PullbackPr2 pb · g
isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes pb)

  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
pb: Pullback f g
b', pb': C
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ pb', pb ⟧
h: C ⟦ pb', b' ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h · i = i' · PullbackPr1 pb
H': h · (i · f) = i' · PullbackPr2 pb · g
is_z_isomorphism i
 exact xi.
  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
pb: Pullback f g
b', pb': C
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ pb', pb ⟧
h: C ⟦ pb', b' ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h · i = i' · PullbackPr1 pb
H': h · (i · f) = i' · PullbackPr2 pb · g
is_z_isomorphism i'
 exact xi'.
  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
pb: Pullback f g
b', pb': C
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ pb', pb ⟧
h: C ⟦ pb', b' ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h · i = i' · PullbackPr1 pb
H': h · (i · f) = i' · PullbackPr2 pb · g
h · i = i' · PullbackPr1 pb
 exact Hi.
  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
pb: Pullback f g
b', pb': C
i: C ⟦ b', b ⟧
i': C ⟦ pb', pb ⟧
h: C ⟦ pb', b' ⟧
xi: is_z_isomorphism i
xi': is_z_isomorphism i'
Hi: h · i = i' · PullbackPr1 pb
H': h · (i · f) = i' · PullbackPr2 pb · g
isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes pb)
 use isPullback_Pullback.
Defined.

(** * A fully faithful functor reflects limits *)
Section functor_on_square.

Context (C D : category) (F : functor C D).

Section isPullback_if_functor_on_square_is.

  Context (Fff : fully_faithful F)
    {a b c d : C}
    {f : C ⟦b, a⟧} {g : C ⟦c, a⟧} {h : C⟦d, b⟧} {k : C⟦d,c⟧}
    (H : h · f = k · g).


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
# F h · # F f = # F k · # F g


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
# F h · # F f = # F k · # F g

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
# F h · # F f = # F (k · g)

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
# F h · # F f = # F (h · f)

  apply (! functor_comp _ _ _ ).
Qed.

Context (X : isPullback functor_on_square).


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
isPullback H


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
isPullback H

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
∏ (e : C) (h0 : C ⟦ e, b ⟧) (k0 : C ⟦ e, c ⟧),
h0 · f = k0 · g
→ ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · h = h0 × hk · k = k0

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
∃! hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · h = x × hk · k = y

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
∃! hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · h = x × hk · k = y

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
∃! hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · h = x × hk · k = y

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
∃! hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · h = x × hk · k = y

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
∃! hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · h = x × hk · k = y

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
HFxFy:= pr21 TH: (λ hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
 hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y)
  (pr11 TH)
∃! hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · h = x × hk · k = y
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
HFxFy:= pr21 TH: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y
∃! hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · h = x × hk · k = y

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
HFxFy:= pr21 TH: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y
xy:= fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
∃! hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · h = x × hk · k = y

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
HFxFy:= pr21 TH: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y
xy:= fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · h = x × hk · k = y
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
HFxFy:= pr21 TH: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y
xy:= fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
(λ cntr : ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · h = x × hk · k = y,
 ∏ t : ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · h = x × hk · k = y,
 t = cntr) ?pr1

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
HFxFy:= pr21 TH: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y
xy:= fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · h = x × hk · k = y
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
HFxFy:= pr21 TH: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y
xy:= fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
xy · h = x × xy · k = y

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
HFxFy:= pr21 TH: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y
xy:= fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
t:= pr1 HFxFy: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
xy · h = x × xy · k = y

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
HFxFy:= pr21 TH: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y
xy:= fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
t:= pr1 HFxFy: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
p:= pr2 HFxFy: (λ _ : pr11 TH · # F h = # F x,
 pr11 TH · # F k = # F y) 
  (pr1 HFxFy)
xy · h = x × xy · k = y

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
HFxFy:= pr21 TH: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y
xy:= fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
t:= pr1 HFxFy: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
p:= pr2 HFxFy: (λ _ : pr11 TH · # F h = # F x,
 pr11 TH · # F k = # F y) 
  (pr1 HFxFy)
xy · h = x
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
HFxFy:= pr21 TH: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y
xy:= fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
t:= pr1 HFxFy: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
p:= pr2 HFxFy: (λ _ : pr11 TH · # F h = # F x,
 pr11 TH · # F k = # F y) 
  (pr1 HFxFy)
xy · k = y

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
HFxFy:= pr21 TH: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y
xy:= fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
t:= pr1 HFxFy: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
p:= pr2 HFxFy: (λ _ : pr11 TH · # F h = # F x,
 pr11 TH · # F k = # F y) 
  (pr1 HFxFy)
xy · h = x

 pr11 TH · # F k = # F y) 
  (pr1 HFxFy)
make_weq # F (Fff e b) (xy · h) =
make_weq # F (Fff e b) x

C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧

e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧

T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)

 pr11 TH · # F k = # F y) 
  (pr1 HFxFy)
XX: ∏ y : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
make_weq # F (Fff e d)
  (invmap (make_weq # F (Fff e d)) y) = y
# F xy · # F h = # F x

F: C ⟶ D

a, b, c, d: C

 pr11 TH · # F k = # F y) 
  (pr1 HFxFy)

# F (invmap (make_weq # F (Fff e d)) y) = y
# F xy · # F h = # F x

hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
HFxFy:= pr21 TH: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y
xy:= fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
t:= pr1 HFxFy: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
p:= pr2 HFxFy: (λ _ : pr11 TH · # F h = # F x,
 pr11 TH · # F k = # F y) 
  (pr1 HFxFy)
xy · k = y
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
HFxFy:= pr21 TH: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y
xy:= fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
t:= pr1 HFxFy: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
p:= pr2 HFxFy: (λ _ : pr11 TH · # F h = # F x,
 pr11 TH · # F k = # F y) 
  (pr1 HFxFy)
make_weq # F (Fff e c) (xy · k) =
make_weq # F (Fff e c) y

a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧

  (pr1 HFxFy)

# F (invmap (make_weq # F (Fff e d)) y) = y
?b = # F y

  (pr1 HFxFy)

# F (invmap (make_weq # F (Fff e d)) y) = y
XXX: # F (invmap (make_weq # F (Fff e d)) FxFy) =
FxFy
# F (fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy) = ?f'

F: C ⟶ D

× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y

 pr11 TH · # F k = # F y)

# F (invmap (make_weq # F (Fff e d)) y) = y

C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
HFxFy:= pr21 TH: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y
xy:= fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
t:= pr1 HFxFy: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
p:= pr2 HFxFy: (λ _ : pr11 TH · # F h = # F x,
 pr11 TH · # F k = # F y) 
  (pr1 HFxFy)
XX: ∏ y : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
# F (invmap (make_weq # F (Fff e d)) y) = y
FxFy · # F k = # F y
 exact p.
  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
HFxFy:= pr21 TH: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y
xy:= fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
(λ cntr : ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · h = x × hk · k = y,
 ∏ t : ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · h = x × hk · k = y,
 t = cntr)
  (xy,,
   (let t := pr1 HFxFy in
    let p := pr2 HFxFy in
    invmaponpathsweq (make_weq # F (Fff e b)) (xy · h)
      x
      (internal_paths_rew_r (D ⟦ F e, F b ⟧)
         (# F (xy · h)) (# F xy · # F h)
         (λ p0 : D ⟦ F e, F b ⟧, p0 = # F x)
         (let XX :=
            homotweqinvweq (make_weq # F (Fff e d)) in
          (cancel_postcomposition
             (# F
                (fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy))
             FxFy (# F h)
             (let XXX := XX FxFy in XX FxFy) @ t
           :
           # F (fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy)
           · # F h = # F x)
          :
          # F xy · # F h = # F x)
         (functor_comp F xy h)
       :
       make_weq # F (Fff e b) (xy · h) =
       make_weq # F (Fff e b) x),,
    invmaponpathsweq (make_weq # F (Fff e c)) (xy · k)
      y
      (internal_paths_rew_r (D ⟦ F e, F c ⟧)
         (# F (xy · k)) (# F xy · # F k)
         (λ p0 : D ⟦ F e, F c ⟧, p0 = # F y)
         (let XX :=
            homotweqinvweq (make_weq # F (Fff e d)) in
          (cancel_postcomposition
             (# F
                (fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy))
             FxFy (# F k)
             (let XXX := XX FxFy in XX FxFy) @ p
           :
           # F (fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy)
           · # F k = # F y)
          :
          # F xy · # F k = # F y)
         (functor_comp F xy k)
       :
       make_weq # F (Fff e c) (xy · k) =
       make_weq # F (Fff e c) y)))
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
HFxFy:= pr21 TH: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y
xy:= fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
∏ t : ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · h = x × hk · k = y,
t =
xy,,
invmaponpathsweq (make_weq # F (Fff e b)) (xy · h) x
  (internal_paths_rew_r (D ⟦ F e, F b ⟧)
     (# F (xy · h)) (# F xy · # F h)
     (λ p : D ⟦ F e, F b ⟧, p = # F x)
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (# F (fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy))
        FxFy (# F h)
        (homotweqinvweq (make_weq # F (Fff e d)) FxFy) @
      pr1 HFxFy) (functor_comp F xy h)),,
invmaponpathsweq (make_weq # F (Fff e c)) (xy · k) y
  (internal_paths_rew_r (D ⟦ F e, F c ⟧)
     (# F (xy · k)) (# F xy · # F k)
     (λ p : D ⟦ F e, F c ⟧, p = # F y)
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (# F (fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy))
        FxFy (# F k)
        (homotweqinvweq (make_weq # F (Fff e d)) FxFy) @
      pr2 HFxFy) (functor_comp F xy k))

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
HFxFy:= pr21 TH: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y
xy:= fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
t: ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · h = x × hk · k = y
t =
xy,,
invmaponpathsweq (make_weq # F (Fff e b)) (xy · h) x
  (internal_paths_rew_r (D ⟦ F e, F b ⟧)
     (# F (xy · h)) (# F xy · # F h)
     (λ p : D ⟦ F e, F b ⟧, p = # F x)
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (# F (fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy))
        FxFy (# F h)
        (homotweqinvweq (make_weq # F (Fff e d)) FxFy) @
      pr1 HFxFy) (functor_comp F xy h)),,
invmaponpathsweq (make_weq # F (Fff e c)) (xy · k) y
  (internal_paths_rew_r (D ⟦ F e, F c ⟧)
     (# F (xy · k)) (# F xy · # F k)
     (λ p : D ⟦ F e, F c ⟧, p = # F y)
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (# F (fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy))
        FxFy (# F k)
        (homotweqinvweq (make_weq # F (Fff e d)) FxFy) @
      pr2 HFxFy) (functor_comp F xy k))

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
HFxFy:= pr21 TH: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y
xy:= fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
t: ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · h = x × hk · k = y
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, x0 · h = x × x0 · k = y)
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
HFxFy:= pr21 TH: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y
xy:= fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
t: ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · h = x × hk · k = y
pr1 t =
pr1
  (xy,,
   invmaponpathsweq (make_weq # F (Fff e b)) 
     (xy · h) x
     (internal_paths_rew_r 
        (D ⟦ F e, F b ⟧) 
        (# F (xy · h)) (# F xy · # F h)
        (λ p : D ⟦ F e, F b ⟧, p = # F x)
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (# F (fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy))
           FxFy (# F h)
           (homotweqinvweq 
              (make_weq # F (Fff e d)) FxFy) @
         pr1 HFxFy) (functor_comp F xy h)),,
   invmaponpathsweq (make_weq # F (Fff e c)) 
     (xy · k) y
     (internal_paths_rew_r 
        (D ⟦ F e, F c ⟧) 
        (# F (xy · k)) (# F xy · # F k)
        (λ p : D ⟦ F e, F c ⟧, p = # F y)
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (# F (fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy))
           FxFy (# F k)
           (homotweqinvweq 
              (make_weq # F (Fff e d)) FxFy) @
         pr2 HFxFy) (functor_comp F xy k)))

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
HFxFy:= pr21 TH: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y
xy:= fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
t: ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · h = x × hk · k = y
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, x0 · h = x × x0 · k = y)
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
HFxFy:= pr21 TH: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y
xy:= fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
t: ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · h = x × hk · k = y
kkkk: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
isaprop (kkkk · h = x × kkkk · k = y)
 apply isapropdirprod; apply C.
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
HFxFy:= pr21 TH: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y
xy:= fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
t: ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · h = x × hk · k = y
pr1 t =
pr1
  (xy,,
   invmaponpathsweq (make_weq # F (Fff e b)) (xy · h)
     x
     (internal_paths_rew_r (D ⟦ F e, F b ⟧)
        (# F (xy · h)) (# F xy · # F h)
        (λ p : D ⟦ F e, F b ⟧, p = # F x)
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (# F (fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy))
           FxFy (# F h)
           (homotweqinvweq (make_weq # F (Fff e d))
              FxFy) @ pr1 HFxFy) (functor_comp F xy h)),,
   invmaponpathsweq (make_weq # F (Fff e c)) (xy · k)
     y
     (internal_paths_rew_r (D ⟦ F e, F c ⟧)
        (# F (xy · k)) (# F xy · # F k)
        (λ p : D ⟦ F e, F c ⟧, p = # F y)
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (# F (fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy))
           FxFy (# F k)
           (homotweqinvweq (make_weq # F (Fff e d))
              FxFy) @ pr2 HFxFy) (functor_comp F xy k)))
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
HFxFy:= pr21 TH: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y
xy:= fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
t: ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · h = x × hk · k = y
pr1 t = xy

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧

k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
HFxFy:= pr21 TH: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y
xy:= fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
t: ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · h = x × hk · k = y
make_weq # F (Fff e d) (pr1 t) =
make_weq # F (Fff e d) xy

F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧

HFxFy:= pr21 TH: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y

t: ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · h = x × hk · k = y
# F (pr1 t) = # F xy

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
HFxFy:= pr21 TH: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y
xy:= fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
t: ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · h = x × hk · k = y
# F (pr1 t) =
# F (fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy)

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
HFxFy:= pr21 TH: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y
xy:= fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
t: ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · h = x × hk · k = y
XX: ∏ y : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
make_weq # F (Fff e d)
  (invmap (make_weq # F (Fff e d)) y) = y
# F (pr1 t) =
# F (fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy)
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧

k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
HFxFy:= pr21 TH: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y
xy:= fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
t: ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · h = x × hk · k = y
XX: ∏ y : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
# F (invmap (make_weq # F (Fff e d)) y) = y
# F (pr1 t) =
# F (fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy)

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧

H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,

FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
HFxFy:= pr21 TH: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y
xy:= fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
t: ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · h = x × hk · k = y
XX: ∏ y : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
# F (invmap (make_weq # F (Fff e d)) y) = y
# F (fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy) =
# F (pr1 t)

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
HFxFy:= pr21 TH: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y
xy:= fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
t: ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · h = x × hk · k = y
XX: ∏ y : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
# F (invmap (make_weq # F (Fff e d)) y) = y
# F (fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy) = ?b
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
HFxFy:= pr21 TH: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y
xy:= fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
t: ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · h = x × hk · k = y
XX: ∏ y : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
# F (invmap (make_weq # F (Fff e d)) y) = y
?b = # F (pr1 t)

f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback functor_on_square
e: C
x: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
y: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hxy: x · f = y · g
T:= maponpaths # F Hxy: # F (x · f) = # F (y · g)
T':= ! functor_comp F x f @ T @ functor_comp F y g: # F x · # F f = # F y · # F g
TH:= X (F e) (# F x) (# F y) T': ∃! hk : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = # F x × hk · # F k = # F y
FxFy:= pr11 TH: D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧
HFxFy:= pr21 TH: pr11 TH · # F h = # F x
× pr11 TH · # F k = # F y
xy:= fully_faithful_inv_hom Fff e d FxFy: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
t: ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · h = x × hk · k = y
XX: ∏ y : D ⟦ F e, F d ⟧,
# F (invmap (make_weq # F (Fff e d)) y) = y
H1: pr1 t · h = x
H2: pr1 t · k = y
X2: # F (pr1 t · k) = # F y
# F (pr1 t · k) = # F y

        apply X2.
Defined. (* with ample room for opacification *)

End isPullback_if_functor_on_square_is.

(** * A fully faithful and essentially surjective functor preserves pullbacks *)
Section ff_es_functor_preserves_pb.

  Context (Fff : fully_faithful F) (Fes : essentially_surjective F).

Let FF a b := (weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b).

Context {a b c d : C}
  {f : C ⟦b, a⟧} {g : C ⟦c, a⟧} {h : C⟦d, b⟧} {k : C⟦d,c⟧}
  (H : h · f = k · g)
  (X : isPullback H).


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
isPullback (functor_on_square H)


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
isPullback (functor_on_square H)

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
∃! hk : D ⟦ e, F d ⟧, hk · # F h = x × hk · # F k = y

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
isaprop
  (∃! hk : D ⟦ e, F d ⟧,
   hk · # F h = x × hk · # F k = y)
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
(∑ a : C, z_iso (F a) e)
→ ∃! hk : D ⟦ e, F d ⟧,
  hk · # F h = x × hk · # F k = y

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
(∑ a : C, z_iso (F a) e)
→ ∃! hk : D ⟦ e, F d ⟧,
  hk · # F h = x × hk · # F k = y

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
∃! hk : D ⟦ e, F d ⟧, hk · # F h = x × hk · # F k = y

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
∃! hk : D ⟦ e, F d ⟧, hk · # F h = x × hk · # F k = y

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧

g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
∃! hk : D ⟦ e, F d ⟧, hk · # F h = x × hk · # F k = y

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧

f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
∃! hk : D ⟦ e, F d ⟧, hk · # F h = x × hk · # F k = y

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧

f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧

k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
e'b · f = e'c · g

F: C ⟶ D

e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
∃! hk : D ⟦ e, F d ⟧, hk · # F h = x × hk · # F k = y

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F

f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧

k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧

e'b · f = e'c · g
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
FF e' a (e'b · f) = FF e' a (e'c · g)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧

k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g

x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧

Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C

e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
# F (e'b · f) = # F (e'c · g)

F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧

k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧

e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧

# F (invmap (FF e' b) (i · x) · f) = # F (e'c · g)
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧

k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
# F (invmap (FF e' b) (i · x) · f) =
# F (invmap (FF e' c) (i · y) · g)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧

e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
# F (invmap (FF e' b) (i · x)) · # F f =
# F (invmap (FF e' c) (i · y)) · # F g

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧

k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
T:= homotweqinvweq (FF e' b): ∏ y : D ⟦ F e', F b ⟧,
FF e' b (invmap (FF e' b) y) = y
# F (invmap (FF e' b) (i · x)) · # F f =
# F (invmap (FF e' c) (i · y)) · # F g
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F

FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧

k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧

x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧

e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧

# F (invmap (FF e' b) y) = y
# F (invmap (FF e' b) (i · x)) · # F f =
# F (invmap (FF e' c) (i · y)) · # F g

C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧

k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧

FF e' c (invmap (FF e' c) y) = y
i · x · # F f = # F (invmap (FF e' c) (i · y)) · # F g
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
T:= homotweqinvweq (FF e' c): ∏ y : D ⟦ F e', F c ⟧,
# F (invmap (FF e' c) y) = y
i · x · # F f = # F (invmap (FF e' c) (i · y)) · # F g

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
i · x · # F f = i · y · # F g

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
i · (x · # F f) = i · (y · # F g)
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
i · (y · # F g) = i · (y · # F g)
 apply idpath.
  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
∃! hk : D ⟦ e, F d ⟧, hk · # F h = x × hk · # F k = y


  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', Pb ⟧
∃! hk : D ⟦ e, F d ⟧, hk · # F h = x × hk · # F k = y

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', Pb ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX
· PullbackPr1 Pb = e'b
∃! hk : D ⟦ e, F d ⟧, hk · # F h = x × hk · # F k = y

· PullbackPr1 Pb = e'b

· PullbackPr2 Pb = e'c
∃! hk : D ⟦ e, F d ⟧, hk · # F h = x × hk · # F k = y

g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧

k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧

XX: e'b · f = e'c · g

umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
∃! hk : D ⟦ e, F d ⟧, hk · # F h = x × hk · # F k = y

C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧

XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧

umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
(λ cntr : ∑ hk : D ⟦ e, F d ⟧,
          hk · # F h = x × hk · # F k = y,
 ∏
 t : ∑ hk : D ⟦ e, F d ⟧,
     hk · # F h = x × hk · # F k = y, 
 t = cntr) ?pr1

inv_from_z_iso i · # F umor · # F h = x
× inv_from_z_iso i · # F umor · # F k = y

umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
# F (umor · h) = i · x

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
invweq (FF e' b) (# F (umor · h)) =
invweq (FF e' b) (i · x)

F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
invmap (FF e' b) (# F (umor · h)) =
invmap (FF e' b) (i · x)

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
TX:= homotinvweqweq (FF e' b): ∏ x : C ⟦ e', b ⟧,
invmap (FF e' b) (FF e' b x) = x
invmap (FF e' b) (# F (umor · h)) =
invmap (FF e' b) (i · x)
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧

XX: e'b · f = e'c · g

umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
TX:= homotinvweqweq (FF e' b): ∏ x : C ⟦ e', b ⟧, invmap (FF e' b) (# F x) = x
invmap (FF e' b) (# F (umor · h)) =
invmap (FF e' b) (i · x)

F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F

umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
umor · h = invmap (FF e' b) (i · x)

F: C ⟶ D

FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧

f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧

k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
e'b = invmap (FF e' b) (i · x)
 apply idpath.
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
inv_from_z_iso i · # F umor · # F k = y

C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
