g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
(λ cntr : ∑ hk : D ⟦ e, F d ⟧,
          hk · # F h = x × hk · # F k = y,
 ∏
 t : ∑ hk : D ⟦ e, F d ⟧,
     hk · # F h = x × hk · # F k = y, t = cntr)
  (inv_from_z_iso i · # F umor,,
   internal_paths_rew (D ⟦ e, F b ⟧)
     (inv_from_z_iso i · (# F umor · # F h))
     (λ p : D ⟦ e, F b ⟧, p = x)
     (z_iso_inv_on_right (F e') e (F b) i x
        (# F umor · # F h)
        (internal_paths_rew (D ⟦ F e', F b ⟧)
           (# F (umor · h))
           (λ p : D ⟦ F e', F b ⟧, p = i · x)
           (invmaponpathsweq (invweq (FF e' b))
              (# F (umor · h)) (i · x)
              ((let TX := homotinvweqweq (FF e' b) in
                internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ e', b ⟧)
                  (invmap (FF e' b) (# F (umor · h)))
                  (umor · h)
                  (λ p : C ⟦ e', b ⟧,
                   p = invmap (FF e' b) (i · x))
                  (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ e', b ⟧)
                     (PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX
                      · h) e'b
                     (λ p : C ⟦ e', b ⟧,
                      p = invmap (FF e' b) (i · x))
                     (idpath
                        (invmap (FF e' b) (i · x)))
                     umorPr1
                   :
                   umor · h = invmap (FF e' b) (i · x))
                  (TX (umor · h)))
               :
               invweq (FF e' b) (# F (umor · h)) =
               invweq (FF e' b) (i · x)))
           (# F umor · # F h) (functor_comp F umor h)))
     (inv_from_z_iso i · # F umor · # F h)
     (assoc (inv_from_z_iso i) (# F umor) (# F h)),,
   internal_paths_rew (D ⟦ e, F c ⟧)
     (inv_from_z_iso i · (# F umor · # F k))
     (λ p : D ⟦ e, F c ⟧, p = y)
     (z_iso_inv_on_right (F e') e (F c) i y
        (# F umor · # F k)
        (internal_paths_rew (D ⟦ F e', F c ⟧)
           (# F (umor · k))
           (λ p : D ⟦ F e', F c ⟧, p = i · y)
           (invmaponpathsweq (invweq (FF e' c))
              (# F (umor · k)) (i · y)
              ((let TX := homotinvweqweq (FF e' c) in
                internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ e', c ⟧)
                  (invmap (FF e' c) (# F (umor · k)))
                  (umor · k)
                  (λ p : C ⟦ e', c ⟧,
                   p = invmap (FF e' c) (i · y))
                  (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ e', c ⟧)
                     (PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX
                      · k) e'c
                     (λ p : C ⟦ e', c ⟧,
                      p = invmap (FF e' c) (i · y))
                     (idpath
                        (invmap (FF e' c) (i · y)))
                     umorPr2
                   :
                   umor · k = invmap (FF e' c) (i · y))
                  (TX (umor · k)))
               :
               invweq (FF e' c) (# F (umor · k)) =
               invweq (FF e' c) (i · y)))
           (# F umor · # F k) (functor_comp F umor k)))
     (inv_from_z_iso i · # F umor · # F k)
     (assoc (inv_from_z_iso i) (# F umor) (# F k)))
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
∏
t : ∑ hk : D ⟦ e, F d ⟧,
    hk · # F h = x × hk · # F k = y,
t =
inv_from_z_iso i · # F umor,,
internal_paths_rew (D ⟦ e, F b ⟧)
  (inv_from_z_iso i · (# F umor · # F h))
  (λ p : D ⟦ e, F b ⟧, p = x)
  (z_iso_inv_on_right (F e') e (F b) i x
     (# F umor · # F h)
     (internal_paths_rew (D ⟦ F e', F b ⟧)
        (# F (umor · h))
        (λ p : D ⟦ F e', F b ⟧, p = i · x)
        (invmaponpathsweq (invweq (FF e' b))
           (# F (umor · h)) (i · x)
           (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ e', b ⟧)
              (invmap (FF e' b) (# F (umor · h)))
              (umor · h)
              (λ p : C ⟦ e', b ⟧,
               p = invmap (FF e' b) (i · x))
              (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ e', b ⟧)
                 (PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h)
                 e'b
                 (λ p : C ⟦ e', b ⟧,
                  p = invmap (FF e' b) (i · x))
                 (idpath (invmap (FF e' b) (i · x)))
                 umorPr1)
              (homotinvweqweq (FF e' b) (umor · h))))
        (# F umor · # F h) (functor_comp F umor h)))
  (inv_from_z_iso i · # F umor · # F h)
  (assoc (inv_from_z_iso i) (# F umor) (# F h)),,
internal_paths_rew (D ⟦ e, F c ⟧)
  (inv_from_z_iso i · (# F umor · # F k))
  (λ p : D ⟦ e, F c ⟧, p = y)
  (z_iso_inv_on_right (F e') e (F c) i y
     (# F umor · # F k)
     (internal_paths_rew (D ⟦ F e', F c ⟧)
        (# F (umor · k))
        (λ p : D ⟦ F e', F c ⟧, p = i · y)
        (invmaponpathsweq (invweq (FF e' c))
           (# F (umor · k)) (i · y)
           (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ e', c ⟧)
              (invmap (FF e' c) (# F (umor · k)))
              (umor · k)
              (λ p : C ⟦ e', c ⟧,
               p = invmap (FF e' c) (i · y))
              (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ e', c ⟧)
                 (PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k)
                 e'c
                 (λ p : C ⟦ e', c ⟧,
                  p = invmap (FF e' c) (i · y))
                 (idpath (invmap (FF e' c) (i · y)))
                 umorPr2)
              (homotinvweqweq (FF e' c) (umor · k))))
        (# F umor · # F k) (functor_comp F umor k)))
  (inv_from_z_iso i · # F umor · # F k)
  (assoc (inv_from_z_iso i) (# F umor) (# F k))
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
t: ∑ hk : D ⟦ e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = x × hk · # F k = y
t =
inv_from_z_iso i · # F umor,,
internal_paths_rew (D ⟦ e, F b ⟧)
  (inv_from_z_iso i · (# F umor · # F h))
  (λ p : D ⟦ e, F b ⟧, p = x)
  (z_iso_inv_on_right (F e') e (F b) i x
     (# F umor · # F h)
     (internal_paths_rew (D ⟦ F e', F b ⟧)
        (# F (umor · h))
        (λ p : D ⟦ F e', F b ⟧, p = i · x)
        (invmaponpathsweq (invweq (FF e' b))
           (# F (umor · h)) (i · x)
           (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ e', b ⟧)
              (invmap (FF e' b) (# F (umor · h)))
              (umor · h)
              (λ p : C ⟦ e', b ⟧,
               p = invmap (FF e' b) (i · x))
              (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ e', b ⟧)
                 (PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h)
                 e'b
                 (λ p : C ⟦ e', b ⟧,
                  p = invmap (FF e' b) (i · x))
                 (idpath (invmap (FF e' b) (i · x)))
                 umorPr1)
              (homotinvweqweq (FF e' b) (umor · h))))
        (# F umor · # F h) (functor_comp F umor h)))
  (inv_from_z_iso i · # F umor · # F h)
  (assoc (inv_from_z_iso i) (# F umor) (# F h)),,
internal_paths_rew (D ⟦ e, F c ⟧)
  (inv_from_z_iso i · (# F umor · # F k))
  (λ p : D ⟦ e, F c ⟧, p = y)
  (z_iso_inv_on_right (F e') e (F c) i y
     (# F umor · # F k)
     (internal_paths_rew (D ⟦ F e', F c ⟧)
        (# F (umor · k))
        (λ p : D ⟦ F e', F c ⟧, p = i · y)
        (invmaponpathsweq (invweq (FF e' c))
           (# F (umor · k)) (i · y)
           (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ e', c ⟧)
              (invmap (FF e' c) (# F (umor · k)))
              (umor · k)
              (λ p : C ⟦ e', c ⟧,
               p = invmap (FF e' c) (i · y))
              (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ e', c ⟧)
                 (PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k)
                 e'c
                 (λ p : C ⟦ e', c ⟧,
                  p = invmap (FF e' c) (i · y))
                 (idpath (invmap (FF e' c) (i · y)))
                 umorPr2)
              (homotinvweqweq (FF e' c) (umor · k))))
        (# F umor · # F k) (functor_comp F umor k)))
  (inv_from_z_iso i · # F umor · # F k)
  (assoc (inv_from_z_iso i) (# F umor) (# F k))
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
t: ∑ hk : D ⟦ e, F d ⟧,
hk · # F h = x × hk · # F k = y
pr1 t = inv_from_z_iso i · # F umor

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
t: D ⟦ e, F d ⟧
Htx: t · # F h = x
Hty: t · # F k = y
t = inv_from_z_iso i · # F umor

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
t: D ⟦ e, F d ⟧
Htx: t · # F h = x
Hty: t · # F k = y
i · t = i · (inv_from_z_iso i · # F umor)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
t: D ⟦ e, F d ⟧
Htx: t · # F h = x
Hty: t · # F k = y
i · t = i · inv_from_z_iso i · # F umor
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
t: D ⟦ e, F d ⟧
Htx: t · # F h = x
Hty: t · # F k = y
i · t = identity (F e') · # F umor

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
t: D ⟦ e, F d ⟧
Htx: t · # F h = x
Hty: t · # F k = y
i · t = # F umor

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
t: D ⟦ e, F d ⟧
Htx: t · # F h = x
Hty: t · # F k = y
invweq (FF e' d) (i · t) = invweq (FF e' d) (# F umor)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
t: D ⟦ e, F d ⟧
Htx: t · # F h = x
Hty: t · # F k = y
invmap (FF e' d) (i · t) = invmap (FF e' d) (# F umor)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
t: D ⟦ e, F d ⟧
Htx: t · # F h = x
Hty: t · # F k = y
TX:= homotinvweqweq (FF e' d): ∏ x : C ⟦ e', d ⟧,
invmap (FF e' d) (FF e' d x) = x
invmap (FF e' d) (i · t) = invmap (FF e' d) (# F umor)
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
t: D ⟦ e, F d ⟧
Htx: t · # F h = x
Hty: t · # F k = y
TX:= homotinvweqweq (FF e' d): ∏ x : C ⟦ e', d ⟧, invmap (FF e' d) (# F x) = x
invmap (FF e' d) (i · t) = invmap (FF e' d) (# F umor)

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
t: D ⟦ e, F d ⟧
Htx: t · # F h = x
Hty: t · # F k = y
invmap (FF e' d) (i · t) = umor

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
t: D ⟦ e, F d ⟧
Htx: t · # F h = x
Hty: t · # F k = y
invmap (FF e' d) (i · t) · PullbackPr1 Pb = e'b
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧

XX: e'b · f = e'c · g

umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
t: D ⟦ e, F d ⟧
Htx: t · # F h = x
Hty: t · # F k = y
invmap (FF e' d) (i · t) · PullbackPr2 Pb = e'c

    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧

f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
t: D ⟦ e, F d ⟧
Htx: t · # F h = x
Hty: t · # F k = y
invmap (FF e' d) (i · t) · PullbackPr1 Pb = e'b
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
t: D ⟦ e, F d ⟧
Htx: t · # F h = x
Hty: t · # F k = y
FF e' b (invmap (FF e' d) (i · t) · PullbackPr1 Pb) =
FF e' b e'b

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
t: D ⟦ e, F d ⟧
Htx: t · # F h = x
Hty: t · # F k = y
TX:= homotweqinvweq (FF e' d): ∏ y : D ⟦ F e', F d ⟧,
FF e' d (invmap (FF e' d) y) = y
FF e' b (invmap (FF e' d) (i · t) · PullbackPr1 Pb) =
FF e' b e'b
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
t: D ⟦ e, F d ⟧
Htx: t · # F h = x
Hty: t · # F k = y
TX:= homotweqinvweq (FF e' d): ∏ y : D ⟦ F e', F d ⟧,
# F (invmap (FF e' d) y) = y
# F (invmap (FF e' d) (i · t) · h) = # F e'b

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧

k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g

e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧

XX: e'b · f = e'c · g

umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
t: D ⟦ e, F d ⟧
Htx: t · # F h = x
Hty: t · # F k = y
i · t · # F h = # F e'b

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧

umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
t: D ⟦ e, F d ⟧
Htx: t · # F h = x
Hty: t · # F k = y
i · (t · # F h) = # F e'b
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
t: D ⟦ e, F d ⟧
Htx: t · # F h = x
Hty: t · # F k = y
i · x = # F e'b

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
t: D ⟦ e, F d ⟧
Htx: t · # F h = x
Hty: t · # F k = y
i · x = # F (invmap (FF e' b) (i · x))

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧

XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
t: D ⟦ e, F d ⟧
Htx: t · # F h = x
Hty: t · # F k = y
TX:= homotweqinvweq (FF e' b): ∏ y : D ⟦ F e', F b ⟧,
FF e' b (invmap (FF e' b) y) = y
i · x = # F (invmap (FF e' b) (i · x))
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
t: D ⟦ e, F d ⟧
Htx: t · # F h = x
Hty: t · # F k = y
TX:= homotweqinvweq (FF e' b): ∏ y : D ⟦ F e', F b ⟧,
# F (invmap (FF e' b) y) = y
i · x = # F (invmap (FF e' b) (i · x))

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
t: D ⟦ e, F d ⟧
Htx: t · # F h = x
Hty: t · # F k = y
TX:= homotweqinvweq (FF e' b): ∏ y : D ⟦ F e', F b ⟧,
# F (invmap (FF e' b) y) = y
i · x = i · x
 apply idpath.
    
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
t: D ⟦ e, F d ⟧
Htx: t · # F h = x
Hty: t · # F k = y
invmap (FF e' d) (i · t) · PullbackPr2 Pb = e'c
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
t: D ⟦ e, F d ⟧
Htx: t · # F h = x
Hty: t · # F k = y
FF e' c (invmap (FF e' d) (i · t) · PullbackPr2 Pb) =
FF e' c e'c

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
t: D ⟦ e, F d ⟧
Htx: t · # F h = x
Hty: t · # F k = y
TX:= homotweqinvweq (FF e' d): ∏ y : D ⟦ F e', F d ⟧,
FF e' d (invmap (FF e' d) y) = y
FF e' c (invmap (FF e' d) (i · t) · PullbackPr2 Pb) =
FF e' c e'c

Fes: essentially_surjective F

Htx: t · # F h = x
Hty: t · # F k = y
TX:= homotweqinvweq (FF e' d): ∏ y : D ⟦ F e', F d ⟧,
# F (invmap (FF e' d) y) = y
# F (invmap (FF e' d) (i · t) · k) = # F e'c

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧

Hty: t · # F k = y

C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧

Hty: t · # F k = y
i · (t · # F k) = # F e'c
 
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F

Htx: t · # F h = x
Hty: t · # F k = y
i · y = # F e'c

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧

t: D ⟦ e, F d ⟧
Htx: t · # F h = x
Hty: t · # F k = y
i · y = # F (invmap (FF e' c) (i · y))

F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧

i: z_iso (F e') e

Htx: t · # F h = x
Hty: t · # F k = y

FF e' c (invmap (FF e' c) y) = y

C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
t: D ⟦ e, F d ⟧
Htx: t · # F h = x
Hty: t · # F k = y
TX:= homotweqinvweq (FF e' c): ∏ y : D ⟦ F e', F c ⟧,
# F (invmap (FF e' c) y) = y
i · y = # F (invmap (FF e' c) (i · y))

      
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
Fff: fully_faithful F
Fes: essentially_surjective F
FF:= λ a b : C, weq_from_fully_faithful Fff a b: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
h: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: h · f = k · g
X: isPullback H
e: D
x: D ⟦ e, F b ⟧
y: D ⟦ e, F c ⟧
Hxy: x · # F f = y · # F g
e': C
i: z_iso (F e') e
e'c:= invmap (FF e' c) (i · y): C ⟦ e', c ⟧
e'b:= invmap (FF e' b) (i · x): C ⟦ e', b ⟧
Pb:= make_Pullback H X: Pullback f g
XX: e'b · f = e'c · g
umor:= PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX: C ⟦ e', d ⟧
umorPr1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · h = e'b
umorPr2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e' e'b e'c XX: PullbackArrow Pb e' e'b e'c XX · k = e'c
t: D ⟦ e, F d ⟧
Htx: t · # F h = x
Hty: t · # F k = y
TX:= homotweqinvweq (FF e' c): ∏ y : D ⟦ F e', F c ⟧,
# F (invmap (FF e' c) y) = y
i · y = i · y
 apply idpath.
Qed. (* why opaque? *)

End ff_es_functor_preserves_pb.


Definition maps_pb_square_to_pb_square
  {a b c d : C}
  {f : C ⟦b, a⟧} {g : C ⟦c, a⟧} {h : C⟦d, b⟧} {k : C⟦d,c⟧}
  (H : h · f = k · g)
  : UU :=
  isPullback H -> isPullback (functor_on_square H).

Definition maps_pb_squares_to_pb_squares :=
   ∏ (a b c d : C)
     (f : C ⟦b, a⟧) (g : C ⟦c, a⟧) (h : C⟦d, b⟧) (k : C⟦d,c⟧)
     (H : h · f = k · g),
     maps_pb_square_to_pb_square H.

End functor_on_square.

(** * Pullbacks in functor categories *)
Section pullbacks_pointwise.

(** Diagram for this section:
<<
          d
    J -------> H
    |          |
  c |          | b
    v          v
    G -------> F
         a
>>
*)

Context {C D : category}.

Let CD := [C, D].

Context {F G H J : CD}
  {a : CD ⟦G, F⟧} {b : CD ⟦H, F⟧} {c : CD⟦J,G⟧} {d : CD⟦J, H⟧}
  (Hcomm : c · a = d · b).

Arguments make_Pullback {_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ } _ .

Let Hcommx x := nat_trans_eq_pointwise Hcomm x.


C, D: category
CD:= [C, D]: category
F, G, H, J: CD
a: CD ⟦ G, F ⟧
b: CD ⟦ H, F ⟧
c: CD ⟦ J, G ⟧
d: CD ⟦ J, H ⟧
Hcomm: c · a = d · b
Hcommx:= λ x : C, nat_trans_eq_pointwise Hcomm x: ∏ x : C, (c · a) x = (d · b) x
T: ∏ x : C, isPullback (Hcommx x)
E: CD
h: CD ⟦ E, G ⟧
k: CD ⟦ E, H ⟧
Hhk: h · a = k · b
∏ x : C, D ⟦ pr1 E x, pr1 J x ⟧


C, D: category
CD:= [C, D]: category
F, G, H, J: CD
a: CD ⟦ G, F ⟧
b: CD ⟦ H, F ⟧
c: CD ⟦ J, G ⟧
d: CD ⟦ J, H ⟧
Hcomm: c · a = d · b
Hcommx:= λ x : C, nat_trans_eq_pointwise Hcomm x: ∏ x : C, (c · a) x = (d · b) x
T: ∏ x : C, isPullback (Hcommx x)
E: CD
h: CD ⟦ E, G ⟧
k: CD ⟦ E, H ⟧
Hhk: h · a = k · b
∏ x : C, D ⟦ pr1 E x, pr1 J x ⟧


C, D: category
CD:= [C, D]: category
F, G, H, J: CD
a: CD ⟦ G, F ⟧
b: CD ⟦ H, F ⟧
c: CD ⟦ J, G ⟧
d: CD ⟦ J, H ⟧
Hcomm: c · a = d · b
Hcommx:= λ x : C, nat_trans_eq_pointwise Hcomm x: ∏ x : C, (c · a) x = (d · b) x
T: ∏ x : C, isPullback (Hcommx x)
E: CD
h: CD ⟦ E, G ⟧
k: CD ⟦ E, H ⟧
Hhk: h · a = k · b
x: C
pr1 h x · a x = pr1 k x · b x

abstract (apply (nat_trans_eq_pointwise Hhk)).
Defined.


C, D: category
CD:= [C, D]: category
F, G, H, J: CD
a: CD ⟦ G, F ⟧
b: CD ⟦ H, F ⟧
c: CD ⟦ J, G ⟧
d: CD ⟦ J, H ⟧
Hcomm: c · a = d · b
Hcommx:= λ x : C, nat_trans_eq_pointwise Hcomm x: ∏ x : C, (c · a) x = (d · b) x
T: ∏ x : C, isPullback (Hcommx x)
E: CD
h: CD ⟦ E, G ⟧
k: CD ⟦ E, H ⟧
Hhk: h · a = k · b
is_nat_trans (pr1 E) (pr1 J)
  (λ x : C, g T E h k Hhk x)


C, D: category
CD:= [C, D]: category
F, G, H, J: CD
a: CD ⟦ G, F ⟧
b: CD ⟦ H, F ⟧
c: CD ⟦ J, G ⟧
d: CD ⟦ J, H ⟧
Hcomm: c · a = d · b
Hcommx:= λ x : C, nat_trans_eq_pointwise Hcomm x: ∏ x : C, (c · a) x = (d · b) x
T: ∏ x : C, isPullback (Hcommx x)
E: CD
h: CD ⟦ E, G ⟧
k: CD ⟦ E, H ⟧
Hhk: h · a = k · b
is_nat_trans (pr1 E) (pr1 J)
  (λ x : C, g T E h k Hhk x)


C, D: category
CD:= [C, D]: category
F, G, H, J: CD
a: CD ⟦ G, F ⟧
b: CD ⟦ H, F ⟧
c: CD ⟦ J, G ⟧
d: CD ⟦ J, H ⟧
Hcomm: c · a = d · b
Hcommx:= λ x : C, nat_trans_eq_pointwise Hcomm x: ∏ x : C, (c · a) x = (d · b) x
T: ∏ x : C, isPullback (Hcommx x)
E: CD
h: CD ⟦ E, G ⟧
k: CD ⟦ E, H ⟧
Hhk: h · a = k · b
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (pr1 E) f
· PullbackArrow (make_Pullback (T y)) (E y) (pr1 h y)
    (pr1 k y) (g_subproof E h k Hhk y) =
PullbackArrow (make_Pullback (T x)) (E x) (pr1 h x)
  (pr1 k x) (g_subproof E h k Hhk x) · # (pr1 J) f


C, D: category
CD:= [C, D]: category
F, G, H, J: CD
a: CD ⟦ G, F ⟧
b: CD ⟦ H, F ⟧
c: CD ⟦ J, G ⟧
d: CD ⟦ J, H ⟧
Hcomm: c · a = d · b
Hcommx:= λ x : C, nat_trans_eq_pointwise Hcomm x: ∏ x : C, (c · a) x = (d · b) x
T: ∏ x : C, isPullback (Hcommx x)
E: CD
h: CD ⟦ E, G ⟧
k: CD ⟦ E, H ⟧
Hhk: h · a = k · b
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (pr1 E) f
· PullbackArrow (make_Pullback (T y)) (E y) (pr1 h y)
    (pr1 k y) (g_subproof E h k Hhk y) · c y =
PullbackArrow (make_Pullback (T x)) (E x) (pr1 h x)
  (pr1 k x) (g_subproof E h k Hhk x) · # (pr1 J) f
· c y
C, D: category
CD:= [C, D]: category
F, G, H, J: CD
a: CD ⟦ G, F ⟧
b: CD ⟦ H, F ⟧
c: CD ⟦ J, G ⟧
d: CD ⟦ J, H ⟧
Hcomm: c · a = d · b
Hcommx:= λ x : C, nat_trans_eq_pointwise Hcomm x: ∏ x : C, (c · a) x = (d · b) x
T: ∏ x : C, isPullback (Hcommx x)
E: CD
h: CD ⟦ E, G ⟧
k: CD ⟦ E, H ⟧
Hhk: h · a = k · b
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (pr1 E) f
· PullbackArrow (make_Pullback (T y)) 
    (E y) (pr1 h y) (pr1 k y) 
    (g_subproof E h k Hhk y) · 
d y =
PullbackArrow (make_Pullback (T x)) 
  (E x) (pr1 h x) (pr1 k x) 
  (g_subproof E h k Hhk x) · 
# (pr1 J) f · d y


C, D: category
CD:= [C, D]: category
F, G, H, J: CD
a: CD ⟦ G, F ⟧
b: CD ⟦ H, F ⟧
c: CD ⟦ J, G ⟧
d: CD ⟦ J, H ⟧
Hcomm: c · a = d · b
Hcommx:= λ x : C, nat_trans_eq_pointwise Hcomm x: ∏ x : C, (c · a) x = (d · b) x
T: ∏ x : C, isPullback (Hcommx x)
E: CD
h: CD ⟦ E, G ⟧
k: CD ⟦ E, H ⟧
Hhk: h · a = k · b
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (pr1 E) f
· PullbackArrow (make_Pullback (T y)) (E y) (pr1 h y)
    (pr1 k y) (g_subproof E h k Hhk y) · c y =
PullbackArrow (make_Pullback (T x)) (E x) (pr1 h x)
  (pr1 k x) (g_subproof E h k Hhk x) · # (pr1 J) f
· c y
 
C, D: category
CD:= [C, D]: category
F, G, H, J: CD
a: CD ⟦ G, F ⟧
b: CD ⟦ H, F ⟧
c: CD ⟦ J, G ⟧
d: CD ⟦ J, H ⟧
Hcomm: c · a = d · b
Hcommx:= λ x : C, nat_trans_eq_pointwise Hcomm x: ∏ x : C, (c · a) x = (d · b) x
T: ∏ x : C, isPullback (Hcommx x)
E: CD
h: CD ⟦ E, G ⟧
k: CD ⟦ E, H ⟧
Hhk: h · a = k · b
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (pr1 E) f · pr1 h y =
PullbackArrow (make_Pullback (T x)) (E x) (pr1 h x)
  (pr1 k x) (g_subproof E h k Hhk x)
· (# (pr1 J) f · c y)

  
C, D: category
CD:= [C, D]: category
F, G, H, J: CD
a: CD ⟦ G, F ⟧
b: CD ⟦ H, F ⟧
c: CD ⟦ J, G ⟧
d: CD ⟦ J, H ⟧
Hcomm: c · a = d · b
Hcommx:= λ x : C, nat_trans_eq_pointwise Hcomm x: ∏ x : C, (c · a) x = (d · b) x
T: ∏ x : C, isPullback (Hcommx x)
E: CD
h: CD ⟦ E, G ⟧
k: CD ⟦ E, H ⟧
Hhk: h · a = k · b
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (pr1 E) f · pr1 h y =
PullbackArrow (make_Pullback (T x)) (E x) (pr1 h x)
  (pr1 k x) (g_subproof E h k Hhk x) · c x · # G f

  now rewrite (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback (T x))), (nat_trans_ax h).

C, D: category
CD:= [C, D]: category
F, G, H, J: CD
a: CD ⟦ G, F ⟧
b: CD ⟦ H, F ⟧
c: CD ⟦ J, G ⟧
d: CD ⟦ J, H ⟧
Hcomm: c · a = d · b
Hcommx:= λ x : C, nat_trans_eq_pointwise Hcomm x: ∏ x : C, (c · a) x = (d · b) x
T: ∏ x : C, isPullback (Hcommx x)
E: CD
h: CD ⟦ E, G ⟧
k: CD ⟦ E, H ⟧
Hhk: h · a = k · b
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (pr1 E) f
· PullbackArrow (make_Pullback (T y)) (E y) (pr1 h y)
    (pr1 k y) (g_subproof E h k Hhk y) · d y =
PullbackArrow (make_Pullback (T x)) (E x) (pr1 h x)
  (pr1 k x) (g_subproof E h k Hhk x) · # (pr1 J) f
· d y
 
C, D: category
CD:= [C, D]: category
F, G, H, J: CD
a: CD ⟦ G, F ⟧
b: CD ⟦ H, F ⟧
c: CD ⟦ J, G ⟧
d: CD ⟦ J, H ⟧
Hcomm: c · a = d · b
Hcommx:= λ x : C, nat_trans_eq_pointwise Hcomm x: ∏ x : C, (c · a) x = (d · b) x
T: ∏ x : C, isPullback (Hcommx x)
E: CD
h: CD ⟦ E, G ⟧
k: CD ⟦ E, H ⟧
Hhk: h · a = k · b
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (pr1 E) f · pr1 k y =
PullbackArrow (make_Pullback (T x)) (E x) (pr1 h x)
  (pr1 k x) (g_subproof E h k Hhk x)
· (# (pr1 J) f · d y)

  
C, D: category
CD:= [C, D]: category
F, G, H, J: CD
a: CD ⟦ G, F ⟧
b: CD ⟦ H, F ⟧
c: CD ⟦ J, G ⟧
d: CD ⟦ J, H ⟧
Hcomm: c · a = d · b
Hcommx:= λ x : C, nat_trans_eq_pointwise Hcomm x: ∏ x : C, (c · a) x = (d · b) x
T: ∏ x : C, isPullback (Hcommx x)
E: CD
h: CD ⟦ E, G ⟧
k: CD ⟦ E, H ⟧
Hhk: h · a = k · b
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (pr1 E) f · pr1 k y =
PullbackArrow (make_Pullback (T x)) (E x) (pr1 h x)
  (pr1 k x) (g_subproof E h k Hhk x) · d x · # H f

  now rewrite (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 (make_Pullback (T x))), (nat_trans_ax k).
Qed.


C, D: category
CD:= [C, D]: category
F, G, H, J: CD
a: CD ⟦ G, F ⟧
b: CD ⟦ H, F ⟧
c: CD ⟦ J, G ⟧
d: CD ⟦ J, H ⟧
Hcomm: c · a = d · b
Hcommx:= λ x : C, nat_trans_eq_pointwise Hcomm x: ∏ x : C, (c · a) x = (d · b) x
(∏ x : C, isPullback (Hcommx x)) → isPullback Hcomm


C, D: category
CD:= [C, D]: category
F, G, H, J: CD
a: CD ⟦ G, F ⟧
b: CD ⟦ H, F ⟧
c: CD ⟦ J, G ⟧
d: CD ⟦ J, H ⟧
Hcomm: c · a = d · b
Hcommx:= λ x : C, nat_trans_eq_pointwise Hcomm x: ∏ x : C, (c · a) x = (d · b) x
(∏ x : C, isPullback (Hcommx x)) → isPullback Hcomm


C, D: category
CD:= [C, D]: category
F, G, H, J: CD
a: CD ⟦ G, F ⟧
b: CD ⟦ H, F ⟧
c: CD ⟦ J, G ⟧
d: CD ⟦ J, H ⟧
Hcomm: c · a = d · b
Hcommx:= λ x : C, nat_trans_eq_pointwise Hcomm x: ∏ x : C, (c · a) x = (d · b) x
T: ∏ x : C, isPullback (Hcommx x)
isPullback Hcomm


C, D: category
CD:= [C, D]: category
F, G, H, J: CD
a: CD ⟦ G, F ⟧
b: CD ⟦ H, F ⟧
c: CD ⟦ J, G ⟧
d: CD ⟦ J, H ⟧
Hcomm: c · a = d · b
Hcommx:= λ x : C, nat_trans_eq_pointwise Hcomm x: ∏ x : C, (c · a) x = (d · b) x
T: ∏ x : C, isPullback (Hcommx x)
E: CD
h: CD ⟦ E, G ⟧
k: CD ⟦ E, H ⟧
Hhk: h · a = k · b
∃! hk : CD ⟦ E, J ⟧, hk · c = h × hk · d = k


C, D: category
CD:= [C, D]: category
F, G, H, J: CD
a: CD ⟦ G, F ⟧
b: CD ⟦ H, F ⟧
c: CD ⟦ J, G ⟧
d: CD ⟦ J, H ⟧
Hcomm: c · a = d · b
Hcommx:= λ x : C, nat_trans_eq_pointwise Hcomm x: ∏ x : C, (c · a) x = (d · b) x
T: ∏ x : C, isPullback (Hcommx x)
E: CD
h: CD ⟦ E, G ⟧
k: CD ⟦ E, H ⟧
Hhk: h · a = k · b
CD ⟦ E, J ⟧
C, D: category
CD:= [C, D]: category
F, G, H, J: CD
a: CD ⟦ G, F ⟧
b: CD ⟦ H, F ⟧
c: CD ⟦ J, G ⟧
d: CD ⟦ J, H ⟧
Hcomm: c · a = d · b
Hcommx:= λ x : C, nat_trans_eq_pointwise Hcomm x: ∏ x : C, (c · a) x = (d · b) x
T: ∏ x : C, isPullback (Hcommx x)
E: CD
h: CD ⟦ E, G ⟧
k: CD ⟦ E, H ⟧
Hhk: h · a = k · b
(λ t : CD ⟦ E, J ⟧, t · c = h × t · d = k) ?x
C, D: category
CD:= [C, D]: category
F, G, H, J: CD
a: CD ⟦ G, F ⟧
b: CD ⟦ H, F ⟧
c: CD ⟦ J, G ⟧
d: CD ⟦ J, H ⟧
Hcomm: c · a = d · b
Hcommx:= λ x : C, nat_trans_eq_pointwise Hcomm x: ∏ x : C, (c · a) x = (d · b) x
T: ∏ x : C, isPullback (Hcommx x)
E: CD
h: CD ⟦ E, G ⟧
k: CD ⟦ E, H ⟧
Hhk: h · a = k · b
∏ y : CD ⟦ E, J ⟧,
isaprop ((λ t : CD ⟦ E, J ⟧, t · c = h × t · d = k) y)
C, D: category
CD:= [C, D]: category
F, G, H, J: CD
a: CD ⟦ G, F ⟧
b: CD ⟦ H, F ⟧
c: CD ⟦ J, G ⟧
d: CD ⟦ J, H ⟧
Hcomm: c · a = d · b
Hcommx:= λ x : C, nat_trans_eq_pointwise Hcomm x: ∏ x : C, (c · a) x = (d · b) x
T: ∏ x : C, isPullback (Hcommx x)
E: CD
h: CD ⟦ E, G ⟧
k: CD ⟦ E, H ⟧
Hhk: h · a = k · b
∏ y : CD ⟦ E, J ⟧,
(λ t : CD ⟦ E, J ⟧, t · c = h × t · d = k) y → y = ?x


C, D: category
CD:= [C, D]: category
F, G, H, J: CD
a: CD ⟦ G, F ⟧
b: CD ⟦ H, F ⟧
c: CD ⟦ J, G ⟧
d: CD ⟦ J, H ⟧
Hcomm: c · a = d · b
Hcommx:= λ x : C, nat_trans_eq_pointwise Hcomm x: ∏ x : C, (c · a) x = (d · b) x
T: ∏ x : C, isPullback (Hcommx x)
E: CD
h: CD ⟦ E, G ⟧
k: CD ⟦ E, H ⟧
Hhk: h · a = k · b
CD ⟦ E, J ⟧
 
C, D: category
CD:= [C, D]: category
F, G, H, J: CD
a: CD ⟦ G, F ⟧
b: CD ⟦ H, F ⟧
c: CD ⟦ J, G ⟧
d: CD ⟦ J, H ⟧
Hcomm: c · a = d · b
Hcommx:= λ x : C, nat_trans_eq_pointwise Hcomm x: ∏ x : C, (c · a) x = (d · b) x
T: ∏ x : C, isPullback (Hcommx x)
E: CD
h: CD ⟦ E, G ⟧
k: CD ⟦ E, H ⟧
Hhk: h · a = k · b
nat_trans_data E J
C, D: category
CD:= [C, D]: category
F, G, H, J: CD
a: CD ⟦ G, F ⟧
b: CD ⟦ H, F ⟧
c: CD ⟦ J, G ⟧
d: CD ⟦ J, H ⟧
Hcomm: c · a = d · b
Hcommx:= λ x : C, nat_trans_eq_pointwise Hcomm x: ∏ x : C, (c · a) x = (d · b) x
T: ∏ x : C, isPullback (Hcommx x)
E: CD
h: CD ⟦ E, G ⟧
k: CD ⟦ E, H ⟧
Hhk: h · a = k · b
(λ t : nat_trans_data E J, is_nat_trans E J t) ?pr1

  
C, D: category
CD:= [C, D]: category
F, G, H, J: CD
a: CD ⟦ G, F ⟧
b: CD ⟦ H, F ⟧
c: CD ⟦ J, G ⟧
d: CD ⟦ J, H ⟧
Hcomm: c · a = d · b
Hcommx:= λ x : C, nat_trans_eq_pointwise Hcomm x: ∏ x : C, (c · a) x = (d · b) x
T: ∏ x : C, isPullback (Hcommx x)
E: CD
h: CD ⟦ E, G ⟧
k: CD ⟦ E, H ⟧
Hhk: h · a = k · b
nat_trans_data E J
 intro x; apply (g T E h k Hhk).
  
C, D: category
CD:= [C, D]: category
F, G, H, J: CD
a: CD ⟦ G, F ⟧
b: CD ⟦ H, F ⟧
c: CD ⟦ J, G ⟧
d: CD ⟦ J, H ⟧
Hcomm: c · a = d · b
Hcommx:= λ x : C, nat_trans_eq_pointwise Hcomm x: ∏ x : C, (c · a) x = (d · b) x
T: ∏ x : C, isPullback (Hcommx x)
E: CD
h: CD ⟦ E, G ⟧
k: CD ⟦ E, H ⟧
Hhk: h · a = k · b
(λ t : nat_trans_data E J, is_nat_trans E J t)
  ((λ x : C, g T E h k Hhk x) : nat_trans_data E J)
 apply is_nat_trans_g.

C, D: category
CD:= [C, D]: category
F, G, H, J: CD
a: CD ⟦ G, F ⟧
b: CD ⟦ H, F ⟧
c: CD ⟦ J, G ⟧
d: CD ⟦ J, H ⟧
Hcomm: c · a = d · b
Hcommx:= λ x : C, nat_trans_eq_pointwise Hcomm x: ∏ x : C, (c · a) x = (d · b) x
T: ∏ x : C, isPullback (Hcommx x)
E: CD
h: CD ⟦ E, G ⟧
k: CD ⟦ E, H ⟧
Hhk: h · a = k · b
(λ t : CD ⟦ E, J ⟧, t · c = h × t · d = k)
  (((λ x : C, g T E h k Hhk x) : nat_trans_data E J),,
   is_nat_trans_g T E h k Hhk)
 abstract (split; apply (nat_trans_eq D); intro x;
           [ apply (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 (make_Pullback (T x)))
           | apply (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 (make_Pullback (T x))) ]).

C, D: category
CD:= [C, D]: category
F, G, H, J: CD
a: CD ⟦ G, F ⟧
b: CD ⟦ H, F ⟧
c: CD ⟦ J, G ⟧
d: CD ⟦ J, H ⟧
Hcomm: c · a = d · b
Hcommx:= λ x : C, nat_trans_eq_pointwise Hcomm x: ∏ x : C, (c · a) x = (d · b) x
T: ∏ x : C, isPullback (Hcommx x)
E: CD
h: CD ⟦ E, G ⟧
k: CD ⟦ E, H ⟧
Hhk: h · a = k · b
∏ y : CD ⟦ E, J ⟧,
isaprop ((λ t : CD ⟦ E, J ⟧, t · c = h × t · d = k) y)
 abstract (intro; apply isapropdirprod; apply functor_category_has_homsets).

C, D: category
CD:= [C, D]: category
F, G, H, J: CD
a: CD ⟦ G, F ⟧
b: CD ⟦ H, F ⟧
c: CD ⟦ J, G ⟧
d: CD ⟦ J, H ⟧
Hcomm: c · a = d · b
Hcommx:= λ x : C, nat_trans_eq_pointwise Hcomm x: ∏ x : C, (c · a) x = (d · b) x
T: ∏ x : C, isPullback (Hcommx x)
E: CD
h: CD ⟦ E, G ⟧
k: CD ⟦ E, H ⟧
Hhk: h · a = k · b
∏ y : CD ⟦ E, J ⟧,
(λ t : CD ⟦ E, J ⟧, t · c = h × t · d = k) y
→ y =
  ((λ x : C, g T E h k Hhk x) : nat_trans_data E J),,
  is_nat_trans_g T E h k Hhk
 abstract (intros t [h1 h2]; destruct h as [h Hh];
            apply (nat_trans_eq D); intro x; apply PullbackArrowUnique;
            [ apply (nat_trans_eq_pointwise h1) | apply (nat_trans_eq_pointwise h2) ]).
Defined.

End pullbacks_pointwise.

(** * Construction of binary products from pullbacks *)
Section binproduct_from_pullback.

Context {C : category} (Pb : Pullbacks C) (T : Terminal C).


C: category
Pb: Pullbacks C
T: Terminal C
c, d, a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
∑
fg : C ⟦ a,
     Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c) (TerminalArrow T d)
     ⟧,
fg
· PullbackPr1
    (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c) (TerminalArrow T d)) =
f
× fg
  · PullbackPr2
      (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c)
         (TerminalArrow T d)) = g


C: category
Pb: Pullbacks C
T: Terminal C
c, d, a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
∑
fg : C ⟦ a,
     Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c) (TerminalArrow T d)
     ⟧,
fg
· PullbackPr1
    (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c) (TerminalArrow T d)) =
f
× fg
  · PullbackPr2
      (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c)
         (TerminalArrow T d)) = g

  
C: category
Pb: ∏ (a b c : C) (f : C ⟦ b, a ⟧) (g : C ⟦ c, a ⟧),
Pullback f g
T: Terminal C
c, d, a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
∑
fg : C ⟦ a,
     Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c) (TerminalArrow T d)
     ⟧,
fg
· PullbackPr1
    (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c) (TerminalArrow T d)) =
f
× fg
  · PullbackPr2
      (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c)
         (TerminalArrow T d)) = g

  
C: category
Pb: ∏ (a b c : C) (f : C ⟦ b, a ⟧) (g : C ⟦ c, a ⟧),
Pullback f g
T: Terminal C
c, d, a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
PullbackArrow
  (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c) (TerminalArrow T d)) a
  f g
  (TerminalArrowEq (f · TerminalArrow T c)
     (g · TerminalArrow T d))
· PullbackPr1
    (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c) (TerminalArrow T d)) =
f
× PullbackArrow
    (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c) (TerminalArrow T d))
    a f g
    (TerminalArrowEq (f · TerminalArrow T c)
       (g · TerminalArrow T d))
  · PullbackPr2
      (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c)
         (TerminalArrow T d)) = g

  
C: category
Pb: ∏ (a b c : C) (f : C ⟦ b, a ⟧) (g : C ⟦ c, a ⟧),
Pullback f g
T: Terminal C
c, d, a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
PullbackArrow
  (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c) (TerminalArrow T d)) a
  f g
  (TerminalArrowEq (f · TerminalArrow T c)
     (g · TerminalArrow T d))
· PullbackPr1
    (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c) (TerminalArrow T d)) =
f
C: category
Pb: ∏ (a b c : C) (f : C ⟦ b, a ⟧) (g : C ⟦ c, a ⟧),
Pullback f g
T: Terminal C
c, d, a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
PullbackArrow
  (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c) (TerminalArrow T d)) a
  f g
  (TerminalArrowEq (f · TerminalArrow T c)
     (g · TerminalArrow T d))
· PullbackPr2
    (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c) (TerminalArrow T d)) =
g

  
C: category
Pb: ∏ (a b c : C) (f : C ⟦ b, a ⟧) (g : C ⟦ c, a ⟧),
Pullback f g
T: Terminal C
c, d, a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
PullbackArrow
  (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c) (TerminalArrow T d)) a
  f g
  (TerminalArrowEq (f · TerminalArrow T c)
     (g · TerminalArrow T d))
· PullbackPr2
    (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c) (TerminalArrow T d)) =
g

  apply PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2.
Defined.


C: category
Pb: Pullbacks C
T: Terminal C
c, d: C
isBinProduct C c d
  (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c) (TerminalArrow T d))
  (PullbackPr1
     (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c) (TerminalArrow T d)))
  (PullbackPr2
     (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c) (TerminalArrow T d)))


C: category
Pb: Pullbacks C
T: Terminal C
c, d: C
isBinProduct C c d
  (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c) (TerminalArrow T d))
  (PullbackPr1
     (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c) (TerminalArrow T d)))
  (PullbackPr2
     (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c) (TerminalArrow T d)))

  
C: category
Pb: Pullbacks C
T: Terminal C
c, d, a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
∃! fg : C ⟦ a,
        Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c)
          (TerminalArrow T d) ⟧,
fg
· PullbackPr1
    (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c) (TerminalArrow T d)) =
f
× fg
  · PullbackPr2
      (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c)
         (TerminalArrow T d)) = g

  
C: category
Pb: Pullbacks C
T: Terminal C
c, d, a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
∏
t : ∑
    fg : C ⟦ a,
         Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c)
           (TerminalArrow T d) ⟧,
    fg
    · PullbackPr1
        (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c)
           (TerminalArrow T d)) = f
    × fg
      · PullbackPr2
          (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c)
             (TerminalArrow T d)) = g,
t = UnivProductFromPullback c d a f g

  
C: category
Pb: Pullbacks C
T: Terminal C
c, d, a: C
f: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
t: ∑
fg : C ⟦ a,
     Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c)
       (TerminalArrow T d) ⟧,
fg
· PullbackPr1
    (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c)
       (TerminalArrow T d)) = f
× fg
  · PullbackPr2
      (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c)
         (TerminalArrow T d)) = g
t = UnivProductFromPullback c d a f g

  abstract (apply proofirrelevancecontr,
             isPullback_Pullback,
             TerminalArrowEq).
Defined.


C: category
Pb: Pullbacks C
T: Terminal C
c, d: C
BinProduct C c d


C: category
Pb: Pullbacks C
T: Terminal C
c, d: C
BinProduct C c d

  
C: category
Pb: Pullbacks C
T: Terminal C
c, d: C
isBinProduct C c d
  (pr1
     (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c) (TerminalArrow T d),,
      make_dirprod
        (PullbackPr1
           (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c)
              (TerminalArrow T d)))
        (PullbackPr2
           (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c)
              (TerminalArrow T d)))))
  (pr12 (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c)
           (TerminalArrow T d),,
         make_dirprod
           (PullbackPr1
              (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c)
                 (TerminalArrow T d)))
           (PullbackPr2
              (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c)
                 (TerminalArrow T d)))))
  (pr22 (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c)
           (TerminalArrow T d),,
         make_dirprod
           (PullbackPr1
              (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c)
                 (TerminalArrow T d)))
           (PullbackPr2
              (Pb T c d (TerminalArrow T c)
                 (TerminalArrow T d)))))

 exact (isBinProduct_Pullback c d).
Defined.

Definition BinProductsFromPullbacks : BinProducts C := BinProduct_Pullback.

End binproduct_from_pullback.


(** * Pullbacks in functor_precategory
    We construct pullbacks in the functor category [D, C] from pullbacks of C. *)
Section pullbacks_functor_category.

  Context (D C : category) (hpb : @Pullbacks C).

  
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
a, b: D
f: D ⟦ a, b ⟧
PullbackPr1 (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a))
· # G f · α b =
PullbackPr2 (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a))
· # H f · β b

  
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
a, b: D
f: D ⟦ a, b ⟧
PullbackPr1 (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a))
· # G f · α b =
PullbackPr2 (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a))
· # H f · β b

    
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
a, b: D
f: D ⟦ a, b ⟧
pba:= hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a): Pullback (α a) (β a)
PullbackPr1 pba · # G f · α b =
PullbackPr2 pba · # H f · β b

    
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
a, b: D
f: D ⟦ a, b ⟧
pba:= hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a): Pullback (α a) (β a)
PullbackPr1 pba · (# G f · α b) =
PullbackPr2 pba · (# H f · β b)

    
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
a, b: D
f: D ⟦ a, b ⟧
pba:= hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a): Pullback (α a) (β a)
PullbackPr1 pba · (α a · # F f) =
PullbackPr2 pba · (# H f · β b)

    
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
a, b: D
f: D ⟦ a, b ⟧
pba:= hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a): Pullback (α a) (β a)
PullbackPr1 pba · (α a · # F f) =
PullbackPr2 pba · (β a · # F f)

    
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
a, b: D
f: D ⟦ a, b ⟧
pba:= hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a): Pullback (α a) (β a)
PullbackPr1 pba · α a · # F f =
PullbackPr2 pba · β a · # F f

    
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
a, b: D
f: D ⟦ a, b ⟧
pba:= hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a): Pullback (α a) (β a)
PullbackPr1 pba · α a = PullbackPr2 pba · β a

    exact (PullbackSqrCommutes pba).
  Qed.

  
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
is_functor
  (make_functor_data
     (λ d : D, hpb (F d) (G d) (H d) (α d) (β d))
     (λ (a b : D) (f : D ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      PullbackArrow
        (hpb (F b) (G b) (H b) (α b) (β b))
        (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a))
        (PullbackPr1
           (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a)) · # G f)
        (PullbackPr2
           (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a)) · # H f)
        (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β a b f)))

  
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
is_functor
  (make_functor_data
     (λ d : D, hpb (F d) (G d) (H d) (α d) (β d))
     (λ (a b : D) (f : D ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      PullbackArrow
        (hpb (F b) (G b) (H b) (α b) (β b))
        (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a))
        (PullbackPr1
           (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a)) · # G f)
        (PullbackPr2
           (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a)) · # H f)
        (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β a b f)))

    
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
functor_idax
  (make_functor_data
     (λ d : D, hpb (F d) (G d) (H d) (α d) (β d))
     (λ (a b : D) (f : D ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      PullbackArrow
        (hpb (F b) (G b) (H b) (α b) (β b))
        (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a))
        (PullbackPr1
           (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a)) · # G f)
        (PullbackPr2
           (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a)) · # H f)
        (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β a b f)))
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
functor_compax
  (make_functor_data
     (λ d : D, hpb (F d) (G d) (H d) (α d) (β d))
     (λ (a b : D) (f : D ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      PullbackArrow
        (hpb (F b) (G b) (H b) (α b) (β b))
        (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a))
        (PullbackPr1
           (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a)) · # G f)
        (PullbackPr2
           (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a)) · # H f)
        (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β a b f)))

    
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
functor_idax
  (make_functor_data
     (λ d : D, hpb (F d) (G d) (H d) (α d) (β d))
     (λ (a b : D) (f : D ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      PullbackArrow
        (hpb (F b) (G b) (H b) (α b) (β b))
        (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a))
        (PullbackPr1
           (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a)) · # G f)
        (PullbackPr2
           (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a)) · # H f)
        (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β a b f)))
 
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
x: D
# (make_functor_data
     (λ d : D, hpb (F d) (G d) (H d) (α d) (β d))
     (λ (a b : D) (f : D ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      PullbackArrow
        (hpb (F b) (G b) (H b) (α b) (β b))
        (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a))
        (PullbackPr1
           (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a)) · # G f)
        (PullbackPr2
           (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a)) · # H f)
        (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β a b f)))
  (identity x) =
identity
  (make_functor_data
     (λ d : D, hpb (F d) (G d) (H d) (α d) (β d))
     (λ (a b : D) (f : D ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      PullbackArrow
        (hpb (F b) (G b) (H b) (α b) (β b))
        (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a))
        (PullbackPr1
           (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a)) · # G f)
        (PullbackPr2
           (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a)) · # H f)
        (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β a b f))
     x)
 
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
x: D
identity
  (make_functor_data
     (λ d : D, hpb (F d) (G d) (H d) (α d) (β d))
     (λ (a b : D) (f : D ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      PullbackArrow
        (hpb (F b) (G b) (H b) (α b) (β b))
        (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a))
        (PullbackPr1
           (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a)) · # G f)
        (PullbackPr2
           (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a)) · # H f)
        (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β a b f))
     x) =
# (make_functor_data
     (λ d : D, hpb (F d) (G d) (H d) (α d) (β d))
     (λ (a b : D) (f : D ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      PullbackArrow
        (hpb (F b) (G b) (H b) (α b) (β b))
        (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a))
        (PullbackPr1
           (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a)) · # G f)
        (PullbackPr2
           (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a)) · # H f)
        (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β a b f)))
  (identity x)
 
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
x: D
identity (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x)) =
PullbackArrow (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
  (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
  (PullbackPr1 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
   · # G (identity x))
  (PullbackPr2 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
   · # H (identity x))
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β x x
     (identity x))

      
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
x: D
identity (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
· PullbackPr1 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x)) =
PullbackPr1 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
· # G (identity x)
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
x: D
identity (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
· PullbackPr2 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x)) =
PullbackPr2 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
· # H (identity x)

      
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
x: D
identity (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
· PullbackPr1 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x)) =
PullbackPr1 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
· # G (identity x)
 
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
x: D
identity (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
· PullbackPr1 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x)) =
PullbackPr1 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
· identity (G x)
 
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
x: D
PullbackPr1 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x)) =
PullbackPr1 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
· identity (G x)
 
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
x: D
PullbackPr1 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x)) =
PullbackPr1 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
 apply idpath.
      
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
x: D
identity (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
· PullbackPr2 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x)) =
PullbackPr2 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
· # H (identity x)
 
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
x: D
identity (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
· PullbackPr2 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x)) =
PullbackPr2 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
· identity (H x)
 
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
x: D
PullbackPr2 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x)) =
PullbackPr2 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
· identity (H x)
 
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
x: D
PullbackPr2 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x)) =
PullbackPr2 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
 apply idpath.
    
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
functor_compax
  (make_functor_data
     (λ d : D, hpb (F d) (G d) (H d) (α d) (β d))
     (λ (a b : D) (f : D ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      PullbackArrow
        (hpb (F b) (G b) (H b) (α b) (β b))
        (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a))
        (PullbackPr1
           (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a)) · # G f)
        (PullbackPr2
           (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a)) · # H f)
        (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β a b f)))
 
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
x, y, z: D
f: D ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: D ⟦ y, z ⟧
# (make_functor_data
     (λ d : D, hpb (F d) (G d) (H d) (α d) (β d))
     (λ (a b : D) (f : D ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      PullbackArrow
        (hpb (F b) (G b) (H b) (α b) (β b))
        (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a))
        (PullbackPr1
           (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a)) · # G f)
        (PullbackPr2
           (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a)) · # H f)
        (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β a b f)))
  (f · g) =
# (make_functor_data
     (λ d : D, hpb (F d) (G d) (H d) (α d) (β d))
     (λ (a b : D) (f : D ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      PullbackArrow
        (hpb (F b) (G b) (H b) (α b) (β b))
        (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a))
        (PullbackPr1
           (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a)) · # G f)
        (PullbackPr2
           (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a)) · # H f)
        (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β a b f)))
  f
· # (make_functor_data
       (λ d : D, hpb (F d) (G d) (H d) (α d) (β d))
       (λ (a b : D) (f : D ⟦ a, b ⟧),
        PullbackArrow
          (hpb (F b) (G b) (H b) (α b) (β b))
          (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a))
          (PullbackPr1
             (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a))
           · # G f)
          (PullbackPr2
             (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a))
           · # H f)
          (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β a b f)))
    g

(FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β x y f) · PullbackPr2 py =
PullbackPr2 px · # H f
# (make_functor_data
     (λ d : D, hpb (F d) (G d) (H d) (α d) (β d))
     (λ (a b : D) (f : D ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      PullbackArrow
        (hpb (F b) (G b) (H b) (α b) (β b))
        (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a))
        (PullbackPr1
           (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a)) · # G f)
        (PullbackPr2
           (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a)) · # H f)
        (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β a b f)))
  f
· # (make_functor_data
       (λ d : D, hpb (F d) (G d) (H d) (α d) (β d))
       (λ (a b : D) (f : D ⟦ a, b ⟧),
        PullbackArrow
          (hpb (F b) (G b) (H b) (α b) (β b))
          (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a))
          (PullbackPr1
             (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a))
           · # G f)
          (PullbackPr2
             (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a))
           · # H f)
          (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β a b f)))
    g =
# (make_functor_data
     (λ d : D, hpb (F d) (G d) (H d) (α d) (β d))
     (λ (a b : D) (f : D ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      PullbackArrow
        (hpb (F b) (G b) (H b) (α b) (β b))
        (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a))
        (PullbackPr1
           (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a)) · # G f)
        (PullbackPr2
           (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a)) · # H f)
        (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β a b f)))
  (f · g)
 
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
x, y, z: D
f: D ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: D ⟦ y, z ⟧
px:= hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x): Pullback (α x) (β x)
py:= hpb (F y) (G y) (H y) (α y) (β y): Pullback (α y) (β y)
pz:= hpb (F z) (G z) (H z) (α z) (β z): Pullback (α z) (β z)
pz1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 pz py
  (PullbackPr1 py · # G g)
  (PullbackPr2 py · # H g)
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β y z g): PullbackArrow pz py (PullbackPr1 py · # G g) (PullbackPr2 py · # H g)
(FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β y z g) · PullbackPr1 pz =
PullbackPr1 py · # G g
pz2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 pz py
  (PullbackPr1 py · # G g)
  (PullbackPr2 py · # H g)
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β y z g): PullbackArrow pz py (PullbackPr1 py · # G g) (PullbackPr2 py · # H g)
(FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β y z g) · PullbackPr2 pz =
PullbackPr2 py · # H g
py1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 py px
  (PullbackPr1 px · # G f)
  (PullbackPr2 px · # H f)
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β x y f): PullbackArrow py px (PullbackPr1 px · # G f) (PullbackPr2 px · # H f)
(FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β x y f) · PullbackPr1 py =
PullbackPr1 px · # G f
py2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 py px
  (PullbackPr1 px · # G f)
  (PullbackPr2 px · # H f)
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β x y f): PullbackArrow py px (PullbackPr1 px · # G f) (PullbackPr2 px · # H f)
(FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β x y f) · PullbackPr2 py =
PullbackPr2 px · # H f
PullbackArrow (hpb (F y) (G y) (H y) (α y) (β y))
  (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
  (PullbackPr1 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
   · # G f)
  (PullbackPr2 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
   · # H f)
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β x y f)
· PullbackArrow (hpb (F z) (G z) (H z) (α z) (β z))
    (hpb (F y) (G y) (H y) (α y) (β y))
    (PullbackPr1 (hpb (F y) (G y) (H y) (α y) (β y))
     · # G g)
    (PullbackPr2 (hpb (F y) (G y) (H y) (α y) (β y))
     · # H g)
    (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β y z g) =
PullbackArrow (hpb (F z) (G z) (H z) (α z) (β z))
  (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
  (PullbackPr1 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
   · # G (f · g))
  (PullbackPr2 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
   · # H (f · g))
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β x z (f · g))

  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β x y f): PullbackArrow py px (PullbackPr1 px · # G f) (PullbackPr2 px · # H f)
(FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β x y f) · PullbackPr2 py =
PullbackPr2 px · # H f
PullbackArrow py px (PullbackPr1 px · # G f)
  (PullbackPr2 px · # H f)
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β x y f)
· PullbackArrow pz py (PullbackPr1 py · # G g)
    (PullbackPr2 py · # H g)
    (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β y z g)
· PullbackPr1 pz = PullbackPr1 px · (# G f · # G g)

  (PullbackPr1 py · # G g)
  (PullbackPr2 py · # H g)
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β y z g): PullbackArrow pz py (PullbackPr1 py · # G g) (PullbackPr2 py · # H g)
(FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β y z g) · PullbackPr1 pz =
PullbackPr1 py · # G g
pz2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 pz py
  (PullbackPr1 py · # G g)
  (PullbackPr2 py · # H g)
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β y z g): PullbackArrow pz py (PullbackPr1 py · # G g) (PullbackPr2 py · # H g)
(FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β y z g) · PullbackPr2 pz =
PullbackPr2 py · # H g
py1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 py px
  (PullbackPr1 px · # G f)
  (PullbackPr2 px · # H f)
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β x y f): PullbackArrow py px (PullbackPr1 px · # G f) (PullbackPr2 px · # H f)
(FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β x y f) · PullbackPr1 py =
PullbackPr1 px · # G f
py2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 py px
  (PullbackPr1 px · # G f)
  (PullbackPr2 px · # H f)
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β x y f): PullbackArrow py px (PullbackPr1 px · # G f) (PullbackPr2 px · # H f)
(FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β x y f) · PullbackPr2 py =
PullbackPr2 px · # H f
PullbackArrow py px (PullbackPr1 px · # G f)
  (PullbackPr2 px · # H f)
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β x y f)
· (PullbackPr2 py · # H g) =
PullbackPr2 px · # H f · # H g
 
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
x, y, z: D
f: D ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: D ⟦ y, z ⟧
px:= hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x): Pullback (α x) (β x)
py:= hpb (F y) (G y) (H y) (α y) (β y): Pullback (α y) (β y)
pz:= hpb (F z) (G z) (H z) (α z) (β z): Pullback (α z) (β z)
pz1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 pz py
  (PullbackPr1 py · # G g)
  (PullbackPr2 py · # H g)
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β y z g): PullbackArrow pz py (PullbackPr1 py · # G g) (PullbackPr2 py · # H g)
(FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β y z g) · PullbackPr1 pz =
PullbackPr1 py · # G g
pz2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 pz py
  (PullbackPr1 py · # G g)
  (PullbackPr2 py · # H g)
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β y z g): PullbackArrow pz py (PullbackPr1 py · # G g) (PullbackPr2 py · # H g)
(FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β y z g) · PullbackPr2 pz =
PullbackPr2 py · # H g
py1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 py px
  (PullbackPr1 px · # G f)
  (PullbackPr2 px · # H f)
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β x y f): PullbackArrow py px (PullbackPr1 px · # G f) (PullbackPr2 px · # H f)
(FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β x y f) · PullbackPr1 py =
PullbackPr1 px · # G f
py2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 py px
  (PullbackPr1 px · # G f)
  (PullbackPr2 px · # H f)
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β x y f): PullbackArrow py px (PullbackPr1 px · # G f) (PullbackPr2 px · # H f)
(FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β x y f) · PullbackPr2 py =
PullbackPr2 px · # H f
PullbackArrow py px (PullbackPr1 px · # G f)
  (PullbackPr2 px · # H f)
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β x y f)
· PullbackPr2 py · # H g =
PullbackPr2 px · # H f · # H g

        
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
x, y, z: D
f: D ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: D ⟦ y, z ⟧
px:= hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x): Pullback (α x) (β x)
py:= hpb (F y) (G y) (H y) (α y) (β y): Pullback (α y) (β y)
pz:= hpb (F z) (G z) (H z) (α z) (β z): Pullback (α z) (β z)
pz1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 pz py
  (PullbackPr1 py · # G g)
  (PullbackPr2 py · # H g)
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β y z g): PullbackArrow pz py (PullbackPr1 py · # G g) (PullbackPr2 py · # H g)
(FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β y z g) · PullbackPr1 pz =
PullbackPr1 py · # G g
pz2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 pz py
  (PullbackPr1 py · # G g)
  (PullbackPr2 py · # H g)
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β y z g): PullbackArrow pz py (PullbackPr1 py · # G g) (PullbackPr2 py · # H g)
(FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β y z g) · PullbackPr2 pz =
PullbackPr2 py · # H g
py1:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 py px
  (PullbackPr1 px · # G f)
  (PullbackPr2 px · # H f)
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β x y f): PullbackArrow py px (PullbackPr1 px · # G f) (PullbackPr2 px · # H f)
(FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β x y f) · PullbackPr1 py =
PullbackPr1 px · # G f
py2:= PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 py px
  (PullbackPr1 px · # G f)
  (PullbackPr2 px · # H f)
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β x y f): PullbackArrow py px (PullbackPr1 px · # G f) (PullbackPr2 px · # H f)
(FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β x y f) · PullbackPr2 py =
PullbackPr2 px · # H f
PullbackArrow py px (PullbackPr1 px · # G f)
  (PullbackPr2 px · # H f)
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β x y f)
· PullbackPr2 py = PullbackPr2 px · # H f

        apply py2.
  Qed.

β: H ⟹ F
D ⟶ C

hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
d: D
C

        exact (PullbackObject (hpb _ _ _ (α d) (β d))).
      
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
∏ a b : D,
D ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ C ⟦ (λ d : D, hpb (F d) (G d) (H d) (α d) (β d)) a,
  (λ d : D, hpb (F d) (G d) (H d) (α d) (β d)) b ⟧
 
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
a, b: D
f: D ⟦ a, b ⟧
C ⟦ (λ d : D, hpb (F d) (G d) (H d) (α d) (β d)) a,
(λ d : D, hpb (F d) (G d) (H d) (α d) (β d)) b ⟧

        use (PullbackArrow (hpb _ _ _ (α b) (β b)) _
                           (PullbackPr1 (hpb _ _ _ (α a) (β a)) · (# G f))
                           (PullbackPr2 (hpb _ _ _ (α a) (β a)) · (# H f))
                           (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β a b f)).
    
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
is_functor
  (make_functor_data
     (λ d : D, hpb (F d) (G d) (H d) (α d) (β d))
     (λ (a b : D) (f : D ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      PullbackArrow
        (hpb (F b) (G b) (H b) (α b) (β b))
        (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a))
        (PullbackPr1
           (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a)) · # G f)
        (PullbackPr2
           (hpb (F a) (G a) (H a) (α a) (β a)) · # H f)
        (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β a b f)))
 exact (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_isfunctor F G H α β).
  Defined.

hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
is_nat_trans
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_functor F G H α β) G
  (λ x : D,
   PullbackPr1 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x)))

  (λ x : D,
   PullbackPr1 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x)))

    
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
x, x': D
f: D ⟦ x, x' ⟧
# (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_functor F G H α β) f
· PullbackPr1 (hpb (F x') (G x') (H x') (α x') (β x')) =
PullbackPr1 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
· # G f
 
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
x, x': D
f: D ⟦ x, x' ⟧
PullbackArrow (hpb (F x') (G x') (H x') (α x') (β x'))
  (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
  (PullbackPr1 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
   · # G f)
  (PullbackPr2 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
   · # H f)
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β x x' f)
· PullbackPr1 (hpb (F x') (G x') (H x') (α x') (β x')) =
PullbackPr1 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
· # G f

    
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
x, x': D
f: D ⟦ x, x' ⟧
px:= hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x): Pullback (α x) (β x)
PullbackArrow (hpb (F x') (G x') (H x') (α x') (β x'))
  px (PullbackPr1 px · # G f) (PullbackPr2 px · # H f)
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β x x' f)
· PullbackPr1 (hpb (F x') (G x') (H x') (α x') (β x')) =
PullbackPr1 px · # G f

    
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
x, x': D
f: D ⟦ x, x' ⟧
px:= hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x): Pullback (α x) (β x)
px':= hpb (F x') (G x') (H x') (α x') (β x'): Pullback (α x') (β x')
PullbackArrow px' px (PullbackPr1 px · # G f)
  (PullbackPr2 px · # H f)
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β x x' f)
· PullbackPr1 px' = PullbackPr1 px · # G f

    apply (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 px' px (PullbackPr1 px · # G f)
                                     (PullbackPr2 px · # H f)
                                     (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq
                                        F G H α β x x' f)).
  Qed.

  ((λ x : D,

 exact (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_is_nat_trans1 F G H α β).

D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C

β: H ⟹ F
x, x': D
f: D ⟦ x, x' ⟧

  (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
  (PullbackPr1 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
   · # G f)
  (PullbackPr2 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
   · # H f)
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β x x' f)
· PullbackPr2 (hpb (F x') (G x') (H x') (α x') (β x')) =
PullbackPr2 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))
· # H f

    
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
x, x': D
f: D ⟦ x, x' ⟧
px:= hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x): Pullback (α x) (β x)
PullbackArrow (hpb (F x') (G x') (H x') (α x') (β x'))
  px (PullbackPr1 px · # G f) (PullbackPr2 px · # H f)
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β x x' f)

D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
x, x': D
f: D ⟦ x, x' ⟧
px:= hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x): Pullback (α x) (β x)
px':= hpb (F x') (G x') (H x') (α x') (β x'): Pullback (α x') (β x')
PullbackArrow px' px (PullbackPr1 px · # G f)
  (PullbackPr2 px · # H f)
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq F G H α β x x' f)
· PullbackPr2 px' = PullbackPr2 px · # H f

    apply (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 px' px (PullbackPr1 px · # G f)
                                     (PullbackPr2 px · # H f)
                                     (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_eq
                                        F G H α β x x' f)).
  Qed.
