is_nat_trans
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_functor F G H α β) H
  ((λ x : D,
    PullbackPr2 (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x)))
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_functor F G H α β) H)
 exact (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_is_nat_trans2 F G H α β).

D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
nat_trans_comp
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_functor F G H α β) G F
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_nat_trans1 F G H α β) α =
nat_trans_comp
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_functor F G H α β) H F
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_nat_trans2 F G H α β) β

  
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
nat_trans_comp
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_functor F G H α β) G F
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_nat_trans1 F G H α β) α =
nat_trans_comp
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_functor F G H α β) H F
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_nat_trans2 F G H α β) β

    
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
∏ x : D,
nat_trans_comp
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_functor F G H α β) G F
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_nat_trans1 F G H α β) α x =
nat_trans_comp
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_functor F G H α β) H F
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_nat_trans2 F G H α β) β x
 
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: D ⟶ C
α: G ⟹ F
β: H ⟹ F
x: D
nat_trans_comp
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_functor F G H α β) G F
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_nat_trans1 F G H α β) α x =
nat_trans_comp
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_functor F G H α β) H F
  (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_nat_trans2 F G H α β) β x

    apply (PullbackSqrCommutes (hpb (F x) (G x) (H x) (α x) (β x))).
  Qed.

F, G, H: [D, C]
α: [D, C] ⟦ G, F ⟧
β: [D, C] ⟦ H, F ⟧
?p1 · α = ?p2 · β
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: [D, C]
α: [D, C] ⟦ G, F ⟧
β: [D, C] ⟦ H, F ⟧
isPullback ?H

    (* Pullback object *)
    
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: [D, C]
α: [D, C] ⟦ G, F ⟧
β: [D, C] ⟦ H, F ⟧
[D, C]
 exact (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_functor F G H α β).
    (* Pr1 *)
    
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: [D, C]
α: [D, C] ⟦ G, F ⟧
β: [D, C] ⟦ H, F ⟧
[D, C] ⟦ FunctorcategoryPullbacks_functor F G H α β, G
⟧
 exact (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_nat_trans1 F G H α β).
    (* Pr2 *)
    
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: [D, C]
α: [D, C] ⟦ G, F ⟧
β: [D, C] ⟦ H, F ⟧
[D, C] ⟦ FunctorcategoryPullbacks_functor F G H α β, H
⟧
 exact (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_nat_trans2 F G H α β).
    (* Commutativity of the square *)
    
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: [D, C]
α: [D, C] ⟦ G, F ⟧
β: [D, C] ⟦ H, F ⟧
FunctorcategoryPullbacks_nat_trans1 F G H α β · α =
FunctorcategoryPullbacks_nat_trans2 F G H α β · β
 exact (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_comm F G H α β).
    (* isPullback *)
    
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: [D, C]
α: [D, C] ⟦ G, F ⟧
β: [D, C] ⟦ H, F ⟧
isPullback (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_comm F G H α β)
 
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: [D, C]
α: [D, C] ⟦ G, F ⟧
β: [D, C] ⟦ H, F ⟧
∏ x : D,
isPullback
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise
     (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_comm F G H α β) x)
 
D, C: category
hpb: Pullbacks C
F, G, H: [D, C]
α: [D, C] ⟦ G, F ⟧
β: [D, C] ⟦ H, F ⟧
x: D
isPullback
  (nat_trans_eq_pointwise
     (FunctorcategoryPullbacks_comm F G H α β) x)
 apply isPullback_Pullback.
  Defined.

End pullbacks_functor_category.


Section pullback_up_to_iso.

  Context {C : category}.

  
C: category
a', a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
i: z_iso a a'
p1 · (f · i) = p2 · (g · i)

  
C: category
a', a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
i: z_iso a a'
p1 · (f · i) = p2 · (g · i)

    
C: category
a', a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
i: z_iso a a'
p1 · f · i = p2 · (g · i)
 
C: category
a', a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
i: z_iso a a'
p1 · f · i = p2 · g · i
 
C: category
a', a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
i: z_iso a a'
p2 · g · i = p2 · g · i
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C: category
a', a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
i: z_iso a a'
iPb: isPullback (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i)
isPullback H

  
C: category
a', a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
i: z_iso a a'
iPb: isPullback (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i)
isPullback H

    
C: category
a', a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
i: z_iso a a'
iPb: isPullback (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i)
Pb:= make_Pullback
  (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i) iPb: Pullback (f · i) (g · i)
isPullback H

    
C: category
a', a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
i: z_iso a a'
iPb: isPullback (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i)
Pb:= make_Pullback
  (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i) iPb: Pullback (f · i) (g · i)
∏ (e : C) (h : C ⟦ e, b ⟧) (k : C ⟦ e, c ⟧),
h · f = k · g
→ ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · p1 = h × hk · p2 = k

    
C: category
a', a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g

Pb:= make_Pullback
  (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i) iPb: Pullback (f · i) (g · i)
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hk: h · f = k · g
∃! hk : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, hk · p1 = h × hk · p2 = k

a', a, b, c, d: C

C ⟦ e, d ⟧

(λ t : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, t · p1 = h × t · p2 = k) ?x

?h0 · (f · i) = ?k · (g · i)

      
C: category
a', a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧

p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧

k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hk: h · f = k · g
C ⟦ e, b ⟧
 exact h.
      
C: category
a', a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧

Hk: h · f = k · g
C ⟦ e, c ⟧
 exact k.
      
C: category
a', a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g

Hk: h · f = k · g
h · (f · i) = k · (g · i)
 
C: category
a', a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
i: z_iso a a'
iPb: isPullback (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i)
Pb:= make_Pullback
  (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i) iPb: Pullback (f · i) (g · i)
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hk: h · f = k · g
h · f = k · g
 exact Hk.
    
C: category
a', a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
i: z_iso a a'
iPb: isPullback (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i)
Pb:= make_Pullback
  (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i) iPb: Pullback (f · i) (g · i)
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hk: h · f = k · g
(λ t : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, t · p1 = h × t · p2 = k)
  (PullbackArrow Pb e h k
     (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g h k Hk i))
 
C: category
a', a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
i: z_iso a a'
iPb: isPullback (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i)
Pb:= make_Pullback
  (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i) iPb: Pullback (f · i) (g · i)
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hk: h · f = k · g
PullbackArrow Pb e h k
  (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g h k Hk i) · p1 = h
C: category
a', a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
i: z_iso a a'
iPb: isPullback (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i)
Pb:= make_Pullback
  (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i) iPb: Pullback (f · i) (g · i)
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hk: h · f = k · g
PullbackArrow Pb e h k
  (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g h k Hk i) · p2 = k

      
C: category
a', a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
i: z_iso a a'
iPb: isPullback (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i)
Pb:= make_Pullback
  (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i) iPb: Pullback (f · i) (g · i)
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hk: h · f = k · g
PullbackArrow Pb e h k
  (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g h k Hk i) · p1 = h
 exact (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1 Pb e h k (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g h k Hk i)).
      
C: category
a', a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
i: z_iso a a'
iPb: isPullback (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i)
Pb:= make_Pullback
  (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i) iPb: Pullback (f · i) (g · i)
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hk: h · f = k · g
PullbackArrow Pb e h k
  (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g h k Hk i) · p2 = k
 exact (PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2 Pb e h k (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g h k Hk i)).
    
C: category
a', a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
i: z_iso a a'
iPb: isPullback (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i)
Pb:= make_Pullback
  (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i) iPb: Pullback (f · i) (g · i)
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hk: h · f = k · g
∏ y : C ⟦ e, d ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, t · p1 = h × t · p2 = k) y)
 
C: category
a', a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
i: z_iso a a'
iPb: isPullback (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i)
Pb:= make_Pullback
  (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i) iPb: Pullback (f · i) (g · i)
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hk: h · f = k · g
y: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
isaprop
  ((λ t : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, t · p1 = h × t · p2 = k) y)
 apply isapropdirprod; apply C.
    
C: category
a', a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
i: z_iso a a'
iPb: isPullback (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i)
Pb:= make_Pullback
  (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i) iPb: Pullback (f · i) (g · i)
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hk: h · f = k · g
∏ y : C ⟦ e, d ⟧,
(λ t : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, t · p1 = h × t · p2 = k) y
→ y =
  PullbackArrow Pb e h k
    (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g h k Hk i)
 
C: category
a', a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
i: z_iso a a'
iPb: isPullback (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i)
Pb:= make_Pullback
  (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i) iPb: Pullback (f · i) (g · i)
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hk: h · f = k · g
y: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
X: (λ t : C ⟦ e, d ⟧, t · p1 = h × t · p2 = k) y
y =
PullbackArrow Pb e h k
  (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g h k Hk i)
 
C: category
a', a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
i: z_iso a a'
iPb: isPullback (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i)
Pb:= make_Pullback
  (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i) iPb: Pullback (f · i) (g · i)
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hk: h · f = k · g
y: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
X: y · p1 = h × y · p2 = k
y =
PullbackArrow Pb e h k
  (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g h k Hk i)

      
C: category
a', a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
i: z_iso a a'
iPb: isPullback (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i)
Pb:= make_Pullback
  (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i) iPb: Pullback (f · i) (g · i)
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hk: h · f = k · g
y: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
X: y · p1 = h × y · p2 = k
y · PullbackPr1 Pb = h
C: category
a', a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
i: z_iso a a'
iPb: isPullback (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i)
Pb:= make_Pullback
  (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i) iPb: Pullback (f · i) (g · i)
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hk: h · f = k · g
y: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
X: y · p1 = h × y · p2 = k
y · PullbackPr2 Pb = k

      
C: category
a', a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
i: z_iso a a'
iPb: isPullback (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i)
Pb:= make_Pullback
  (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i) iPb: Pullback (f · i) (g · i)
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hk: h · f = k · g
y: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
X: y · p1 = h × y · p2 = k
y · PullbackPr1 Pb = h
 exact (dirprod_pr1 X).
      
C: category
a', a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
i: z_iso a a'
iPb: isPullback (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i)
Pb:= make_Pullback
  (isPullback_up_to_z_iso_eq f g p1 p2 H i) iPb: Pullback (f · i) (g · i)
e: C
h: C ⟦ e, b ⟧
k: C ⟦ e, c ⟧
Hk: h · f = k · g
y: C ⟦ e, d ⟧
X: y · p1 = h × y · p2 = k
y · PullbackPr2 Pb = k
 exact (dirprod_pr2 X).
  Qed. (* why opaque? *)

End pullback_up_to_iso.

Section pullback_paths.

  Context {C : category}.

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p11, p21: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p12, p22: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
e1: f1 = f2
e2: g1 = g2
e3: p11 = p21
e4: p12 = p22
H1: p11 · f1 = p12 · g1
H2: p21 · f2 = p22 · g2
iPb: isPullback H1
isPullback H2

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p11, p21: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p12, p22: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
e1: f1 = f2
e2: g1 = g2
e3: p11 = p21
e4: p12 = p22
H1: p11 · f1 = p12 · g1
H2: p21 · f2 = p22 · g2
iPb: isPullback H1
isPullback H2

    
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g1: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p11: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p12: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H1, H2: p11 · f1 = p12 · g1
iPb: isPullback H1
isPullback H2

    
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g1: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p11: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p12: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H1, H2: p11 · f1 = p12 · g1
iPb: isPullback H1
e5: H1 = H2
isPullback H2

    
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g1: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p11: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p12: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H1: p11 · f1 = p12 · g1
iPb: isPullback H1
isPullback H1

    exact iPb.
  Qed.

  
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p11, p21: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p12, p22: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
e1: f1 = f2
e2: g1 = g2
e3: p11 = p21
e4: p12 = p22
H1: p11 · f1 = p12 · g1
iPb: isPullback H1
∑ H2 : p21 · f2 = p22 · g2, isPullback H2

a, b, c, d: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ c, a ⟧

p12, p22: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
e1: f1 = f2
e2: g1 = g2
e3: p11 = p21
e4: p12 = p22
H1: p11 · f1 = p12 · g1
iPb: isPullback H1
∑ H2 : p21 · f2 = p22 · g2, isPullback H2

a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g1: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p11: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p12: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H1: p11 · f1 = p12 · g1
iPb: isPullback H1
∑ H2 : p11 · f1 = p12 · g1, isPullback H2

    
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g1: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p11: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p12: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H1: p11 · f1 = p12 · g1
iPb: isPullback H1
p11 · f1 = p12 · g1
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g1: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p11: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p12: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H1: p11 · f1 = p12 · g1
iPb: isPullback H1
(λ H2 : p11 · f1 = p12 · g1, isPullback H2) ?pr1

    
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g1: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p11: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p12: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H1: p11 · f1 = p12 · g1
iPb: isPullback H1
p11 · f1 = p12 · g1
 exact H1.
    
C: category
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g1: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
p11: C ⟦ d, b ⟧
p12: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
H1: p11 · f1 = p12 · g1
iPb: isPullback H1
(λ H2 : p11 · f1 = p12 · g1, isPullback H2) H1
 exact iPb.
  Defined.

  
C: category
a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
e1: f1 = f2
e2: g1 = g2
pb: Pullback f1 g1
Pullback f2 g2

a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
e1: f1 = f2
e2: g1 = g2
pb: Pullback f1 g1
Pullback f2 g2

a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
e1: f1 = f2
e2: g1 = g2
pb: Pullback f1 g1
C
C: category
a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
e1: f1 = f2
e2: g1 = g2
pb: Pullback f1 g1
C ⟦ ?d, b ⟧
C: category
a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
e1: f1 = f2
e2: g1 = g2
pb: Pullback f1 g1
C ⟦ ?d, c ⟧
C: category
a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
e1: f1 = f2
e2: g1 = g2
pb: Pullback f1 g1
?p1 · f2 = ?p2 · g2
C: category
a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
e1: f1 = f2
e2: g1 = g2
pb: Pullback f1 g1
isPullback ?H

    
C: category
a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
e1: f1 = f2
e2: g1 = g2
pb: Pullback f1 g1
C
 exact pb.
    
C: category
a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
e1: f1 = f2
e2: g1 = g2
pb: Pullback f1 g1
C ⟦ pb, b ⟧
 exact (PullbackPr1 pb).
    
C: category
a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
e1: f1 = f2
e2: g1 = g2
pb: Pullback f1 g1
C ⟦ pb, c ⟧
 exact (PullbackPr2 pb).
    
C: category
a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
e1: f1 = f2
e2: g1 = g2
pb: Pullback f1 g1
PullbackPr1 pb · f2 = PullbackPr2 pb · g2
 abstract (rewrite <-e1, <-e2; use PullbackSqrCommutes).
    
C: category
a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
e1: f1 = f2
e2: g1 = g2
pb: Pullback f1 g1
isPullback
  (Pullback_mor_paths_subproof a b c f1 f2 g1 g2 e1 e2
     pb)
 
C: category
a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
e1: f1 = f2
e2: g1 = g2
pb: Pullback f1 g1
PullbackPr1 pb · f1 = PullbackPr2 pb · g1
C: category
a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
e1: f1 = f2
e2: g1 = g2
pb: Pullback f1 g1
isPullback ?H1

      
C: category
a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
e1: f1 = f2
e2: g1 = g2
pb: Pullback f1 g1
PullbackPr1 pb · f1 = PullbackPr2 pb · g1
 apply PullbackSqrCommutes.
      
C: category
a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
e1: f1 = f2
e2: g1 = g2
pb: Pullback f1 g1
isPullback (PullbackSqrCommutes pb)
 apply isPullback_Pullback.
  Defined.

End pullback_paths.


M: category
X: Type
j: X → M
a, b, c, d: induced_category M j
f: induced_category M j ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: induced_category M j ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: induced_category M j ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: induced_category M j ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
isPullback H → isPullback H


M: category
X: Type
j: X → M
a, b, c, d: induced_category M j
f: induced_category M j ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: induced_category M j ⟦ c, a ⟧
p1: induced_category M j ⟦ d, b ⟧
p2: induced_category M j ⟦ d, c ⟧
H: p1 · f = p2 · g
isPullback H → isPullback H

  exact (λ pb T, pb (j T)).
Qed. (* why opaque? *)

(**
 The type of pullbacks on a given diagram is a proposition
 *)

C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁, p₂: Pullback f g
e₁: p₁ = p₂
e₂: idtoiso e₁ · PullbackPr1 p₂ = PullbackPr1 p₁
e₃: idtoiso e₁ · PullbackPr2 p₂ = PullbackPr2 p₁
p₁ = p₂


C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁, p₂: Pullback f g
e₁: p₁ = p₂
e₂: idtoiso e₁ · PullbackPr1 p₂ = PullbackPr1 p₁
e₃: idtoiso e₁ · PullbackPr2 p₂ = PullbackPr2 p₁
p₁ = p₂

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁, p₂: Pullback f g
e₁: p₁ = p₂
e₂: idtoiso e₁ · PullbackPr1 p₂ = PullbackPr1 p₁
e₃: idtoiso e₁ · PullbackPr2 p₂ = PullbackPr2 p₁
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : ∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, x ⟧ × C ⟦ p, y ⟧,
   ∑ H : pr12 x0 · f = pr22 x0 · g, isPullback H)
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁, p₂: Pullback f g
e₁: p₁ = p₂
e₂: idtoiso e₁ · PullbackPr1 p₂ = PullbackPr1 p₁
e₃: idtoiso e₁ · PullbackPr2 p₂ = PullbackPr2 p₁
pr1 p₁ = pr1 p₂

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁, p₂: Pullback f g
e₁: p₁ = p₂
e₂: idtoiso e₁ · PullbackPr1 p₂ = PullbackPr1 p₁
e₃: idtoiso e₁ · PullbackPr2 p₂ = PullbackPr2 p₁
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : ∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, x ⟧ × C ⟦ p, y ⟧,
   ∑ H : pr12 x0 · f = pr22 x0 · g, isPullback H)

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁, p₂: Pullback f g
e₁: p₁ = p₂
e₂: idtoiso e₁ · PullbackPr1 p₂ = PullbackPr1 p₁
e₃: idtoiso e₁ · PullbackPr2 p₂ = PullbackPr2 p₁
x0: ∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, x ⟧ × C ⟦ p, y ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ H : pr12 x0 · f = pr22 x0 · g, isPullback H)

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁, p₂: Pullback f g
e₁: p₁ = p₂
e₂: idtoiso e₁ · PullbackPr1 p₂ = PullbackPr1 p₁
e₃: idtoiso e₁ · PullbackPr2 p₂ = PullbackPr2 p₁
x0: ∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, x ⟧ × C ⟦ p, y ⟧
isPredicate (isPullback (p2:=pr22 x0))
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁, p₂: Pullback f g
e₁: p₁ = p₂
e₂: idtoiso e₁ · PullbackPr1 p₂ = PullbackPr1 p₁
e₃: idtoiso e₁ · PullbackPr2 p₂ = PullbackPr2 p₁
x0: ∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, x ⟧ × C ⟦ p, y ⟧
∏ x1 y0 : pr12 x0 · f = pr22 x0 · g,
isPullback x1 → isPullback y0 → x1 = y0

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁, p₂: Pullback f g
e₁: p₁ = p₂
e₂: idtoiso e₁ · PullbackPr1 p₂ = PullbackPr1 p₁
e₃: idtoiso e₁ · PullbackPr2 p₂ = PullbackPr2 p₁
x0: ∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, x ⟧ × C ⟦ p, y ⟧
isPredicate (isPullback (p2:=pr22 x0))

      
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁, p₂: Pullback f g
e₁: p₁ = p₂
e₂: idtoiso e₁ · PullbackPr1 p₂ = PullbackPr1 p₁
e₃: idtoiso e₁ · PullbackPr2 p₂ = PullbackPr2 p₁
x0: ∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, x ⟧ × C ⟦ p, y ⟧
x1: pr12 x0 · f = pr22 x0 · g
isaprop (isPullback x1)

      apply isaprop_isPullback.
    
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁, p₂: Pullback f g
e₁: p₁ = p₂
e₂: idtoiso e₁ · PullbackPr1 p₂ = PullbackPr1 p₁
e₃: idtoiso e₁ · PullbackPr2 p₂ = PullbackPr2 p₁
x0: ∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, x ⟧ × C ⟦ p, y ⟧
∏ x1 y0 : pr12 x0 · f = pr22 x0 · g,
isPullback x1 → isPullback y0 → x1 = y0

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁, p₂: Pullback f g
e₁: p₁ = p₂
e₂: idtoiso e₁ · PullbackPr1 p₂ = PullbackPr1 p₁
e₃: idtoiso e₁ · PullbackPr2 p₂ = PullbackPr2 p₁
x0: ∑ p : C, C ⟦ p, x ⟧ × C ⟦ p, y ⟧
x1, y0: pr12 x0 · f = pr22 x0 · g
X: isPullback x1
X0: isPullback y0
x1 = y0

    apply homset_property.
  
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁, p₂: Pullback f g
e₁: p₁ = p₂
e₂: idtoiso e₁ · PullbackPr1 p₂ = PullbackPr1 p₁
e₃: idtoiso e₁ · PullbackPr2 p₂ = PullbackPr2 p₁
pr1 p₁ = pr1 p₂

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁: C
h₁: C ⟦ p₁, x ⟧
k₁: C ⟦ p₁, y ⟧
pr2: ∑ H : pr12 (p₁,, h₁,, k₁) · f = pr22 (p₁,, h₁,, k₁) · g, isPullback H
p₂: Pullback f g
e₁: (p₁,, h₁,, k₁),, pr2 = p₂
e₂: idtoiso e₁ · PullbackPr1 p₂ =
PullbackPr1 ((p₁,, h₁,, k₁),, pr2)
e₃: idtoiso e₁ · PullbackPr2 p₂ =
PullbackPr2 ((p₁,, h₁,, k₁),, pr2)
pr1 ((p₁,, h₁,, k₁),, pr2) = pr1 p₂

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁: C
h₁: C ⟦ p₁, x ⟧
k₁: C ⟦ p₁, y ⟧
pr2: ∑ H : pr12 (p₁,, h₁,, k₁) · f = pr22 (p₁,, h₁,, k₁) · g, isPullback H
p₂: C
h₂: C ⟦ p₂, x ⟧
k₂: C ⟦ p₂, y ⟧
pr0: ∑ H : pr12 (p₂,, h₂,, k₂) · f = pr22 (p₂,, h₂,, k₂) · g, isPullback H
e₁: (p₁,, h₁,, k₁),, pr2 = (p₂,, h₂,, k₂),, pr0
e₂: idtoiso e₁ · PullbackPr1 ((p₂,, h₂,, k₂),, pr0) =
PullbackPr1 ((p₁,, h₁,, k₁),, pr2)
e₃: idtoiso e₁ · PullbackPr2 ((p₂,, h₂,, k₂),, pr0) =
PullbackPr2 ((p₁,, h₁,, k₁),, pr2)
pr1 ((p₁,, h₁,, k₁),, pr2) =
pr1 ((p₂,, h₂,, k₂),, pr0)

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁: C
h₁: C ⟦ p₁, x ⟧
k₁: C ⟦ p₁, y ⟧
pr2: ∑ H : h₁ · f = k₁ · g, isPullback H
p₂: C
h₂: C ⟦ p₂, x ⟧
k₂: C ⟦ p₂, y ⟧
pr0: ∑ H : h₂ · f = k₂ · g, isPullback H
e₁: p₁ = p₂
e₂: idtoiso e₁ · h₂ = h₁
e₃: idtoiso e₁ · k₂ = k₁
p₁,, h₁,, k₁ = p₂,, h₂,, k₂

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁: C
h₁: C ⟦ p₁, x ⟧
k₁: C ⟦ p₁, y ⟧
pr2: ∑ H : h₁ · f = k₁ · g, isPullback H
h₂: C ⟦ p₁, x ⟧
k₂: C ⟦ p₁, y ⟧
pr0: ∑ H : h₂ · f = k₂ · g, isPullback H
e₂: idtoiso (idpath p₁) · h₂ = h₁
e₃: idtoiso (idpath p₁) · k₂ = k₁
p₁,, h₁,, k₁ = p₁,, h₂,, k₂

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁: C
h₁: C ⟦ p₁, x ⟧
k₁: C ⟦ p₁, y ⟧
pr2: ∑ H : h₁ · f = k₁ · g, isPullback H
h₂: C ⟦ p₁, x ⟧
k₂: C ⟦ p₁, y ⟧
pr0: ∑ H : h₂ · f = k₂ · g, isPullback H
e₂: identity p₁ · h₂ = h₁
e₃: identity p₁ · k₂ = k₁
p₁,, h₁,, k₁ = p₁,, h₂,, k₂

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁: C
h₁: C ⟦ p₁, x ⟧
k₁: C ⟦ p₁, y ⟧
pr2: ∑ H : h₁ · f = k₁ · g, isPullback H
h₂: C ⟦ p₁, x ⟧
k₂: C ⟦ p₁, y ⟧
pr0: ∑ H : h₂ · f = k₂ · g, isPullback H
e₂: h₂ = h₁
e₃: k₂ = k₁
p₁,, h₁,, k₁ = p₁,, h₂,, k₂

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁: C
h₁: C ⟦ p₁, x ⟧
k₁: C ⟦ p₁, y ⟧
pr2: ∑ H : h₁ · f = k₁ · g, isPullback H
h₂: C ⟦ p₁, x ⟧
k₂: C ⟦ p₁, y ⟧
pr0: ∑ H : h₂ · f = k₂ · g, isPullback H
e₂: h₂ = h₁
e₃: k₂ = k₁
h₁,, k₁ = h₂,, k₂

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁: C
h₁: C ⟦ p₁, x ⟧
k₁: C ⟦ p₁, y ⟧
pr2: ∑ H : h₁ · f = k₁ · g, isPullback H
h₂: C ⟦ p₁, x ⟧
k₂: C ⟦ p₁, y ⟧
pr0: ∑ H : h₂ · f = k₂ · g, isPullback H
e₂: h₂ = h₁
e₃: k₂ = k₁
h₁ = h₂
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁: C
h₁: C ⟦ p₁, x ⟧
k₁: C ⟦ p₁, y ⟧
pr2: ∑ H : h₁ · f = k₁ · g, isPullback H
h₂: C ⟦ p₁, x ⟧
k₂: C ⟦ p₁, y ⟧
pr0: ∑ H : h₂ · f = k₂ · g, isPullback H
e₂: h₂ = h₁
e₃: k₂ = k₁
k₁ = k₂

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁: C
h₁: C ⟦ p₁, x ⟧
k₁: C ⟦ p₁, y ⟧
pr2: ∑ H : h₁ · f = k₁ · g, isPullback H
h₂: C ⟦ p₁, x ⟧
k₂: C ⟦ p₁, y ⟧
pr0: ∑ H : h₂ · f = k₂ · g, isPullback H
e₂: h₂ = h₁
e₃: k₂ = k₁
h₁ = h₂
 exact (!e₂).
  
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁: C
h₁: C ⟦ p₁, x ⟧
k₁: C ⟦ p₁, y ⟧
pr2: ∑ H : h₁ · f = k₁ · g, isPullback H
h₂: C ⟦ p₁, x ⟧
k₂: C ⟦ p₁, y ⟧
pr0: ∑ H : h₂ · f = k₂ · g, isPullback H
e₂: h₂ = h₁
e₃: k₂ = k₁
k₁ = k₂
 exact (!e₃).
Qed.


C: category
HC: is_univalent C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
isaprop (Pullback f g)


C: category
HC: is_univalent C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
isaprop (Pullback f g)

  
C: category
HC: is_univalent C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
isProofIrrelevant (Pullback f g)

  
C: category
HC: is_univalent C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁, p₂: Pullback f g
p₁ = p₂

  
C: category
HC: is_univalent C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁, p₂: Pullback f g
p₁ = p₂
C: category
HC: is_univalent C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁, p₂: Pullback f g
idtoiso ?e₁ · PullbackPr1 p₂ = PullbackPr1 p₁
C: category
HC: is_univalent C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁, p₂: Pullback f g
idtoiso ?e₁ · PullbackPr2 p₂ = PullbackPr2 p₁

  
C: category
HC: is_univalent C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁, p₂: Pullback f g
p₁ = p₂
 
C: category
HC: is_univalent C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁, p₂: Pullback f g
z_iso p₁ p₂

    apply z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback.
  
C: category
HC: is_univalent C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁, p₂: Pullback f g
idtoiso
  (isotoid C HC
     (z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback p₁ p₂))
· PullbackPr1 p₂ = PullbackPr1 p₁
 
C: category
HC: is_univalent C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁, p₂: Pullback f g
from_Pullback_to_Pullback p₁ p₂ · PullbackPr1 p₂ =
PullbackPr1 p₁

    apply PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1.
  
C: category
HC: is_univalent C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁, p₂: Pullback f g
idtoiso
  (isotoid C HC
     (z_iso_from_Pullback_to_Pullback p₁ p₂))
· PullbackPr2 p₂ = PullbackPr2 p₁
 
C: category
HC: is_univalent C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p₁, p₂: Pullback f g
from_Pullback_to_Pullback p₁ p₂ · PullbackPr2 p₂ =
PullbackPr2 p₁

    apply PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2.
Qed.

(**
 Isos between pullbacks
 *)
Section IsoIsPullback.

  Context {C : category}
          {x y z : C}
          {f : x --> z}
          {g : y --> z}
          {pb pb' : C}
          {π₁ : pb --> x}
          {π₂ : pb --> y}
          (sqr : π₁ · f = π₂ · g)
          {π₁' : pb' --> x}
          {π₂' : pb' --> y}
          (sqr' : π₁' · f = π₂' · g)
          (H : isPullback sqr)
          (i : z_iso pb pb')
          (iπ₁' : i · π₁' = π₁)
          (iπ₂' : i · π₂' = π₂).

  Let P : Pullback f g := make_Pullback _ H.

  Section UMP.

    Context {w : C}
            {h₁ : w --> x}
            {h₂ : w --> y}
            (q : h₁ · f = h₂ · g).

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y ⟧
sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g
H: isPullback sqr
i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
isaprop
  (∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb' ⟧, hk · π₁' = h₁ × hk · π₂' = h₂)

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y ⟧
sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g
H: isPullback sqr
i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
isaprop
  (∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb' ⟧, hk · π₁' = h₁ × hk · π₂' = h₂)

      
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y ⟧
sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g
H: isPullback sqr
i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb' ⟧, hk · π₁' = h₁ × hk · π₂' = h₂)

      
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y ⟧
sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g
H: isPullback sqr
i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb' ⟧,
hk · π₁' = h₁ × hk · π₂' = h₂
φ₁ = φ₂

      
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y ⟧
sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g
H: isPullback sqr
i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb' ⟧,
hk · π₁' = h₁ × hk · π₂' = h₂
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : C ⟦ w, pb' ⟧, x0 · π₁' = h₁ × x0 · π₂' = h₂)
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y ⟧
sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g
H: isPullback sqr
i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb' ⟧,
hk · π₁' = h₁ × hk · π₂' = h₂
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

      
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y ⟧
sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g
H: isPullback sqr
i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb' ⟧,
hk · π₁' = h₁ × hk · π₂' = h₂
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : C ⟦ w, pb' ⟧, x0 · π₁' = h₁ × x0 · π₂' = h₂)

        
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y ⟧
sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g
H: isPullback sqr
i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb' ⟧,
hk · π₁' = h₁ × hk · π₂' = h₂
x0: C ⟦ w, pb' ⟧
isaprop (x0 · π₁' = h₁ × x0 · π₂' = h₂)

        apply isapropdirprod ; apply homset_property.
      
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y ⟧
sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g
H: isPullback sqr
i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb' ⟧,
hk · π₁' = h₁ × hk · π₂' = h₂
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

      
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y ⟧
sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g
H: isPullback sqr
i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb' ⟧,
hk · π₁' = h₁ × hk · π₂' = h₂
pr1 φ₁ · identity pb' = pr1 φ₂ · identity pb'

      
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y ⟧
sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g
H: isPullback sqr
i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb' ⟧,
hk · π₁' = h₁ × hk · π₂' = h₂
pr1 φ₁ · (inv_from_z_iso i · i) =
pr1 φ₂ · (inv_from_z_iso i · i)

      
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y ⟧
sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g
H: isPullback sqr
i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb' ⟧,
hk · π₁' = h₁ × hk · π₂' = h₂
pr1 φ₁ · inv_from_z_iso i · i =
pr1 φ₂ · inv_from_z_iso i · i

      
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y ⟧
sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g
H: isPullback sqr
i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb' ⟧,
hk · π₁' = h₁ × hk · π₂' = h₂
pr1 φ₁ · inv_from_z_iso i = pr1 φ₂ · inv_from_z_iso i

      
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y ⟧
sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g
H: isPullback sqr
i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb' ⟧,
hk · π₁' = h₁ × hk · π₂' = h₂
pr1 φ₁ · inv_from_z_iso i · π₁ =
pr1 φ₂ · inv_from_z_iso i · π₁

sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g

i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g

h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g

pr1 φ₁ · inv_from_z_iso i · π₂ =
pr1 φ₂ · inv_from_z_iso i · π₂

C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y ⟧
sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g
H: isPullback sqr
i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb' ⟧,
hk · π₁' = h₁ × hk · π₂' = h₂
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : C ⟦ pb, x ⟧, inv_from_z_iso i · z) iπ₁': (λ z : C ⟦ pb, x ⟧, inv_from_z_iso i · z)
  (i · π₁') =
(λ z : C ⟦ pb, x ⟧, inv_from_z_iso i · z) π₁
pr1 φ₁ · inv_from_z_iso i · π₁ =
pr1 φ₂ · inv_from_z_iso i · π₁

x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g

π₂': C ⟦ pb', y ⟧
sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g

i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g

h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb' ⟧,
hk · π₁' = h₁ × hk · π₂' = h₂
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : C ⟦ pb, x ⟧, inv_from_z_iso i · z) iπ₁': inv_from_z_iso i · (i · π₁') =
inv_from_z_iso i · π₁
pr1 φ₁ · inv_from_z_iso i · π₁ =
pr1 φ₂ · inv_from_z_iso i · π₁

pr1 φ₂ · inv_from_z_iso i · π₁

C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y ⟧
sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g
H: isPullback sqr
i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb' ⟧,
hk · π₁' = h₁ × hk · π₂' = h₂
p: π₂' = inv_from_z_iso i · π₂
pr1 φ₁ · π₂' = pr1 φ₂ · π₂'

        exact (pr22 φ₁ @ !(pr22 φ₂)).
    Qed.

    Definition isPullback_z_iso_mor
      : w --> pb'
      := PullbackArrow P _ h₁ h₂ q · i.

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y ⟧
sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g
H: isPullback sqr
i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
isPullback_z_iso_mor · π₁' = h₁

x, y, z: C

pb, pb': C

q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
isPullback_z_iso_mor · π₁' = h₁

      
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g

sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g

i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂

w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
PullbackArrow P w h₁ h₂ q · i · π₁' = h₁

x, y, z: C

π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y ⟧
sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g
H: isPullback sqr
i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
PullbackArrow P w h₁ h₂ q · (i · π₁') = h₁

      
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y ⟧
sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g
H: isPullback sqr
i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
PullbackArrow P w h₁ h₂ q · (i · π₁') = ?b

x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y ⟧
sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g
H: isPullback sqr
i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
?b = h₁

pb, pb': C

i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
PullbackArrow P w h₁ h₂ q · (i · π₁') = ?b

        
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g

sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g
H: isPullback sqr
i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
i · π₁' = ?t2

        exact iπ₁'.
      
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y ⟧
sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g
H: isPullback sqr
i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
PullbackArrow P w h₁ h₂ q · π₁ = h₁

      apply PullbackArrow_PullbackPr1.
    Qed.

C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g

π₂': C ⟦ pb', y ⟧
sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g

i: z_iso pb pb'

iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
PullbackArrow P w h₁ h₂ q · π₂ = h₂

      apply PullbackArrow_PullbackPr2.
    Qed.

  End UMP.

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y ⟧
sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g
H: isPullback sqr
i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
isPullback sqr'

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y ⟧
sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g
H: isPullback sqr
i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
isPullback sqr'

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y ⟧
sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g
H: isPullback sqr
i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
∃! hk : C ⟦ w, pb' ⟧, hk · π₁' = h₁ × hk · π₂' = h₂

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y ⟧
sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g
H: isPullback sqr
i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
isaprop
  (∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb' ⟧, hk · π₁' = h₁ × hk · π₂' = h₂)
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧

sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g
H: isPullback sqr
i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb' ⟧, hk · π₁' = h₁ × hk · π₂' = h₂

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y ⟧
sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g

i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
isaprop
  (∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb' ⟧, hk · π₁' = h₁ × hk · π₂' = h₂)
 apply isPullback_z_iso_unique.

g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧

iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
∑ hk : C ⟦ w, pb' ⟧, hk · π₁' = h₁ × hk · π₂' = h₂
 
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C

iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂

h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧

q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g

iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂

C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g

sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g

iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂

h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧

 apply isPullback_z_iso_pr1.
      
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
pb, pb': C
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y ⟧
sqr': π₁' · f = π₂' · g
H: isPullback sqr
i: z_iso pb pb'
iπ₁': i · π₁' = π₁
iπ₂': i · π₂' = π₂
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
w: C
h₁: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: C ⟦ w, y ⟧
q: h₁ · f = h₂ · g
isPullback_z_iso_mor q · π₂' = h₂
 apply isPullback_z_iso_pr2.
  Defined.

End IsoIsPullback.

(**
 A general statement to get isos between pullbacks
 *)
Section IsoOfPullbacks.

  Context {C : category}
          {pb pb' x x' y y' z z' : C}
          {f : x --> z}
          {f' : x' --> z'}
          {g : y --> z}
          {g' : y' --> z'}
          {π₁ : pb --> x}
          {π₂ : pb --> y}
          {π₁' : pb' --> x'}
          {π₂' : pb' --> y'}
          (sqr : π₁ · f = π₂ · g)
          (sqr' : π₁' · f' = π₂' · g')
          (H : isPullback sqr)
          (H' : isPullback sqr')
          (ix : z_iso x x')
          (iy : z_iso y y')
          (iz : z_iso z z')
          (pf : ix · f' = f · iz)
          (pg : iy · g' = g · iz).

  Let P : Pullback f g := make_Pullback _ H.
  Let P' : Pullback f' g' := make_Pullback _ H'.

  
C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x' ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
inv_from_z_iso ix · f = f' · inv_from_z_iso iz

f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧

π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧

π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧

sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'

iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g

inv_from_z_iso ix · f = f' · inv_from_z_iso iz

pg: iy · g' = g · iz

C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x' ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
inv_from_z_iso ix · (f · iz) = f'

    
C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x' ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
f · iz = ix · f'

    exact (!pf).
  Qed.

f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧

π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz

C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x' ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
π₁ · ix · f' = π₂ · iy · g'

    abstract
      (rewrite !assoc' ;
       rewrite pf, pg ;
       rewrite !assoc ;
       apply maponpaths_2 ;
       exact sqr).
  Defined.

  
C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧

g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x' ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
C ⟦ pb', pb ⟧

  
C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x' ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'

C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x' ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
π₁' · inv_from_z_iso ix · f =
π₂' · inv_from_z_iso iy · g

    abstract
      (rewrite !assoc' ;
       rewrite iso_between_pullbacks_help_path, iso_between_pullbacks_other_help_path ;
       rewrite !assoc ;
       apply maponpaths_2 ;
       exact sqr').
  Defined.

  
C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x' ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
is_inverse_in_precat iso_between_pullbacks_map
  iso_between_pullbacks_inv

  
C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x' ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
is_inverse_in_precat iso_between_pullbacks_map
  iso_between_pullbacks_inv

    
C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x' ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
PullbackArrow P' pb (π₁ · ix) (π₂ · iy)
  iso_between_pullbacks_map_subproof
· PullbackArrow P pb' (π₁' · inv_from_z_iso ix)
    (π₂' · inv_from_z_iso iy)
    iso_between_pullbacks_inv_subproof = identity pb
C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x' ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
PullbackArrow P pb' (π₁' · inv_from_z_iso ix)
  (π₂' · inv_from_z_iso iy)
  iso_between_pullbacks_inv_subproof
· PullbackArrow P' pb (π₁ · ix) 
    (π₂ · iy) iso_between_pullbacks_map_subproof =
identity pb'

    
C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x' ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
PullbackArrow P' pb (π₁ · ix) (π₂ · iy)
  iso_between_pullbacks_map_subproof
· PullbackArrow P pb' (π₁' · inv_from_z_iso ix)
    (π₂' · inv_from_z_iso iy)
    iso_between_pullbacks_inv_subproof = identity pb
 
C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x' ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
PullbackArrow P' pb (π₁ · ix) (π₂ · iy)
  iso_between_pullbacks_map_subproof
· PullbackArrow P pb' (π₁' · inv_from_z_iso ix)
    (π₂' · inv_from_z_iso iy)
    iso_between_pullbacks_inv_subproof · π₁ =
identity pb · π₁
C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x' ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
PullbackArrow P' pb (π₁ · ix) 
  (π₂ · iy) iso_between_pullbacks_map_subproof
· PullbackArrow P pb' (π₁' · inv_from_z_iso ix)
    (π₂' · inv_from_z_iso iy)
    iso_between_pullbacks_inv_subproof · π₂ =
identity pb · π₂

      
C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x' ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
PullbackArrow P' pb (π₁ · ix) (π₂ · iy)
  iso_between_pullbacks_map_subproof
· PullbackArrow P pb' (π₁' · inv_from_z_iso ix)
    (π₂' · inv_from_z_iso iy)
    iso_between_pullbacks_inv_subproof · π₁ =
identity pb · π₁
 
C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x' ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
PullbackArrow P' pb (π₁ · ix) (π₂ · iy)
  iso_between_pullbacks_map_subproof
· (PullbackArrow P pb' (π₁' · inv_from_z_iso ix)
     (π₂' · inv_from_z_iso iy)
     iso_between_pullbacks_inv_subproof · π₁) =
identity pb · π₁

        
C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x' ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
PullbackArrow P' pb (π₁ · ix) (π₂ · iy)
  iso_between_pullbacks_map_subproof
· (π₁' · inv_from_z_iso ix) = identity pb · π₁

        
C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x' ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
PullbackArrow P' pb (π₁ · ix) (π₂ · iy)
  iso_between_pullbacks_map_subproof · π₁'
· inv_from_z_iso ix = identity pb · π₁

        
C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧

π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
π₁ · ix · inv_from_z_iso ix = identity pb · π₁

        
C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧

g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧

π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧

sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
π₁ · (ix · inv_from_z_iso ix) = identity pb · π₁

        
C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x' ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
π₁ · identity x = identity pb · π₁

        
C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x' ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
π₁ = π₁

        apply idpath.

    (π₂' · inv_from_z_iso iy)
    iso_between_pullbacks_inv_subproof · π₂ =
identity pb · π₂

ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'

pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x' ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g

PullbackArrow P pb' (π₁' · inv_from_z_iso ix)
  (π₂' · inv_from_z_iso iy)
  iso_between_pullbacks_inv_subproof
· PullbackArrow P' pb (π₁ · ix) (π₂ · iy)
    iso_between_pullbacks_map_subproof = identity pb'

C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x' ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
PullbackArrow P pb' (π₁' · inv_from_z_iso ix)
  (π₂' · inv_from_z_iso iy)
  iso_between_pullbacks_inv_subproof · (π₁ · ix) =
identity pb' · π₁'

        
C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x' ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
PullbackArrow P pb' (π₁' · inv_from_z_iso ix)
  (π₂' · inv_from_z_iso iy)
  iso_between_pullbacks_inv_subproof · π₁ · ix =
identity pb' · π₁'

        
C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x' ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
π₁' · inv_from_z_iso ix · ix = identity pb' · π₁'

        
C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x' ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
π₁' · (inv_from_z_iso ix · ix) = identity pb' · π₁'

        
C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x' ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
π₁' · identity x' = identity pb' · π₁'

        
C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x' ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
π₁' = π₁'

        apply idpath.
      
C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x' ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
PullbackArrow P pb' (π₁' · inv_from_z_iso ix)
  (π₂' · inv_from_z_iso iy)
  iso_between_pullbacks_inv_subproof
· PullbackArrow P' pb (π₁ · ix) (π₂ · iy)
    iso_between_pullbacks_map_subproof · π₂' =
identity pb' · π₂'
 
C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x' ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
PullbackArrow P pb' (π₁' · inv_from_z_iso ix)
  (π₂' · inv_from_z_iso iy)
  iso_between_pullbacks_inv_subproof
· (PullbackArrow P' pb (π₁ · ix) (π₂ · iy)
     iso_between_pullbacks_map_subproof · π₂') =
identity pb' · π₂'

C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧

g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧

π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧

π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧

sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g

π₂' · identity y' = identity pb' · π₂'

        
C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧

iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
π₂' = π₂'

        apply idpath.
  Qed.

pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧

pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
z_iso pb pb'

pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧

π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧

π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧

sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
is_inverse_in_precat ?f ?g

    
C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x' ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
C ⟦ pb, pb' ⟧
 exact iso_between_pullbacks_map.
    
C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x' ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
C ⟦ pb', pb ⟧
 exact iso_between_pullbacks_inv.
    
C: category
pb, pb', x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
π₁: C ⟦ pb, x ⟧
π₂: C ⟦ pb, y ⟧
π₁': C ⟦ pb', x' ⟧
π₂': C ⟦ pb', y' ⟧
sqr: π₁ · f = π₂ · g
sqr': π₁' · f' = π₂' · g'
H: isPullback sqr
H': isPullback sqr'
ix: z_iso x x'
iy: z_iso y y'
iz: z_iso z z'
pf: ix · f' = f · iz
pg: iy · g' = g · iz
P:= make_Pullback sqr H: Pullback f g
P':= make_Pullback sqr' H': Pullback f' g'
is_inverse_in_precat iso_between_pullbacks_map
  iso_between_pullbacks_inv
 exact iso_between_pullbacks_are_inv.
  Defined.

End IsoOfPullbacks.

(** * Swapping pullbacks *)

C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Pfg: Pullback f g
Pgf: Pullback g f
C ⟦ Pfg, Pgf ⟧


C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Pfg: Pullback f g
Pgf: Pullback g f
C ⟦ Pfg, Pgf ⟧

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Pfg: Pullback f g
Pgf: Pullback g f
C ⟦ Pfg, y ⟧
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Pfg: Pullback f g
Pgf: Pullback g f
C ⟦ Pfg, x ⟧
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Pfg: Pullback f g
Pgf: Pullback g f
?h · g = ?k · f

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Pfg: Pullback f g
Pgf: Pullback g f
C ⟦ Pfg, y ⟧
 apply PullbackPr2.
  
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Pfg: Pullback f g
Pgf: Pullback g f
C ⟦ Pfg, x ⟧
 apply PullbackPr1.
  
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Pfg: Pullback f g
Pgf: Pullback g f
PullbackPr2 Pfg · g = PullbackPr1 Pfg · f
 abstract
      (refine (!_) ;
       apply PullbackSqrCommutes).
Defined.


C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Pfg: Pullback f g
Pgf: Pullback g f
swap_pullback_mor f g Pfg Pgf
· swap_pullback_mor g f Pgf Pfg = identity Pfg


C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Pfg: Pullback f g
Pgf: Pullback g f
swap_pullback_mor f g Pfg Pgf
· swap_pullback_mor g f Pgf Pfg = identity Pfg

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Pfg: Pullback f g
Pgf: Pullback g f
PullbackArrow Pgf Pfg (PullbackPr2 Pfg)
  (PullbackPr1 Pfg)
  (swap_pullback_mor_subproof C x y z f g Pfg)
· PullbackArrow Pfg Pgf (PullbackPr2 Pgf)
    (PullbackPr1 Pgf)
    (swap_pullback_mor_subproof C y x z g f Pgf) =
identity Pfg

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Pfg: Pullback f g
Pgf: Pullback g f
PullbackArrow Pgf Pfg (PullbackPr2 Pfg)
  (PullbackPr1 Pfg)
  (swap_pullback_mor_subproof C x y z f g Pfg)
· PullbackArrow Pfg Pgf (PullbackPr2 Pgf)
    (PullbackPr1 Pgf)
    (swap_pullback_mor_subproof C y x z g f Pgf)
· PullbackPr1 Pfg = identity Pfg · PullbackPr1 Pfg
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Pfg: Pullback f g
Pgf: Pullback g f
PullbackArrow Pgf Pfg (PullbackPr2 Pfg)
  (PullbackPr1 Pfg)
  (swap_pullback_mor_subproof C x y z f g Pfg)
· PullbackArrow Pfg Pgf (PullbackPr2 Pgf)
    (PullbackPr1 Pgf)
    (swap_pullback_mor_subproof C y x z g f Pgf)
· PullbackPr2 Pfg = identity Pfg · PullbackPr2 Pfg

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Pfg: Pullback f g
Pgf: Pullback g f
PullbackArrow Pgf Pfg (PullbackPr2 Pfg)
  (PullbackPr1 Pfg)
  (swap_pullback_mor_subproof C x y z f g Pfg)
· PullbackArrow Pfg Pgf (PullbackPr2 Pgf)
    (PullbackPr1 Pgf)
    (swap_pullback_mor_subproof C y x z g f Pgf)
· PullbackPr1 Pfg = identity Pfg · PullbackPr1 Pfg
 
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Pfg: Pullback f g

  (PullbackPr1 Pfg)
  (swap_pullback_mor_subproof C x y z f g Pfg)
· (PullbackArrow Pfg Pgf (PullbackPr2 Pgf)
     (PullbackPr1 Pgf)
     (swap_pullback_mor_subproof C y x z g f Pgf)
   · PullbackPr1 Pfg) = identity Pfg · PullbackPr1 Pfg

    
C: category

f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧

· PullbackPr2 Pgf = identity Pfg · PullbackPr1 Pfg

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Pfg: Pullback f g
Pgf: Pullback g f
PullbackPr1 Pfg = identity Pfg · PullbackPr1 Pfg

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Pfg: Pullback f g
Pgf: Pullback g f
PullbackPr1 Pfg = PullbackPr1 Pfg

    apply idpath.
  
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Pfg: Pullback f g
Pgf: Pullback g f
PullbackArrow Pgf Pfg (PullbackPr2 Pfg)
  (PullbackPr1 Pfg)
  (swap_pullback_mor_subproof C x y z f g Pfg)
· PullbackArrow Pfg Pgf (PullbackPr2 Pgf)
    (PullbackPr1 Pgf)
    (swap_pullback_mor_subproof C y x z g f Pgf)
· PullbackPr2 Pfg = identity Pfg · PullbackPr2 Pfg
 
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Pfg: Pullback f g
Pgf: Pullback g f
PullbackArrow Pgf Pfg (PullbackPr2 Pfg)
  (PullbackPr1 Pfg)
  (swap_pullback_mor_subproof C x y z f g Pfg)
· (PullbackArrow Pfg Pgf (PullbackPr2 Pgf)
     (PullbackPr1 Pgf)
     (swap_pullback_mor_subproof C y x z g f Pgf)
   · PullbackPr2 Pfg) = identity Pfg · PullbackPr2 Pfg

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Pfg: Pullback f g

  (PullbackPr1 Pfg)
  (swap_pullback_mor_subproof C x y z f g Pfg)
· PullbackPr1 Pgf = identity Pfg · PullbackPr2 Pfg

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Pfg: Pullback f g
Pgf: Pullback g f
PullbackPr2 Pfg = identity Pfg · PullbackPr2 Pfg

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Pfg: Pullback f g
Pgf: Pullback g f
PullbackPr2 Pfg = PullbackPr2 Pfg

    apply idpath.
Qed.


C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Pfg: Pullback f g
Pgf: Pullback g f
z_iso Pfg Pgf

x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Pfg: Pullback f g
Pgf: Pullback g f
z_iso Pfg Pgf

x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Pfg: Pullback f g
Pgf: Pullback g f
C ⟦ Pfg, Pgf ⟧
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Pfg: Pullback f g
Pgf: Pullback g f
C ⟦ Pgf, Pfg ⟧
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Pfg: Pullback f g
Pgf: Pullback g f
is_inverse_in_precat ?f ?g

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Pfg: Pullback f g
Pgf: Pullback g f
C ⟦ Pfg, Pgf ⟧
 apply swap_pullback_mor.
  
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Pfg: Pullback f g
Pgf: Pullback g f
C ⟦ Pgf, Pfg ⟧
 apply swap_pullback_mor.
  
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Pfg: Pullback f g
Pgf: Pullback g f
is_inverse_in_precat (swap_pullback_mor f g Pfg Pgf)
  (swap_pullback_mor g f Pgf Pfg)
 abstract
      (split ; apply swap_pullback_mor_eq).
Defined.

Section PullbackIso.

  Context {C : category}.

  
C: category
P: Pullbacks C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
i_x: x' = x
i_y: y' = y
i_z: z = z'
p1: idtoiso i_x · f · idtoiso i_z = f'
p2: idtoiso i_y · g · idtoiso i_z = g'
z_iso (P z x y f g) (P z' x' y' f' g')

  
C: category
P: Pullbacks C
x, x', y, y', z, z': C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f': C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
g': C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
i_x: x' = x
i_y: y' = y
i_z: z = z'
p1: idtoiso i_x · f · idtoiso i_z = f'
p2: idtoiso i_y · g · idtoiso i_z = g'
z_iso (P z x y f g) (P z' x' y' f' g')

    
C: category
P: Pullbacks C
x', y', z: C
f: C ⟦ x', z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y', z ⟧
z_iso (P z x' y' f g)
  (P z x' y'
     (idtoiso (idpath x') · f · idtoiso (idpath z))
     (idtoiso (idpath y') · g · idtoiso (idpath z)))

    
C: category
P: Pullbacks C
x', y', z: C
f: C ⟦ x', z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y', z ⟧
z_iso (P z x' y' f g)
  (P z x' y' (identity x' · f · identity z)
     (identity y' · g · identity z))

    
C: category
P: Pullbacks C
x', y', z: C
f: C ⟦ x', z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y', z ⟧
z_iso (P z x' y' f g) (P z x' y' f g)

    apply identity_z_iso.
  Defined.

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
f, f': C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g, g': C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p1: f = f'
p2: g = g'
Pullback f g ≃ Pullback f' g'

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
f, f': C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g, g': C ⟦ y, z ⟧
p1: f = f'
p2: g = g'
Pullback f g ≃ Pullback f' g'

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Pullback f g ≃ Pullback f g

    apply idweq.
  Defined.

  Context {x y z p : ob C}
    {π_y : C⟦p, y⟧} {π_x : C⟦p, x⟧} {f_y : C⟦y, z⟧} {f_x : C⟦x, z⟧}
    (r_p : π_x · f_x = π_y · f_y).
  Context {x' y' z' p' : ob C}
    {π'_y : C⟦p', y'⟧} {π'_x : C⟦p', x'⟧} {f'_y : C⟦y', z'⟧} {f'_x : C⟦x', z'⟧}
    {r'_p : π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y}
    (pr_p : isPullback r_p).
  Context (i_x : z_iso x' x) (i_y : z_iso y' y) (i_z : z_iso z' z) (i_p : z_iso p' p).

  Context (p_xf : i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z)
    (p_yf :  i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z)
    (π_ix : i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x)
    (π_iy :  π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y).

  Section Aux.

    Context {e : C} {g_x : C⟦e, x'⟧} {g_y : C⟦e, y'⟧} (r : g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y).

    
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
r_p: π_x · f_x = π_y · f_y
x', y', z', p': C
π'_y: C ⟦ p', y' ⟧
π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
e: C
g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
g_x · i_x · f_x = g_y · i_y · f_y

g_x · i_x · f_x = g_y · i_y · f_y

x, y, z, p: C

π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧

π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧

f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧

g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
g_x · i_x · f_x · z_iso_inv i_z =
g_y · i_y · f_y · z_iso_inv i_z

x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧

r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
g_y · f'_y = g_y · i_y · f_y · z_iso_inv i_z

C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧

x', y', z', p': C
π'_y: C ⟦ p', y' ⟧
π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
e: C
g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
g_x · (i_x · (f_x · z_iso_inv i_z)) = g_x · f'_x

        
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
r_p: π_x · f_x = π_y · f_y
x', y', z', p': C

π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧

f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z

π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
e: C
g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
i_x · (f_x · z_iso_inv i_z) = f'_x

        
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
r_p: π_x · f_x = π_y · f_y

f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z

g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
i_x · f_x · z_iso_inv i_z = f'_x

        
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
r_p: π_x · f_x = π_y · f_y
x', y', z', p': C
π'_y: C ⟦ p', y' ⟧
π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
e: C
g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
i_x · f_x = f'_x · inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_inv i_z)

        exact p_xf.
      
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
r_p: π_x · f_x = π_y · f_y
x', y', z', p': C
π'_y: C ⟦ p', y' ⟧
π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
e: C
g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
g_y · f'_y = g_y · i_y · f_y · z_iso_inv i_z

r_p: π_x · f_x = π_y · f_y

π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z

π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y

g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
g_y · f'_y = g_y · (i_y · (f_y · z_iso_inv i_z))

p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z

e: C

r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
f'_y = i_y · (f_y · z_iso_inv i_z)

        
C: category
x, y, z, p: C

π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧

r_p: π_x · f_x = π_y · f_y

π'_y: C ⟦ p', y' ⟧
π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧

i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z

p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z

g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧

r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
f'_y = i_y · f_y · z_iso_inv i_z

        
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
r_p: π_x · f_x = π_y · f_y
x', y', z', p': C
π'_y: C ⟦ p', y' ⟧
π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
e: C
g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z

        exact p_yf.
    Qed.

    Let t := pr_p e (g_x · i_x) (g_y · i_y) pf.

    Definition Pullback_iso_squares_existence_mor
      : C⟦e, p'⟧
      := pr11 t · z_iso_inv i_p.

    
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
r_p: π_x · f_x = π_y · f_y
x', y', z', p': C
π'_y: C ⟦ p', y' ⟧
π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
e: C
g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
t:= pr_p e (g_x · i_x) (g_y · i_y) pf: ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, p ⟧,
hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
Pullback_iso_squares_existence_mor · π'_x = g_x

x, y, z, p: C

t:= pr_p e (g_x · i_x) (g_y · i_y) pf: ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, p ⟧,
hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
Pullback_iso_squares_existence_mor · π'_x = g_x

i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z

p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z

t:= pr_p e (g_x · i_x) (g_y · i_y) pf: ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, p ⟧,
hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
Pullback_iso_squares_existence_mor · π'_x =
pr11 t · π_x · inv_from_z_iso i_x

      
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧

x', y', z', p': C
π'_y: C ⟦ p', y' ⟧
π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z

t:= pr_p e (g_x · i_x) (g_y · i_y) pf: ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, p ⟧,
hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
pr11 t · z_iso_inv i_p · π'_x =
pr11 t · π_x · inv_from_z_iso i_x

      
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧

π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y

i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z

p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z

t:= pr_p e (g_x · i_x) (g_y · i_y) pf: ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, p ⟧,
hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
pr11 t · (z_iso_inv i_p · π'_x) =
pr11 t · (π_x · inv_from_z_iso i_x)

hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
z_iso_inv i_p · π'_x = π_x · inv_from_z_iso i_x

π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧

i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p

p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z

r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
t:= pr_p e (g_x · i_x) (g_y · i_y) pf: ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, p ⟧,
hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
π_x = z_iso_inv i_p · π'_x · i_x

      
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧

π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y

g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
t:= pr_p e (g_x · i_x) (g_y · i_y) pf: ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, p ⟧,
hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
π_x = z_iso_inv i_p · (π'_x · i_x)

      
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
r_p: π_x · f_x = π_y · f_y

π'_y: C ⟦ p', y' ⟧
π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y

g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
t:= pr_p e (g_x · i_x) (g_y · i_y) pf: ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, p ⟧,
hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_inv i_p) · π_x = π'_x · i_x

      exact π_ix.
    Qed.
