t:= pr_p e (g_x · i_x) (g_y · i_y) pf: ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, p ⟧,
hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
Pullback_iso_squares_existence_mor · π'_y = g_y

      
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
r_p: π_x · f_x = π_y · f_y
x', y', z', p': C
π'_y: C ⟦ p', y' ⟧
π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
e: C
g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
t:= pr_p e (g_x · i_x) (g_y · i_y) pf: ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, p ⟧,
hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
Pullback_iso_squares_existence_mor · π'_y = g_y

x, y, z, p: C

π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧

i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
e: C
g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
t:= pr_p e (g_x · i_x) (g_y · i_y) pf: ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, p ⟧,
hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
Pullback_iso_squares_existence_mor · π'_y =
pr11 t · π_y · inv_from_z_iso i_y

      
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧

π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
e: C
g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
t:= pr_p e (g_x · i_x) (g_y · i_y) pf: ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, p ⟧,
hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
pr11 t · z_iso_inv i_p · π'_y =
pr11 t · π_y · inv_from_z_iso i_y

      
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧

hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
pr11 t · (z_iso_inv i_p · π'_y) =
pr11 t · (π_y · inv_from_z_iso i_y)

hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
π_y = z_iso_inv i_p · (π'_y · i_y)

x, y, z, p: C

π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧

π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p

i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z

t:= pr_p e (g_x · i_x) (g_y · i_y) pf: ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, p ⟧,
hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
z_iso_inv i_p · (π'_y · i_y) = π_y

      
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
r_p: π_x · f_x = π_y · f_y
x', y', z', p': C
π'_y: C ⟦ p', y' ⟧
π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
e: C
g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
t:= pr_p e (g_x · i_x) (g_y · i_y) pf: ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, p ⟧,
hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y

      exact π_iy.
    Qed.

    
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
r_p: π_x · f_x = π_y · f_y
x', y', z', p': C
π'_y: C ⟦ p', y' ⟧
π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
e: C
g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
t:= pr_p e (g_x · i_x) (g_y · i_y) pf: ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, p ⟧,
hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
∑ hk : C ⟦ e, p' ⟧, hk · π'_x = g_x × hk · π'_y = g_y

?pr1 · π'_x = g_x

x, y, z, p: C

hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
(λ _ : ?pr1 · π'_x = g_x, ?pr1 · π'_y = g_y) ?pr10

x, y, z, p: C

hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
C ⟦ e, p' ⟧
 exact Pullback_iso_squares_existence_mor.

g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
t:= pr_p e (g_x · i_x) (g_y · i_y) pf: ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, p ⟧,
hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
Pullback_iso_squares_existence_mor · π'_x = g_x
 exact Pullback_iso_squares_existence_comm₀.
      
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
r_p: π_x · f_x = π_y · f_y
x', y', z', p': C
π'_y: C ⟦ p', y' ⟧
π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
e: C
g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
t:= pr_p e (g_x · i_x) (g_y · i_y) pf: ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, p ⟧,
hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
(λ _ : Pullback_iso_squares_existence_mor · π'_x = g_x,
 Pullback_iso_squares_existence_mor · π'_y = g_y)
  Pullback_iso_squares_existence_comm₀
 exact Pullback_iso_squares_existence_comm₁.
    Defined.

    
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
r_p: π_x · f_x = π_y · f_y
x', y', z', p': C
π'_y: C ⟦ p', y' ⟧
π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
e: C
g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
t:= pr_p e (g_x · i_x) (g_y · i_y) pf: ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, p ⟧,
hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
s: ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, p' ⟧,
hk · π'_x = g_x × hk · π'_y = g_y
s = Pullback_iso_squares_existence

x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧

i_z: z_iso z' z

p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z

π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
e: C
g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
t:= pr_p e (g_x · i_x) (g_y · i_y) pf: ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, p ⟧,
hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
s: ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, p' ⟧,
hk · π'_x = g_x × hk · π'_y = g_y
s = Pullback_iso_squares_existence

      
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧

f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧

r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z

p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
e: C
g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
t:= pr_p e (g_x · i_x) (g_y · i_y) pf: ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, p ⟧,
hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
s₁: C ⟦ e, p' ⟧
qₗ: s₁ · π'_x = g_x
qᵣ: s₁ · π'_y = g_y
s₁,, qₗ,, qᵣ = Pullback_iso_squares_existence

      
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧

f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧

pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
e: C
g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
t:= pr_p e (g_x · i_x) (g_y · i_y) pf: ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, p ⟧,
hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
s₁: C ⟦ e, p' ⟧
qₗ: s₁ · π'_x = g_x
qᵣ: s₁ · π'_y = g_y
isPredicate
  (λ x : C ⟦ e, p' ⟧, x · π'_x = g_x × x · π'_y = g_y)
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
r_p: π_x · f_x = π_y · f_y

π'_y: C ⟦ p', y' ⟧
π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
e: C
g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
t:= pr_p e (g_x · i_x) (g_y · i_y) pf: ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, p ⟧,
hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
s₁: C ⟦ e, p' ⟧
qₗ: s₁ · π'_x = g_x
qᵣ: s₁ · π'_y = g_y
pr1 (s₁,, qₗ,, qᵣ) =
pr1 Pullback_iso_squares_existence

      
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧

x', y', z', p': C
π'_y: C ⟦ p', y' ⟧
π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
e: C
g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
t:= pr_p e (g_x · i_x) (g_y · i_y) pf: ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, p ⟧,
hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
s₁: C ⟦ e, p' ⟧
qₗ: s₁ · π'_x = g_x
qᵣ: s₁ · π'_y = g_y
isPredicate
  (λ x : C ⟦ e, p' ⟧, x · π'_x = g_x × x · π'_y = g_y)
 intro ; apply isapropdirprod ; apply homset_property.

x, y, z, p: C

x, y, z, p: C

qₗ: s₁ · π'_x = g_x
qᵣ: s₁ · π'_y = g_y

x, y, z, p: C

s₁: C ⟦ e, p' ⟧
qₗ: s₁ · π'_x = g_x
qᵣ: s₁ · π'_y = g_y
(λ _ : s₁ · i_p · π_x = g_x · i_x,
 s₁ · i_p · π_y = g_y · i_y) 
  ?pr1

x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧

hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
s₁: C ⟦ e, p' ⟧

x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧

f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧

π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
e: C
g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
t:= pr_p e (g_x · i_x) (g_y · i_y) pf: ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, p ⟧,
hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
s₁: C ⟦ e, p' ⟧
qₗ: s₁ · π'_x = g_x
qᵣ: s₁ · π'_y = g_y
s₁ · (π'_x · i_x) = g_x · i_x

        
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
r_p: π_x · f_x = π_y · f_y
x', y', z', p': C
π'_y: C ⟦ p', y' ⟧
π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
e: C
g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
t:= pr_p e (g_x · i_x) (g_y · i_y) pf: ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, p ⟧,
hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
s₁: C ⟦ e, p' ⟧
qₗ: s₁ · π'_x = g_x
qᵣ: s₁ · π'_y = g_y
s₁ · π'_x · i_x = g_x · i_x

        now rewrite qₗ.
      
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
r_p: π_x · f_x = π_y · f_y
x', y', z', p': C
π'_y: C ⟦ p', y' ⟧
π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
e: C
g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
t:= pr_p e (g_x · i_x) (g_y · i_y) pf: ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, p ⟧,
hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
s₁: C ⟦ e, p' ⟧
qₗ: s₁ · π'_x = g_x
qᵣ: s₁ · π'_y = g_y
(λ _ : s₁ · i_p · π_x = g_x · i_x,
 s₁ · i_p · π_y = g_y · i_y)
  (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ e, x ⟧) (s₁ · i_p · π_x)
     (s₁ · (i_p · π_x))
     (λ p : C ⟦ e, x ⟧, p = g_x · i_x)
     (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ p', x ⟧) (i_p · π_x)
        (π'_x · i_x)
        (λ p : C ⟦ p', x ⟧, s₁ · p = g_x · i_x)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ e, x ⟧)
           (s₁ · (π'_x · i_x)) (s₁ · π'_x · i_x)
           (λ p : C ⟦ e, x ⟧, p = g_x · i_x)
           (internal_paths_rew_r (C ⟦ e, x' ⟧)
              (s₁ · π'_x) g_x
              (λ p : C ⟦ e, x' ⟧, p · i_x = g_x · i_x)
              (idpath (g_x · i_x)) qₗ)
           (assoc s₁ π'_x i_x)) π_ix)
     (assoc' s₁ i_p π_x))
 
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
r_p: π_x · f_x = π_y · f_y
x', y', z', p': C
π'_y: C ⟦ p', y' ⟧
π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
e: C
g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
t:= pr_p e (g_x · i_x) (g_y · i_y) pf: ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, p ⟧,
hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
s₁: C ⟦ e, p' ⟧
qₗ: s₁ · π'_x = g_x
qᵣ: s₁ · π'_y = g_y
s₁ · i_p · π_y = g_y · i_y

        
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
r_p: π_x · f_x = π_y · f_y
x', y', z', p': C
π'_y: C ⟦ p', y' ⟧
π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
e: C
g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
t:= pr_p e (g_x · i_x) (g_y · i_y) pf: ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, p ⟧,
hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
s₁: C ⟦ e, p' ⟧
qₗ: s₁ · π'_x = g_x
qᵣ: s₁ · π'_y = g_y
s₁ · (i_p · π_y) = g_y · i_y

        
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
r_p: π_x · f_x = π_y · f_y
x', y', z', p': C
π'_y: C ⟦ p', y' ⟧
π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
e: C
g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
t:= pr_p e (g_x · i_x) (g_y · i_y) pf: ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, p ⟧,
hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
s₁: C ⟦ e, p' ⟧
qₗ: s₁ · π'_x = g_x
qᵣ: s₁ · π'_y = g_y
s₁ · (π'_y · i_y) = g_y · i_y

        
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
r_p: π_x · f_x = π_y · f_y
x', y', z', p': C
π'_y: C ⟦ p', y' ⟧
π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
e: C
g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
t:= pr_p e (g_x · i_x) (g_y · i_y) pf: ∃! hk : C ⟦ e, p ⟧,
hk · π_x = g_x · i_x × hk · π_y = g_y · i_y
s₁: C ⟦ e, p' ⟧
qₗ: s₁ · π'_x = g_x
qᵣ: s₁ · π'_y = g_y
s₁ · π'_y · i_y = g_y · i_y

        now rewrite qᵣ.
    Qed.

  End Aux.

  
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
r_p: π_x · f_x = π_y · f_y
x', y', z', p': C
π'_y: C ⟦ p', y' ⟧
π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
isPullback r'_p

  
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
r_p: π_x · f_x = π_y · f_y
x', y', z', p': C
π'_y: C ⟦ p', y' ⟧
π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
isPullback r'_p

    
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
r_p: π_x · f_x = π_y · f_y
x', y', z', p': C
π'_y: C ⟦ p', y' ⟧
π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
e: C
g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
∃! hk : C ⟦ e, p' ⟧, hk · π'_x = g_x × hk · π'_y = g_y

    
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
r_p: π_x · f_x = π_y · f_y
x', y', z', p': C
π'_y: C ⟦ p', y' ⟧
π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
e: C
g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
∑ hk : C ⟦ e, p' ⟧, hk · π'_x = g_x × hk · π'_y = g_y
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
r_p: π_x · f_x = π_y · f_y
x', y', z', p': C
π'_y: C ⟦ p', y' ⟧
π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
e: C
g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
(λ cntr : ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, p' ⟧,
          hk · π'_x = g_x × hk · π'_y = g_y,
 ∏
 t : ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, p' ⟧,
     hk · π'_x = g_x × hk · π'_y = g_y, 
 t = cntr) ?pr1

    
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
r_p: π_x · f_x = π_y · f_y
x', y', z', p': C
π'_y: C ⟦ p', y' ⟧
π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
e: C
g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
∑ hk : C ⟦ e, p' ⟧, hk · π'_x = g_x × hk · π'_y = g_y
 exact (Pullback_iso_squares_existence r).
    
C: category
x, y, z, p: C
π_y: C ⟦ p, y ⟧
π_x: C ⟦ p, x ⟧
f_y: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f_x: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
r_p: π_x · f_x = π_y · f_y
x', y', z', p': C
π'_y: C ⟦ p', y' ⟧
π'_x: C ⟦ p', x' ⟧
f'_y: C ⟦ y', z' ⟧
f'_x: C ⟦ x', z' ⟧
r'_p: π'_x · f'_x = π'_y · f'_y
pr_p: isPullback r_p
i_x: z_iso x' x
i_y: z_iso y' y
i_z: z_iso z' z
i_p: z_iso p' p
p_xf: i_x · f_x = f'_x · i_z
p_yf: i_y · f_y = f'_y · i_z
π_ix: i_p · π_x = π'_x · i_x
π_iy: π'_y · i_y = i_p · π_y
e: C
g_x: C ⟦ e, x' ⟧
g_y: C ⟦ e, y' ⟧
r: g_x · f'_x = g_y · f'_y
(λ cntr : ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, p' ⟧,
          hk · π'_x = g_x × hk · π'_y = g_y,
 ∏
 t : ∑ hk : C ⟦ e, p' ⟧,
     hk · π'_x = g_x × hk · π'_y = g_y, t = cntr)
  (Pullback_iso_squares_existence r)
 intro ; apply Pullback_iso_squares_uniqueness.
  Qed.

End PullbackIso.
